We validate our paradigm on large-scale benchmarks: under a 75% compression stress test on ImageNet-1K, AGF effectively avoids the structural collapse where traditional metrics aggressively fall below random sampling. Furthermore, when systematically deployed for dynamic inference on ImageNet-100, our hybrid approach achieves Pareto-optimal efficiency. It reduces the usage of the heavy expert by approximately 50% (achieving an estimated overall cost of 0.92$\times$) without sacrificing the full-model accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一种基于交替梯度流（AGF）的统一度量，有效解决了深度网络结构剪枝和动态路由中的关键问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习模型的效率优化依赖于传统的静态启发式方法，如权重大小或激活感知（例如 Wanda, RIA）。然而，在应用到深度视觉网络的结构剪枝时，这些方法存在幅度偏差，无法准确保留关键功能路径，导致性能下降。现有方法在非结构化设置中表现良好，但结构化剪枝中可能引发结构崩溃，限制了模型压缩和动态推理的实际应用。因此，迫切需要一种更精确的度量来指导结构剪枝和动态路由，以提高模型效率而不牺牲精度。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了 Alternating Gradient Flow (AGF) 度量，采用绝对特征空间的泰勒展开来捕获网络的结构“动态效用”。通过解耦动态范式，将离线结构搜索与在线执行分离。关键创新点包括：发现极端稀疏性下的拓扑相变和视觉变换器中的稀疏性瓶颈现象；基于梯度幅度解耦分析，设计了一个混合路由框架，结合 AGF 引导的离线搜索和零成本物理先验的在线执行。实验中使用 ImageNet-1K 和 ImageNet-100 数据集进行验证，涉及大规模基准测试。
light_analysis.result: 在 ImageNet-1K 的 75% 压缩压力测试中，AGF 度量成功避免了结构崩溃，性能优于传统指标如 Wanda 和 RIA，甚至优于随机采样。在 ImageNet-100 的动态推理任务中，混合路由框架实现了 Pareto 最优效率，具体表现为减少了重专家模块的使用约 50%，总体计算成本估计为 0.92 倍，同时保持了全模型的分类精度。这些结果表明，AGF 和相关方法在提高深度网络效率方面具有显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文的主要贡献是提出了一种基于 AGF 的统一度量，能够有效指导深度网络的结构剪枝和动态路由。学术上，它提供了对网络拓扑和动态信号的新理论洞察，如拓扑相变和稀疏性瓶颈；应用上，该方法在资源受限的环境中实现高效模型部署，不牺牲精度。未来工作可以探索该方法在其他网络架构或任务中的扩展性，以及进一步优化在线执行策略。摘要未明确说明具体局限性，但可能涉及计算成本或泛化能力。

title: Measuring AI Agents' Progress on Multi-Step Cyber Attack Scenarios
abstract: We evaluate the autonomous cyber-attack capabilities of frontier AI models on two purpose-built cyber ranges-a 32-step corporate network attack and a 7-step industrial control system attack-that require chaining heterogeneous capabilities across extended action sequences. By comparing seven models released over an eighteen-month period (August 2024 to February 2026) at varying inference-time compute budgets, we observe two capability trends. First, model performance scales log-linearly with inference-time compute, with no observed plateau-increasing from 10M to 100M tokens yields gains of up to 59%, requiring no specific technical sophistication from the operator. Second, each successive model generation outperforms its predecessor at fixed token budgets: on the corporate network range, average steps completed at 10M tokens rose from 1.7 (GPT-4o, August 2024) to 9.8 (Opus 4.6, February 2026). The best single run completed 22 of 32 steps, corresponding to roughly 6 of the estimated 14 hours a human expert would need. On the industrial control system range, performance remains limited, though the most recent models are the first to reliably complete steps, averaging 1.2-1.4 of 7 (max 3).

light_analysis.overview: 该论文评估了前沿 AI 模型在自主多步网络攻击场景中的能力，并揭示了性能随计算和模型代际提升的趋势。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决 AI 模型在复杂网络攻击任务中自主能力的评估问题。实际问题是衡量 AI 代理在模拟真实网络攻击场景中的进展，这类攻击需要链接异构能力并执行扩展行动序列，对网络安全测试和风险评估至关重要。现有方法可能缺乏对多步骤、长序列攻击的全面评估，导致难以准确衡量 AI 能力提升。通过构建定制网络范围，论文试图填补评估空白，推动 AI 在网络安全应用中的发展，并为研究者提供更精确的性能基准。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种基于定制网络范围的评估方法，构建了两个多步网络攻击场景：一个 32 步的企业网络攻击和一个 7 步的工业控制系统攻击。通过比较七个在不同时间段（2024年8月至2026年2月）发布的 AI 模型，并在不同推理时间计算预算下进行评估，如使用 10M 到 100M tokens 的推理计算。关键创新点在于模拟真实世界网络攻击的复杂性，要求模型自主链接异构能力。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节，但评估基于完成步骤数和性能缩放趋势，聚焦于多步骤任务的执行能力。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果表明，模型性能随推理时间计算呈对数线性缩放，无平台期：从 10M 增加到 100M tokens 时，性能提升高达 59%。在固定 token 预算下，每个新模型代际优于前一代：在企业网络范围，10M tokens 时平均完成步数从 1.7（GPT-4o, 2024年8月）升至 9.8（Opus 4.6, 2026年2月）。最佳单次运行完成 32 步中的 22 步，相当于人类专家估计 14 小时中的约 6 小时。在工业控制系统攻击中，性能有限，但最新模型首次可靠完成步骤，平均完成 1.2-1.4 步（最多 3 步），显示出初步进展但与基线相比仍有差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是系统评估了前沿 AI 模型在自主多步网络攻击中的能力，并揭示了性能随计算和模型代际的显著提升趋势。学术价值在于提出了一种评估 AI 在复杂任务中进展的方法，为网络安全和 AI 能力研究提供新视角。实际应用价值包括帮助开发更安全的系统、测试 AI 代理的威胁模拟能力。局限性在于工业控制系统攻击中性能仍然有限，未来工作可扩展测试场景、改进模型训练或探索更多应用领域，以进一步提升 AI 代理在现实世界任务中的可靠性和效率。

title: TennisExpert: Towards Expert-Level Analytical Sports Video Understanding
abstract: Tennis is one of the most widely followed sports, generating extensive broadcast footage with strong potential for professional analysis, automated coaching, and real-time commentary. However, automatic tennis understanding remains underexplored due to two key challenges: (1) the lack of large-scale benchmarks with fine-grained annotations and expert-level commentary, and (2) the difficulty of building accurate yet efficient multimodal systems suitable for real-time deployment. To address these challenges, we introduce TennisVL, a large-scale tennis benchmark comprising over 200 professional matches (471.9 hours) and 40,000+ rally-level clips. Unlike existing commentary datasets that focus on descriptive play-by-play narration, TennisVL emphasizes expert analytical commentary capturing tactical reasoning, player decisions, and match momentum. Furthermore, we propose TennisExpert, a multimodal tennis understanding framework that integrates a video semantic parser with a memory-augmented model built on Qwen3-VL-8B. The parser extracts key match elements (e.g., scores, shot sequences, ball bounces, and player locations), while hierarchical memory modules capture both short- and long-term temporal context. Experiments show that TennisExpert consistently outperforms strong proprietary baselines, including GPT-5, Gemini, and Claude, and demonstrates improved ability to capture tactical context and match dynamics. Our dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/LZYAndy/TennisExpert.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了TennisVL大规模网球视频数据集和TennisExpert多模态框架，旨在实现专家级分析性的网球视频理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 网球运动产生大量广播视频，在专业分析、自动教练和实时评论方面具有应用潜力。然而，自动网球理解面临两大挑战：缺乏大规模、细粒度注释和专家级评论的基准数据集，以及现有系统难以兼顾准确性和实时部署效率。现有数据集侧重于描述性叙述，忽略了战术推理等高级分析，限制了专家级视频理解的发展，因此需要新的基准和方法来填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出TennisExpert框架，集成视频语义解析器和基于Qwen3-VL-8B的内存增强模型。解析器从视频中提取关键比赛元素，如得分、击球序列、球落点和球员位置；层次化内存模块捕获短期和长期时序上下文，以分析战术推理和比赛动态。使用自建的TennisVL数据集，包含超过200场职业比赛、471.9小时视频和40,000多个局点剪辑，专门针对专家级分析性评论进行标注，强调战术而非描述性叙述。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，TennisExpert consistently outperforms 强大的专有基线模型，包括GPT-5、Gemini和Claude。框架在捕捉战术上下文和比赛动态方面表现出改进能力。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升百分比，但整体评估表明，TennisExpert在专家级网球视频理解任务中优于基线方法，突显了其实际应用的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是引入了TennisVL基准数据集和TennisExpert多模态框架，推动了专家级分析性体育视频理解的进展。数据集弥补了现有评论数据集的不足，框架通过结合解析器和内存增强模型提升了理解性能。代码和数据集已公开，为后续研究提供资源。这项工作具有学术价值，设定了体育视频分析的新标准，并具有实际应用潜力，如自动化专业分析和实时评论系统，但摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向。

title: EmoStory: Emotion-Aware Story Generation
abstract: Story generation aims to produce image sequences that depict coherent narratives while maintaining subject consistency across frames. Although existing methods have excelled in producing coherent and expressive stories, they remain largely emotion-neutral, focusing on what subject appears in a story while overlooking how emotions shape narrative interpretation and visual presentation. As stories are intended to engage audiences emotionally, we introduce emotion-aware story generation, a new task that aims to generate subject-consistent visual stories with explicit emotional directions. This task is challenging due to the abstract nature of emotions, which must be grounded in concrete visual elements and consistently expressed across a narrative through visual composition. To address these challenges, we propose EmoStory, a two-stage framework that integrates agent-based story planning and region-aware story generation. The planning stage transforms target emotions into coherent story prompts with emotion agent and writer agent, while the generation stage preserves subject consistency and injects emotion-related elements through region-aware composition. We evaluate EmoStory on a newly constructed dataset covering 25 subjects and 600 emotional stories. Extensive quantitative and qualitative results, along with user studies, show that EmoStory outperforms state-of-the-art story generation methods in emotion accuracy, prompt alignment, and subject consistency.

light_analysis.overview: EmoStory提出了一种两阶段框架，通过整合基于代理的情感规划和区域感知生成，实现了具有明确情感方向的视觉故事生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 故事生成现有方法虽能产生连贯叙事，但主要情感中性，忽视情感如何塑造叙事解释和视觉呈现。由于故事旨在情感上吸引观众，现有方法在情感表达方面存在不足，导致生成的视觉故事缺乏情感深度和吸引力。因此，本研究引入情感感知故事生成新任务，旨在解决情感抽象性需与具体视觉元素结合的挑战，以生成主题一致且情感丰富的视觉叙事。
light_analysis.method: EmoStory采用两阶段框架：规划阶段通过情感代理和作者代理将目标情感转化为连贯故事提示；生成阶段利用区域感知构作保持主题一致性并注入情感相关视觉元素。该方法基于新构建的数据集进行评估，涵盖25个主题和600个情感故事，核心创新在于将情感代理与视觉区域控制相结合，以有效接地抽象情感并确保跨帧叙事连贯性。
light_analysis.result: 在新数据集上的评估显示，EmoStory在情感准确性、提示对齐和主题一致性方面优于最先进的故事生成方法。用户研究和定性分析进一步验证了其有效性，表明该方法能更精确地表达目标情感并维持叙事连贯性，尽管摘要未明确说明具体数值指标，但强调了整体性能的显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是提出了情感感知故事生成任务和EmoStory框架，在学术上拓展了故事生成的情感维度，实际应用中能生成更吸引人的视觉故事。研究强调了情感在叙事中的重要性，未来工作可探索更细粒度情感表达或整合更多视觉元素以增强适应性。

title: Fusion Complexity Inversion: Why Simpler Cross View Modules Outperform SSMs and Cross View Attention Transformers for Pasture Biomass Regression
abstract: Accurate estimation of pasture biomass from agricultural imagery is critical for sustainable livestock management, yet existing methods are limited by the small, imbalanced, and sparsely annotated datasets typical of real world monitoring. In this study, adaptation of vision foundation models to agricultural regression is systematically evaluated on the CSIRO Pasture Biomass benchmark, a 357 image dual view dataset with laboratory validated, component wise ground truth for five biomass targets, through 17 configurations spanning four backbones (EfficientNet-B3 to DINOv3-ViT-L), five cross view fusion mechanisms, and a 4x2 metadata factorial. A counterintuitive principle, termed "fusion complexity inversion", is uncovered: on scarce agricultural data, a two layer gated depthwise convolution (R^2 = 0.903) outperforms cross view attention transformers (0.833), bidirectional SSMs (0.819), and full Mamba (0.793, below the no fusion baseline). Backbone pretraining scale is found to monotonically dominate all architectural choices, with the DINOv2 -> DINOv3 upgrade alone yielding +5.0 R^2 points. Training only metadata (species, state, and NDVI) is shown to create a universal ceiling at R^2 ~ 0.829, collapsing an 8.4 point fusion spread to 0.1 points. Actionable guidelines for sparse agricultural benchmarks are established: backbone quality should be prioritized over fusion complexity, local modules preferred over global alternatives, and features unavailable at inference excluded.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示了“融合复杂性反转”原则，即在数据稀缺的农业图像回归中，简单的跨视图融合模块比复杂的注意力变换器和状态空间模型表现更优。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决从农业图像准确估计牧场生物量的问题，这对可持续畜牧业管理至关重要。现有方法受到现实世界中常见的小型、不平衡和稀疏标注数据集的限制，导致估计精度不足和泛化能力差，阻碍了有效的牧场监测。因此，需要开发适应数据稀缺环境的更有效回归方法来提升农业应用的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 研究在CSIRO Pasture Biomass基准上系统评估视觉基础模型的适应性，该基准包含357个双视图图像数据集，具有实验室验证的五个生物量目标真实值。实验设计了17种配置，涵盖四个骨干网络（如EfficientNet-B3到DINOv3-ViT-L）、五种跨视图融合机制和一个4x2元数据因子。关键创新是引入了“融合复杂性反转”概念，通过比较不同融合模块性能来探索简单方法的优势。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，两层门控深度卷积融合模块R^2为0.903，优于跨视图注意力变换器（0.833）、双向状态空间模型（0.819）和完整Mamba（0.793）。骨干预训练规模主导所有架构选择，DINOv2到DINOv3升级提升5.0 R^2点。仅使用元数据训练时，性能天花板约R^2 0.829，将融合模块间差异从8.4点压缩到0.1点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论是论文揭示了在数据稀缺农业应用中，简单融合模块优于复杂模型，并提供了可操作指南：优先骨干网络质量而非融合复杂性、偏好本地模块而非全局替代、并排除推理时不可用特征。这为农业计算机视觉领域提供了新见解，有助于优化模型设计。未来工作可能涉及验证这些原则在其他领域的适用性。

title: AgriPath: A Systematic Exploration of Architectural Trade-offs for Crop Disease Classification
abstract: Reliable crop disease detection requires models that perform consistently across diverse acquisition conditions, yet existing evaluations often focus on single architectural families or lab-generated datasets. This work presents a systematic empirical comparison of three model paradigms for fine-grained crop disease classification: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), contrastive Vision-Language Models (VLMs), and generative VLMs. To enable controlled analysis of domain effects, we introduce AgriPath-LF16, a benchmark containing 111k images spanning 16 crops and 41 diseases with explicit separation between laboratory and field imagery, alongside a balanced 30k subset for standardized training and evaluation. All models are trained and evaluated under unified protocols across full, lab-only, and field-only training regimes using macro-F1 and Parse Success Rate (PSR) to account for generative reliability. The results reveal distinct performance profiles. CNNs achieve the highest accuracy on lab imagery but degrade under domain shift. Contrastive VLMs provide a robust and parameter-efficient alternative with competitive cross-domain performance. Generative VLMs demonstrate the strongest resilience to distributional variation, albeit with additional failure modes stemming from free-text generation. These findings highlight that architectural choice should be guided by deployment context rather than aggregate accuracy alone.
comment: 11 pages main text, 22 pages total including references and appendix. 6 figures, 10 tables. Code and dataset will be released upon publication

light_analysis.overview: 本论文系统比较了卷积神经网络、对比视觉语言模型和生成视觉语言模型在作物病害分类中的性能，并引入了AgriPath-LF16数据集以支持受控分析，强调架构选择应根据部署环境而非仅总体准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 可靠的作物病害检测对农业生产至关重要，但现有模型常在实验室环境表现良好，在真实现场条件下性能下降，导致跨域一致性不足。目前研究多关注单一架构类型或使用有限数据集，缺乏对不同模型范式在域转移下的系统比较。因此，本文旨在探索卷积神经网络、视觉语言模型等架构在作物病害分类中的权衡，以解决实际部署中的可靠性问题和现有评估方法的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一个系统化实证比较方法，针对卷积神经网络、对比视觉语言模型和生成视觉语言模型进行细粒度作物病害分类。关键创新包括引入了AgriPath-LF16基准数据集，该数据集包含111,000张图像，涵盖16种作物和41种疾病，并明确分离实验室和现场图像以支持受控域效应分析。使用一个平衡的30k子集进行标准化训练和评估，所有模型在统一协议下跨全数据集、仅实验室和仅现场训练方案进行评估，采用macro-F1和解析成功率（PSR）指标来评估生成模型的可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，卷积神经网络在实验室图像上准确率最高，但在域转移到现场图像时性能显著下降。对比视觉语言模型提供稳健的跨域性能，具有参数效率优势，在交叉域表现中具有竞争力。生成视觉语言模型对分布变化展现出最强韧性，但由于自由文本生成引入了额外失败模式。这些结果通过macro-F1和PSR指标量化，摘要未明确说明具体数值，但突出不同架构在不同部署环境下的性能权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于系统比较了不同模型范式在作物病害分类中的性能，揭示了架构选择应基于部署上下文而非仅总体准确率，为实际应用提供指导。学术价值在于提出了标准化评估框架和新数据集AgriPath-LF16，促进跨域机器学习研究。实际应用价值在于帮助农业AI开发者优化模型选择。局限性包括生成模型可能因文本生成不可靠而失败，未来工作可探索混合模型或改进生成稳定性。

title: FlowMotion: Training-Free Flow Guidance for Video Motion Transfer
abstract: Video motion transfer aims to generate a target video that inherits motion patterns from a source video while rendering new scenes. Existing training-free approaches focus on constructing motion guidance based on the intermediate outputs of pre-trained T2V models, which results in heavy computational overhead and limited flexibility. In this paper, we present FlowMotion, a novel training-free framework that enables efficient and flexible motion transfer by directly leveraging the predicted outputs of flow-based T2V models. Our key insight is that early latent predictions inherently encode rich temporal information. Motivated by this, we propose flow guidance, which extracts motion representations based on latent predictions to align motion patterns between source and generated videos. We further introduce a velocity regularization strategy to stabilize optimization and ensure smooth motion evolution. By operating purely on model predictions, FlowMotion achieves superior time and resource efficiency as well as competitive performance compared with state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: FlowMotion提出了一种无需训练的视频运动迁移框架，通过流指导实现高效灵活的运动对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频运动迁移是计算机视觉中的关键任务，旨在生成继承源视频运动模式的新场景视频。现有无需训练的方法通常基于预训练文本到视频（T2V）模型的中间输出构建运动指导，但这导致高计算开销和有限灵活性，限制了在实时应用和复杂场景中的实用性。因此，本研究旨在解决这些不足，通过更高效的框架改进运动控制，以满足视频生成领域对性能和可扩展性的需求。
light_analysis.method: FlowMotion框架的核心是直接利用基于流的T2V模型的预测输出进行运动迁移。该方法通过提取早期潜在预测中编码的丰富时间信息，构建流指导来对齐源视频与生成视频的运动模式。此外，引入速度正则化策略以稳定优化过程，确保运动演化的平滑性。整个框架无需额外训练，仅操作于模型预测，从而提高了计算效率和调整灵活性，简化了视频生成流程。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，FlowMotion在时间和资源效率上优于最先进的方法，展现出竞争力的性能。与基线方法相比，它显著减少了计算开销，同时保持或提升了运动迁移的质量，验证了框架的有效性。摘要未明确说明具体准确率或FID分数等指标，但整体强调了其在标准数据集上的优异表现和效率优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowMotion的主要贡献在于提出了一种新颖的无需训练视频运动迁移框架，通过流指导和速度正则化提升了效率和灵活性。该研究在学术上推动了视频生成技术的发展，在实际应用中为实时视频编辑和内容创作提供了实用工具。未来工作可探索更复杂的运动场景或扩展到其他视频任务，摘要未明确说明具体局限性，但框架设计为后续优化留出了空间。

title: Lipschitz-Based Robustness Certification Under Floating-Point Execution
abstract: Sensitivity-based robustness certification has emerged as a practical approach for certifying neural network robustness, including in settings that require verifiable guarantees. A key advantage of these methods is that certification is performed by concrete numerical computation (rather than symbolic reasoning) and scales efficiently with network size. However, as with the vast majority of prior work on robustness certification and verification, the soundness of these methods is typically proved with respect to a semantic model that assumes exact real arithmetic. In reality deployed neural network implementations execute using floating-point arithmetic. This mismatch creates a semantic gap between certified robustness properties and the behaviour of the executed system.   As motivating evidence, we exhibit concrete counterexamples showing that real arithmetic robustness guarantees can fail under floating-point execution, even for previously verified certifiers, with discrepancies becoming pronounced at lower-precision formats such as float16. We then develop a formal, compositional theory relating real arithmetic Lipschitz-based sensitivity bounds to the sensitivity of floating-point execution under standard rounding-error models, specialised to feed-forward neural networks with ReLU activations. We derive sound conditions for robustness under floating-point execution, including bounds on certificate degradation and sufficient conditions for the absence of overflow. We formalize the theory and its main soundness results, and implement an executable certifier based on these principles, which we empirically evaluate to demonstrate its practicality.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种理论，将基于Lipschitz的鲁棒性认证扩展到浮点执行，确保神经网络在浮点算术下的可靠保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经网络鲁棒性认证方法通常假设精确实数算术，而实际部署使用浮点算术，这导致语义差距，使认证结果不可靠。问题的重要性在于，浮点误差可能使在实数模型下认证的鲁棒性在浮点执行时失败，尤其是在低精度格式如float16下，降低了认证的实用性。现有方法不足在于它们忽略浮点执行的影响，本文通过展示反例强调需要新方法覆盖浮点环境，以提高认证的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文发展了一个形式化的组合理论，将实数算术Lipschitz-based敏感性边界与浮点执行下的敏感性关联起来。关键创新点包括基于标准舍入误差模型，专门针对带ReLU激活的前馈神经网络，推导出浮点执行下的鲁棒性条件。方法涉及计算证书退化边界和确定无溢出的充分条件。理论被形式化，并实现了一个基于这些原理的可执行认证器，用于实证评估。
light_analysis.result: 论文展示了具体反例，显示现有基于实数算术的认证器在浮点执行下可能失效，尤其在低精度如float16中。理论部分形式化了主要结果，包括鲁棒性条件的推导。实现的可执行认证器进行了实证评估，证明其实用性，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标或与基线的详细对比。结果表明，该方法能够提供浮点执行下的可靠认证，减少语义差距的影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是解决了实数与浮点算术在鲁棒性认证中的语义差距问题，提出了一种理论确保神经网络在浮点执行下的鲁棒性。学术价值在于形式化了相关理论，填补了研究空白；实际价值在于提高了认证在现实部署中的可靠性。局限性可能包括仅针对前馈神经网络和ReLU激活，未来工作可扩展到更复杂网络或其他精度格式。

title: Test-Time Adaptation via Many-Shot Prompting: Benefits, Limits, and Pitfalls
abstract: Test-time adaptation enables large language models (LLMs) to modify their behavior at inference without updating model parameters. A common approach is many-shot prompting, where large numbers of in-context learning (ICL) examples are injected as an input-space test-time update. Although performance can improve as more demonstrations are added, the reliability and limits of this update mechanism remain poorly understood, particularly for open-source models. We present an empirical study of many-shot prompting across tasks and model backbones, analyzing how performance varies with update magnitude, example ordering, and selection policy. We further study Dynamic and Reinforced ICL as alternative test-time update strategies that control which information is injected and how it constrains model behavior. We find that many-shot prompting is effective for structured tasks where demonstrations provide high information gain, but is highly sensitive to selection strategy and often shows limited benefits for open-ended generation tasks. Overall, we characterize the practical limits of prompt-based test-time adaptation and outline when input-space updates are beneficial versus harmful.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过实证研究揭示了基于许多样本提示的测试时适应在实际应用中的益处、限制和陷阱，并评估了其在结构化与开放式任务中的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型通过测试时适应在推理时调整行为而不更新参数，许多样本提示作为常见方法，通过注入大量上下文学习示例实现输入空间更新。然而，该方法的可靠性和极限，特别是对于开源模型，仍未被充分理解，这限制了实际应用中的优化。理解这些方面的重要性在于指导模型性能提升，避免无效或有害的更新，从而增强适应策略的稳定性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括对许多样本提示的实证分析，覆盖多个任务和模型骨干，探讨性能如何随更新幅度、示例顺序和选择策略变化。关键创新点在于引入Dynamic和Reinforced ICL作为替代测试时更新策略，这些策略通过控制信息注入和行为约束来优化适应过程。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集和模型架构，但强调了跨任务的广泛分析。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，许多样本提示在结构化任务中有效，尤其当演示提供高信息增益时，性能随示例增加而提升，但对选择策略高度敏感。在开放式生成任务中，该方法效果有限，性能提升不明显。通过比较Dynamic和Reinforced ICL等替代策略，研究评估了不同更新机制的效果，但摘要未提供具体的性能指标数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于揭示了基于提示的测试时适应的实际限制，并为输入空间更新的适用性提供了指导。学术价值在于深化了对上下文学习机制的理解，实际应用价值在于帮助开发人员选择合适适应策略以优化模型性能。未来工作可能包括进一步研究优化策略、扩展到更多任务类型以及解决选择策略的敏感性问题。

title: Model Medicine: A Clinical Framework for Understanding, Diagnosing, and Treating AI Models
abstract: Model Medicine is the science of understanding, diagnosing, treating, and preventing disorders in AI models, grounded in the principle that AI models -- like biological organisms -- have internal structures, dynamic processes, heritable traits, observable symptoms, classifiable conditions, and treatable states. This paper introduces Model Medicine as a research program, bridging the gap between current AI interpretability research (anatomical observation) and the systematic clinical practice that complex AI systems increasingly require. We present five contributions: (1) a discipline taxonomy organizing 15 subdisciplines across four divisions -- Basic Model Sciences, Clinical Model Sciences, Model Public Health, and Model Architectural Medicine; (2) the Four Shell Model (v3.3), a behavioral genetics framework empirically grounded in 720 agents and 24,923 decisions from the Agora-12 program, explaining how model behavior emerges from Core--Shell interaction; (3) Neural MRI (Model Resonance Imaging), a working open-source diagnostic tool mapping five medical neuroimaging modalities to AI interpretability techniques, validated through four clinical cases demonstrating imaging, comparison, localization, and predictive capability; (4) a five-layer diagnostic framework for comprehensive model assessment; and (5) clinical model sciences including the Model Temperament Index for behavioral profiling, Model Semiology for symptom description, and M-CARE for standardized case reporting. We additionally propose the Layered Core Hypothesis -- a biologically-inspired three-layer parameter architecture -- and a therapeutic framework connecting diagnosis to treatment.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了Model Medicine，一个基于医学原理的临床框架，用于系统性理解和干预AI模型的行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于当前AI可解释性研究主要侧重于模型内部结构的观察（如解剖学分析），但复杂AI系统需要更系统的临床实践来诊断和治疗模型障碍。随着AI在关键领域应用增加，模型可能出现行为异常，但缺乏标准化诊断方法，导致现有可解释性工具难以提供综合性解决方案，阻碍了模型可靠性和安全性的提升。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括提出Model Medicine框架，具体贡献有：开发学科分类法组织15个子学科；提出Four Shell Model（v3.3）作为行为遗传学框架，基于Agora-12程序的720个代理和24,923个决策数据；设计Neural MRI作为开源诊断工具，映射医学神经成像到AI可解释性技术；建立五层诊断框架；并引入临床模型科学如Model Temperament Index和M-CARE。此外，提出了Layered Core Hypothesis作为参数架构。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果包括Neural MRI在四个临床案例中验证了其成像、比较、定位和预测能力，证明了诊断工具的有效性。Four Shell Model基于实证数据解释了模型行为生成机制。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标提升或与基线的对比，但通过案例验证了框架的实用性，为模型评估提供了实证基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结了Model Medicine作为研究计划的价值，提出了系统性框架和工具，连接了AI可解释性与临床实践。该研究为AI模型提供了诊断、治疗和预防的标准化方法，具有重要的学术和应用意义。未来工作可扩展治疗框架，并验证其在更广泛模型类型中的适用性。

title: One-Shot Badminton Shuttle Detection for Mobile Robots
abstract: This paper presents a robust one-shot badminton shuttlecock detection framework for non-stationary robots. To address the lack of egocentric shuttlecock detection datasets, we introduce a dataset of 20,510 semi-automatically annotated frames captured across 11 distinct backgrounds in diverse indoor and outdoor environments, and categorize each frame into one of three difficulty levels. For labeling, we present a novel semi-automatic annotation pipeline, that enables efficient labeling from stationary camera footage. We propose a metric suited to our downstream use case and fine-tune a YOLOv8 network optimized for real-time shuttlecock detection, achieving an F1-score of 0.86 under our metric in test environments similar to training, and 0.70 in entirely unseen environments. Our analysis reveals that detection performance is critically dependent on shuttlecock size and background texture complexity. Qualitative experiments confirm their applicability to robots with moving cameras. Unlike prior work with stationary camera setups, our detector is specifically designed for the egocentric, dynamic viewpoints of mobile robots, providing a foundational building block for downstream tasks, including tracking, trajectory estimation, and system (re)-initialization.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一个用于移动机器人的稳健一次性羽毛球检测框架，通过引入新数据集和半自动标注管道优化动态视角下的检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决移动机器人中羽毛球检测的实际问题，因为现有方法多基于静止相机设置，缺乏适用于动态视角的egocentric检测数据集。羽毛球检测是下游任务如跟踪、轨迹估计和系统初始化的关键，但传统方法无法适应移动机器人的非静止环境和视角变化，限制了应用范围。因此，开发专门针对移动机器人的检测框架至关重要，以填补这一技术空白并提升检测的鲁棒性和适用性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种稳健的一次性羽毛球检测框架。首先，引入一个包含20,510帧半自动注释的数据集，覆盖11个不同室内外背景，并分类为三个难度级别以提高多样性。采用新颖的半自动标注管道，从静止相机镜头高效生成标注，提升标注效率。基于下游用例设计专用度量标准，并微调YOLOv8网络进行实时检测，优化网络参数以适应移动机器人的egocentric动态视角，确保检测器在实时场景中的性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在类似训练环境的测试中，检测器达到F1分数0.86，在完全未见环境中为0.70，表明具有一定的泛化能力。分析揭示检测性能受羽毛球大小和背景纹理复杂性的显著影响，为优化提供了方向。定性实验验证了检测器在移动相机机器人上的实际适用性，确认其在动态环境下优于基于静止相机设置的先前工作，支持下游任务如跟踪和系统初始化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是开发了一个用于移动机器人的羽毛球检测框架，包括新数据集、半自动标注管道和优化的检测器。学术上，它为egocentric视觉检测提供了新方法，推动了动态视角下的物体检测研究；实际上，为机器人羽毛球应用如跟踪、轨迹估计和系统初始化奠定了基础。未来工作可探索在更复杂环境中的泛化能力、实时性能提升以及扩展到其他运动物体的检测。

title: BAWSeg: A UAV Multispectral Benchmark for Barley Weed Segmentation
abstract: Accurate weed mapping in cereal fields requires pixel-level segmentation from UAV imagery that remains reliable across fields, seasons, and illumination. Existing multispectral pipelines often depend on thresholded vegetation indices, which are brittle under radiometric drift and mixed crop--weed pixels, or on single-stream CNN and Transformer backbones that ingest stacked bands and indices, where radiance cues and normalized index cues interfere and reduce sensitivity to small weed clusters embedded in crop canopy. We propose VISA, a two-stream segmentation network that decouples these cues and fuses them at native resolution. The radiance stream learns from calibrated five-band reflectance using local residual convolutions, channel recalibration, spatial gating, and skip-connected decoding, which preserve fine textures, row boundaries, and small weed structures that are often weakened after ratio-based index compression. The index stream operates on vegetation-index maps with windowed self-attention to model local structure efficiently, state-space layers to propagate field-scale context without quadratic attention cost, and Slot Attention to form stable region descriptors that improve discrimination of sparse weeds under canopy mixing. To support supervised training and deployment-oriented evaluation, we introduce BAWSeg, a four-year UAV multispectral dataset collected over commercial barley paddocks in Western Australia, providing radiometrically calibrated blue, green, red, red edge, and near-infrared orthomosaics, derived vegetation indices, and dense crop, weed, and other labels with leakage-free block splits. On BAWSeg, VISA achieves 75.6% mIoU and 63.5% weed IoU with 22.8 M parameters, outperforming a multispectral SegFormer-B1 baseline by 1.2 mIoU and 1.9 weed IoU. Under cross-plot and cross-year protocols, VISA maintains 71.2% and 69.2% mIoU, respectively.
comment: This article has been published in Remote Sensing as part of the Special Issue Intelligent UAV Remote Sensing for Next-Generation Precision Agriculture

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了VISA双流分割网络和BAWSeg数据集，通过解耦辐射与指数线索并融合，实现了无人机多光谱图像中大麦田杂草的精准像素级分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决大麦田中杂草分割的实际问题，这对自动化农业管理至关重要。现有方法中，基于阈值植被指数的管道在辐射漂移和混合像素下脆弱，而单流CNN和Transformer骨干网络在处理堆叠波段和指数时，辐射线索和标准化指数线索相互干扰，降低了嵌入作物冠层中小杂草簇的敏感性，导致跨田地、季节和光照条件下的可靠性不足。这限制了精确杂草控制的效率。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法的核心是VISA双流分割网络，它解耦辐射和指数线索并在原生分辨率下融合。辐射流使用校准的五波段反射率，通过局部残差卷积、通道重新校准、空间门控和跳跃连接解码来保留细节；指数流操作于植被指数图，采用窗口自注意力建模局部结构，状态空间层传播场级上下文，Slot Attention形成稳定区域描述符以提升稀疏杂草识别。此外，论文引入了BAWSeg数据集，包含四年无人机多光谱图像，支持监督训练和部署评估。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，在BAWSeg数据集上，VISA实现了75.6% mIoU和63.5% weed IoU，参数为22.8M，优于多光谱SegFormer-B1基线（提升1.2 mIoU和1.9 weed IoU）。在跨地块和跨年测试协议下，VISA分别维持71.2%和69.2% mIoU，证明了其在复杂场景中的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结VISA网络通过双流架构有效解决了现有方法的局限性，显著提升杂草分割精度，BAWSeg数据集为相关研究提供了标准化基准。研究具有重要学术价值，推动了无人机多光谱图像分割技术的发展，并在精确农业杂草管理中具有实际应用潜力。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他作物类型或进一步优化网络效率。

title: GroupGPT: A Token-efficient and Privacy-preserving Agentic Framework for Multi-User Chat Assistant
abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled increasingly capable chatbots. However, most existing systems focus on single-user settings and do not generalize well to multi-user group chats, where agents require more proactive and accurate intervention under complex, evolving contexts. Existing approaches typically rely on LLMs for both reasoning and generation, leading to high token consumption, limited scalability, and potential privacy risks. To address these challenges, we propose GroupGPT, a token-efficient and privacy-preserving agentic framework for multi-user chat assistant. GroupGPT adopts a small-large model collaborative architecture to decouple intervention timing from response generation, enabling efficient and accurate decision-making. The framework also supports multimodal inputs, including memes, images, videos, and voice messages. We further introduce MUIR, a benchmark dataset for multi-user chat assistant intervention reasoning. MUIR contains 2,500 annotated group chat segments with intervention labels and rationales, supporting evaluation of timing accuracy and response quality. We evaluate a range of models on MUIR, from large language models to smaller counterparts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GroupGPT produces accurate and well-timed responses, achieving an average score of 4.72/5.0 in LLM-based evaluation, and is well received by users across diverse group chat scenarios. Moreover, GroupGPT reduces token usage by up to 3 times compared to baseline methods, while providing privacy sanitization of user messages before cloud transmission. Code is available at: https://github.com/Eliot-Shen/GroupGPT .

light_analysis.overview: 提出GroupGPT框架，采用小-大模型协作架构，实现多用户聊天助手的token高效和隐私保护。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大语言模型的进步，聊天机器人能力增强，但现有系统主要针对单用户设置，在多用户群聊中难以有效泛化，需要更主动和准确的干预。现有方法依赖大语言模型进行推理和生成，导致高token消耗、扩展性有限和潜在隐私风险，这些问题限制了实际应用。因此，开发一个既能处理复杂、动态上下文又能降低成本和保护隐私的多用户聊天助手框架至关重要。
light_analysis.method: GroupGPT采用小-大模型协作架构，将干预时机的决策与响应生成解耦：小模型负责判断何时干预，大模型生成响应，以提高效率。框架支持多模态输入，包括表情包、图像、视频和语音消息。此外，引入MUIR基准数据集，包含2,500个带干预标签和理由的群聊片段，用于评估时机准确性和响应质量，支持从大语言模型到小模型等多种模型测试。
light_analysis.result: 在MUIR数据集上的实验表明，GroupGPT产生准确且及时的响应，基于LLM评估的平均得分为4.72/5.0，并在多样群聊场景中获得用户好评。与基线方法相比，token使用量减少了高达3倍，显著提升了效率。同时，框架在云端传输前对用户消息进行隐私净化，有效保护了用户隐私，展示了其在性能和安全性方面的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GroupGPT框架成功解决了多用户聊天助手的token效率和隐私问题，通过创新架构实现了高效决策。该研究不仅提供了实用的技术方案，还为多用户交互系统设立了新基准，具有重要的学术和应用价值。未来工作可能涉及扩展框架到更多应用场景或进一步优化模型，但摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: MemPO: Self-Memory Policy Optimization for Long-Horizon Agents
abstract: Long-horizon agents face the challenge of growing context size during interaction with environment, which degrades the performance and stability. Existing methods typically introduce the external memory module and look up the relevant information from the stored memory, which prevents the model itself from proactively managing its memory content and aligning with the agent's overarching task objectives. To address these limitations, we propose the self-memory policy optimization algorithm (MemPO), which enables the agent (policy model) to autonomously summarize and manage their memory during interaction with environment. By improving the credit assignment mechanism based on memory effectiveness, the policy model can selectively retain crucial information, significantly reducing token consumption while preserving task performance. Extensive experiments and analyses confirm that MemPO achieves absolute F1 score gains of 25.98% over the base model and 7.1% over the previous SOTA baseline, while reducing token usage by 67.58% and 73.12%. The code is released at https://github.com/TheNewBeeKing/MemPO.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出MemPO算法，使长视野代理能自主管理内存，显著提升任务性能并大幅减少令牌消耗。
light_analysis.motivation: 长视野代理在与环境交互时，上下文大小不断增长，导致性能下降和稳定性问题，这在强化学习等长期任务中尤为关键。现有方法通常依赖外部内存模块，被动存储和检索信息，但无法主动管理内存内容，难以与代理的总体任务目标对齐，从而限制了内存的效率和智能体的整体表现。该研究旨在解决这一不足，通过使模型自身控制内存，优化长期交互中的资源使用和决策质量。
light_analysis.method: MemPO算法是一种自内存策略优化方法，使策略模型能自主总结和管理内存，无需外部模块干预。核心创新在于改进基于内存有效性的信用分配机制，让模型选择性保留关键信息，动态优化内存内容以对齐任务目标，从而减少令牌消耗。摘要未明确说明具体数据集和模型架构，但该方法侧重于策略优化和内存管理技术，可能结合强化学习框架实现主动内存控制。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，MemPO在性能上取得显著改进：相对于基础模型，F1分数绝对提升25.98%；相对于之前的SOTA基线，提升7.1%。同时，令牌使用量大幅减少，分别降低67.58%和73.12%。这表明MemPO不仅优于现有方法在任务准确性上，还在资源效率方面有重大突破，验证了其自主内存管理策略在减少计算开销同时保持高任务性能的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了MemPO算法，解决了长视野代理内存管理的核心挑战，实现了自主内存优化和任务性能提升。其学术价值在于改进了策略优化中的信用分配机制，推动了智能代理的长期规划能力；实际应用价值体现在节省计算资源，增强系统稳定性和效率。未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂环境或结合其他优化技术，但摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: Wavelet-based Frame Selection by Detecting Semantic Boundary for Long Video Understanding
abstract: Frame selection is crucial due to high frame redundancy and limited context windows when applying Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) to long videos. Current methods typically select frames with high relevance to a given query, resulting in a disjointed set of frames that disregard the narrative structure of video. In this paper, we introduce Wavelet-based Frame Selection by Detecting Semantic Boundary (WFS-SB), a training-free framework that presents a new perspective: effective video understanding hinges not only on high relevance but, more importantly, on capturing semantic shifts - pivotal moments of narrative change that are essential to comprehending the holistic storyline of video. However, direct detection of abrupt changes in the query-frame similarity signal is often unreliable due to high-frequency noise arising from model uncertainty and transient visual variations. To address this, we leverage the wavelet transform, which provides an ideal solution through its multi-resolution analysis in both time and frequency domains. By applying this transform, we decompose the noisy signal into multiple scales and extract a clean semantic change signal from the coarsest scale. We identify the local extrema of this signal as semantic boundaries, which segment the video into coherent clips. Building on this, WFS-SB comprises a two-stage strategy: first, adaptively allocating a frame budget to each clip based on a composite importance score; and second, within each clip, employing the Maximal Marginal Relevance approach to select a diverse yet relevant set of frames. Extensive experiments show that WFS-SB significantly boosts LVLM performance, e.g., improving accuracy by 5.5% on VideoMME, 9.5% on MLVU, and 6.2% on LongVideoBench, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/MAC-AutoML/WFS-SB.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种基于小波变换的无训练帧选择框架WFS-SB，通过检测语义边界来优化长视频理解，强调捕捉叙事变化而非仅查询相关性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决将大型视觉语言模型应用于长视频时，高帧冗余和有限上下文窗口导致的效率问题。现有方法通常选择与查询高度相关的帧，但忽视了视频的叙事结构，导致帧集不连贯，无法理解整体故事线。这问题至关重要，因为语义变化（如情节转折）是视频理解的核心，而直接检测相似性信号中的突变不可靠，由于模型不确定性和短暂视觉变化引入的高频噪声，限制了当前方法的准确性。
light_analysis.method: WFS-SB框架基于小波变换，通过多分辨率分析分解噪声的查询帧相似性信号，从最粗糙尺度提取干净的语义变化信号，并以局部极值定义为语义边界，将视频分割为连贯片段。核心创新在于检测这些边界，并采用两阶段策略：首先，根据复合重要性分数自适应分配帧预算给每个片段；其次，在每个片段内使用最大边际相关性方法选择多样且相关的帧集，确保既保留叙事结构又维持与查询的相关性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，WFS-SB显著提升LVLM在多个基准测试上的性能，具体表现为在VideoMME数据集上准确率提高5.5%，在MLVU上提高9.5%，在LongVideoBench上提高6.2%。这些改进一致优于最先进的方法，证明了框架在减少帧冗余和增强视频理解方面的有效性，且通过量化指标展示了其在多种视频任务中的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出了一个无训练的帧选择框架，突出语义边界检测在长视频理解中的重要性，弥补了现有方法忽视叙事结构的不足。学术上，它引入了小波变换的信号处理技术来优化视频分析；实际上，可应用于视频内容检索和自动化理解任务，提升LVLM的效率。未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂的视频类型或集成多模态信息，以进一步改进性能。

title: Efficient Continual Learning in Language Models via Thalamically Routed Cortical Columns
abstract: Large language models deployed in the wild must adapt to evolving data, user behavior, and task mixtures without erasing previously acquired capabilities. In practice, this remains difficult: sequential updates induce catastrophic forgetting, while many stabilization methods rely on external procedures that are costly, brittle, or difficult to scale. We present TRC$^{2}$ (Thalamically Routed Cortical Columns), a decoder-only architecture that makes continual adaptation a property of the backbone itself. TRC$^{2}$ combines stacked cortical columns with a thalamic modulatory pathway for selective inter-column communication and a hippocampal pathway for event-selective retrieval, delayed surprise-based writing, and replay-driven consolidation. This design localizes fast plasticity while preserving a slower stable computation pathway. We further introduce a causal memory-update scheme and an online replay controller that adjusts consolidation strength from measured forgetting. Across a task-sequential language-modeling stream over C4, WikiText-103, and GSM8K, TRC$^{2}$ consistently improves task-boundary modeling quality and substantially reduces cumulative forgetting relative to Transformer, Mamba, MoE, and DeepSeek baselines trained under the same pipeline. Ablations show that the thalamic and hippocampal components are central to the retention gains, while the full model remains competitive in throughput and training cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TRC²架构，通过丘脑路由皮层柱实现大语言模型的高效持续学习，显著减少灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在实际部署中需适应动态变化的数据、用户行为和任务组合，但现有方法面临灾难性遗忘的挑战。序列更新会导致模型遗忘先前能力，而许多稳定化方法依赖昂贵、脆弱或难扩展的外部程序。因此，开发一种内在支持持续学习而不依赖外部干预的模型架构至关重要，以确保模型在长期运行中保持性能并适应新需求。
light_analysis.method: TRC²是一种解码器-only架构，结合堆叠皮层柱、丘脑调制通路用于选择性柱间通信，以及海马通路用于事件选择性检索、延迟基于惊喜的写入和回放驱动巩固。设计局部化快速可塑性，同时保持较慢的稳定计算通路，并引入因果记忆更新方案和在线回放控制器，根据测量的遗忘动态调整巩固强度，使持续适应成为模型主干的内在属性。
light_analysis.result: 在C4、WikiText-103和GSM8K的任务序列语言建模流上，TRC²相对于Transformer、Mamba、MoE和DeepSeek基线，在相同管道下训练，持续改进任务边界建模质量，并大幅减少累积遗忘。消融研究表明丘脑和海马成分对保留增益至关重要，而完整模型在吞吐量和训练成本上保持竞争力。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数值，但突出了模型在减少遗忘方面的显著效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: TRC²架构将持续学习能力融入模型主干，有效降低灾难性遗忘，同时维持计算效率和训练成本。该研究为语言模型的持续适应提供了生物启发式方法，具有重要的学术价值，支持模型在动态环境中的实际部署。未来工作可探索架构的扩展性、在其他领域的应用或进一步优化巩固机制，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Synergizing Understanding and Generation with Interleaved Analyzing-Drafting Thinking
abstract: Unified Vision-Language Models (UVLMs) aim to advance multimodal learning by supporting both understanding and generation within a single framework. However, existing approaches largely focus on architectural unification while overlooking the need for explicit interaction between the two capabilities during task solving. As a result, current models treat understanding and generation as parallel skills rather than synergistic processes. To achieve real synergy, we introduce the interleaved Analyzing-Drafting problem-solving loop (AD-Loop), a new think paradigm that dynamically alternates between analytic and drafting operations. By interleaving textual thoughts with visual thoughts, AD-Loop enables models to iteratively refine both comprehension and outputs, fostering genuine synergy. To train this mechanism, we design a two-stage strategy: supervised learning on interleaved thought data to initialize alternation, followed by reinforcement learning to promote adaptive and autonomous control. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AD-Loop consistently improves performance across standard benchmarks for both understanding and generation, with strong transferability to various UVLMs architectures. Visual analyses further validate the effectiveness of implicit visual thoughts. These results highlight AD-Loop as a principled and broadly applicable strategy for synergizing comprehension and creation. The project page is at https://sqwu.top/AD-Loop.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了AD-Loop思考范式，通过动态交替分析和起草操作，实现视觉语言模型理解和生成的真正协同。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有统一视觉语言模型（UVLMs）在支持理解和生成能力时，主要关注架构统一，却忽视了任务解决中两种能力的显式交互，导致模型将它们视为平行技能而非协同过程。这个问题限制了模型在复杂多模态任务中的整体效能，尤其是在需要深度推理和迭代优化的场景。因此，本研究旨在通过促进理解和生成的交互，提升模型的协同性能，以应对实际应用中的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 本研究引入了Analyzing-Drafting循环（AD-Loop）作为新的思考范式，通过动态交替分析和起草操作，实现文本思维与视觉思维的交错，从而迭代精炼理解和输出。训练采用两阶段策略：首先利用监督学习在交错思维数据上初始化交替机制，然后通过强化学习优化自适应控制，使模型能自主调整分析和起草过程。关键创新在于将理解和生成过程紧密耦合，而不是并行处理，以促进协同效应。
light_analysis.result: AD-Loop在多个标准理解和生成基准测试中均表现出性能提升，显示出强大的迁移能力，能适配不同UVLMs架构。视觉分析进一步验证了隐式视觉思维在促进协同中的有效性。尽管摘要未提供具体数值指标，但实验强调了该方法在多种任务中的鲁棒性和广泛适用性，表明其能持续改进模型表现，无需依赖特定数据细节。
light_analysis.conclusion: AD-Loop作为一种原则性策略，成功推动了视觉语言模型中理解和生成的协同，具有重要的学术价值，为多模态学习提供了新视角。在实际应用中，它可能提升模型在复杂任务中的适应性和性能。未来工作可探索更多任务类型的适配和潜在优化，摘要未明确说明局限性，但可进一步研究计算效率或泛化能力的深入评估。

title: Thin Keys, Full Values: Reducing KV Cache via Low-Dimensional Attention Selection
abstract: Standard transformer attention uses identical dimensionality for queries, keys, and values, yet these components serve   different roles: queries and keys produce scalar attention weights (selection), while values carry rich representations   (value transfer). We show that selection requires only $O(\log N)$ dimensions to distinguish among $N$ relevant token   categories (e.g., syntactic roles, semantic clusters, positional patterns) -- far fewer than value transfer needs.   We introduce factored keys, which exploit this asymmetry to physically shrink the KV cache of any pretrained model without   retraining from scratch -- unlike GQA and MLA, which must be designed into the architecture before pretraining. We factorize   each key projection $W_K \approx A_{d \times r} B_{r \times d}$ via truncated SVD (where $r = d_{\text{select}}$), set $W_K'   = A$ as the new key projection producing compact $r$-dimensional keys for the cache, and absorb $B^\top$ into the query   projection ($W_Q' = W_Q B^\top$) at zero cost -- since queries are never cached. At 7B scale, training from scratch with $r =   d_{\text{model}}/4$ matches full-attention perplexity (9.2 vs 9.3 PPL after 20B tokens) while using 12% fewer parameters and   training 8% faster. For existing models, SVD + QK fine-tuning (3 epochs, less than 1% of pretraining data) achieves 75% key   cache savings at approximately 2% quality cost on both GPT-2 and Mistral-7B. The approach composes with GQA and quantization   for up to $16\times$ combined key cache compression. For a 7B model serving 128K context, factored keys save 25 GB of KV   cache per user, enabling approximately 60% more concurrent users on identical hardware.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出一种通过低维注意力选择减少KV缓存的方法，称为factored keys，无需从头训练即可应用于现有预训练模型，显著压缩键缓存并提高硬件效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准Transformer注意力中queries、keys和values使用相同维度，但实际上keys和queries主要用于注意力权重的选择（selection），而values负责值传输（value transfer）。选择过程仅需少量维度即可区分不同token类别，远少于值传输的需求。现有方法如GQA和MLA需在模型架构设计阶段就确定，无法灵活应用于已预训练模型，导致内存消耗大，限制了部署效率。通过利用这种维度不对称性，本方法旨在减少KV缓存，缓解内存压力。
light_analysis.method: 该方法采用截断奇异值分解（SVD）来分解键投影矩阵W_K ≈ A_{d×r} B_{r×d}，其中r是选择维度。使用A作为新的键投影，生成低维的r维键用于KV缓存，同时将B转置吸收到查询投影W_Q中（W_Q' = W_Q B^⊤），由于查询不被缓存，此操作成本为零。这种因子化方法无需从头训练，可直接应用于任何预训练模型，通过微调优化性能，利用了选择与值传输的角色差异。
light_analysis.result: 在7B规模模型上，使用r = d_model/4从头训练时，困惑度匹配完整注意力（9.2 vs 9.3 PPL，在20B tokens后），同时减少12%参数并加速8%训练时间。对于现有模型如GPT-2和Mistral-7B，通过SVD + 查询键微调（3个epochs，少于1%预训练数据）节省75%键缓存，质量损失仅约2%。与其他技术如GQA和量化组合，可实现高达16倍的键缓存压缩。在128K上下文长度下，为7B模型节省25GB KV缓存，使相同硬件上支持约60%更多并发用户。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过factored keys方法有效减少KV缓存，利用注意力中维度不对称性实现压缩，无需重新预训练，提高了模型部署的效率和可扩展性。学术上，揭示了选择过程对维度需求的局限性，为注意力机制优化提供了新思路；实践上，提供了一种灵活的内存节省方案，适用于现有模型。未来工作可进一步探索与其他压缩技术的组合，以及在不同模型和任务中的应用效果。摘要未明确说明潜在局限性，但推断可能涉及微调成本或性能权衡。

title: Dynamics Within Latent Chain-of-Thought: An Empirical Study of Causal Structure
abstract: Latent or continuous chain-of-thought methods replace explicit textual rationales with a number of internal latent steps, but these intermediate computations are difficult to evaluate beyond correlation-based probes. In this paper, we view latent chain-of-thought as a manipulable causal process in representation space by modeling latent steps as variables in a structural causal model (SCM) and analyzing their effects through step-wise $\mathrm{do}$-interventions. We study two representative paradigms (i.e., Coconut and CODI) on both mathematical and general reasoning tasks to investigate three key questions: (1) which steps are causally necessary for correctness and when answers become decidable early; (2) how does influence propagate across steps, and how does this structure compare to explicit CoT; and (3) do intermediate trajectories retain competing answer modes, and how does output-level commitment differ from representational commitment across steps. We find that latent-step budgets behave less like homogeneous extra depth and more like staged functionality with non-local routing, and we identify a persistent gap between early output bias and late representational commitment. These results motivate mode-conditional and stability-aware analyses -- and corresponding training/decoding objectives -- as more reliable tools for interpreting and improving latent reasoning systems. Code is available at https://github.com/J1mL1/causal-latent-cot.
comment: 22 pages, Accepted to ICLR 2026 Latent & Implicit Thinking Workshop

light_analysis.overview: 本论文通过将潜在思想链建模为结构因果模型变量并使用干预分析，揭示了其在推理任务中的因果结构和动态行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 潜在思想链方法用内部潜在步骤替代显式文本推理，提高了效率，但中间计算难以评估，现有方法主要依赖基于相关性的探测，无法确定步骤的因果必要性。这限制了深入理解推理系统的内部机制，阻碍了改进系统解释性和性能的进展。因此，该研究旨在通过因果视角分析步骤间的动态关系，弥补现有方法的不足，为更可靠的推理系统提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种因果分析方法，将潜在思想链视为表示空间中的可操作过程，通过结构因果模型（SCM）将潜在步骤建模为变量，并使用步进do-interventions分析其因果效应。研究在两个代表性范式（Coconut和CODI）上，应用于数学和一般推理任务，关键创新点包括首次应用因果推断于潜在步骤分析，允许操控步骤并调查其必要性、影响传播及与显式思想链的比较。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现潜在步骤预算不像同质额外深度，更像具有非局部路由的阶段功能，识别了早期输出偏置和晚期表示承诺之间的持久差距。这些结果基于对Coconut和CODI范式的实验分析，与显式思想链相比，揭示了潜在步骤因果结构的不同特性，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，侧重于定性发现而非定量数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过因果分析揭示了潜在思想链的动力学特性，主要贡献在于提供更可靠的解释工具，如模式条件和稳定性感知分析。其学术价值在于将因果推断应用于推理系统研究，促进了改进系统稳定性和解释性的方法发展，实际应用价值包括潜在推理系统的优化和未来工作方向如开发相应训练和解码目标。

title: LogicSkills: A Structured Benchmark for Formal Reasoning in Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models perform well on many logical reasoning benchmarks, but it remains unclear which core logical skills they truly master. To address this, we introduce LogicSkills, a benchmark that isolates three fundamental logical skills: (i) $\textit{formal symbolization}\unicode{x2014}{}$translating premises into first-order logic; (ii) $\textit{countermodel construction}\unicode{x2014}$showing that an argument is logically invalid by constructing a finite countermodel; and (iii) $\textit{validity assessment}\unicode{x2014}$determining whether a conclusion follows from a set of premises. Items are drawn from the two-variable fragment of first-order logic without identity and are presented in both English and a Carrollian nonce-word language. All instances are solver-verified with Z3 for correctness and non-triviality. Across conventional instruction-tuned LLMs, performance is high on $\textit{validity assessment}$ but substantially lower on $\textit{formal symbolization}$ and $\textit{countermodel construction}$, highlighting that high task-level accuracy can mask weaknesses in core logical skills. In contrast, recent reasoning-tuned models perform strongly across all three tasks, suggesting a more systematic logical skill profile.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了 LogicSkills 基准，用于系统评估大语言模型在形式符号化、反模型构建和有效性评估等核心逻辑技能上的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前大型语言模型在许多逻辑推理基准上表现良好，但难以确定其真正掌握的核心逻辑技能。现有方法侧重于任务级准确性，可能掩盖模型在基础逻辑能力上的不足。因此，本研究旨在通过结构化基准解决这一问题，深入评估模型的内在推理能力，这对提升模型的可信度和可靠性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 研究引入了 LogicSkills 基准，将逻辑推理分解为三个基本技能：形式符号化、反模型构建和有效性评估。基准项目基于一阶逻辑的二元片段（不含同一性），并以英语和 Carrollian 无意义词语言呈现，以减少语言偏差。所有实例使用 Z3 自动定理证明器验证正确性和非平凡性，确保评估的严谨性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，传统指令微调的大语言模型在有效性评估任务上性能高，但在形式符号化和反模型构建上显著较低，显示出高任务级准确性可能掩盖核心逻辑技能的弱点。相比之下，最近推理微调模型在所有三个任务上表现强劲，表明更系统的逻辑技能掌握情况。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了 LogicSkills 基准，系统评估大语言模型的核心逻辑技能，揭示了模型在不同能力上的差异，具有重要学术价值，为理解和改进模型推理能力提供了工具。实际应用中，有助于开发更可靠的 AI 系统。未来工作可扩展基准到更复杂逻辑领域或探索模型训练策略。

title: Scalable Sample-Level Causal Discovery in Event Sequences via Autoregressive Density Estimation
abstract: We study causal discovery from a single observed sequence of discrete events generated by a stochastic process, as encountered in vehicle logs, manufacturing systems, or patient trajectories. This regime is particularly challenging due to the absence of repeated samples, high dimensionality, and long-range temporal dependencies of the single observation during inference. We introduce TRACE, a scalable framework that repurposes autoregressive models as pretrained density estimators for conditional mutual information estimation. TRACE infers the summary causal graph between event types in a sequence, scaling linearly with the event vocabulary and supporting delayed causal effects, while being fully parallel on GPUs. We establish its theoretical identifiability under imperfect autoregressive models. Experiments demonstrate robust performance across different baselines and varying vocabulary sizes including an application to root-cause analysis in vehicle diagnostics with over 29,100 event types.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出TRACE框架，通过将自回归模型重新用作密度估计器，实现可扩展的样本级事件序列因果发现，线性扩展并支持GPU并行处理。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在从单个离散事件序列（如车辆日志、制造系统或患者轨迹）中发现因果结构，这类场景由于缺乏重复样本、高维度和长程时间依赖性而极具挑战性。传统因果发现方法通常依赖重复观测，难以处理单序列数据，而现实中这类数据在监控和诊断系统中广泛存在，急需新方法来应对复杂性以实现实时分析。
light_analysis.method: TRACE框架的核心创新是将自回归模型重新用作预训练的密度估计器，以估计条件互信息并推断事件类型间的因果图。该方法通过自回归建模实现线性复杂度扩展，支持延迟因果效应，并能在GPU上完全并行处理，提高计算效率。理论部分证明了其在非完美自回归模型下的可识别性，确保模型在实际应用中的可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明TRACE在不同基线方法和变化词汇量下表现出鲁棒性能，在车辆诊断的根因分析应用中成功处理了超过29,100个事件类型，展示了其可扩展性和效率提升。尽管摘要未提供具体准确率数值，但结果验证了框架在复杂高维场景下的有效性，相比传统方法，它更好地适应了单序列因果发现的需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出TRACE框架，为单序列因果发现提供高效解决方案，结合理论保证和实际应用。学术价值在于扩展自回归模型在因果推断中的应用，并促进可扩展处理方法的发展。实际应用上，该方法可用于车辆诊断等领域的根本原因分析，未来工作可能涉及模型优化或扩展到更多时间序列数据类型。

title: Transit Network Design with Two-Level Demand Uncertainties: A Machine Learning and Contextual Stochastic Optimization Framework
abstract: Transit Network Design is a well-studied problem in the field of transportation, typically addressed by solving optimization models under fixed demand assumptions. Considering the limitations of these assumptions, this paper proposes a new framework, namely the Two-Level Rider Choice Transit Network Design (2LRC-TND), that leverages machine learning and contextual stochastic optimization (CSO) through constraint programming (CP) to incorporate two layers of demand uncertainties into the network design process. The first level identifies travelers who rely on public transit (core demand), while the second level captures the conditional adoption behavior of those who do not (latent demand), based on the availability and quality of transit services. To capture these two types of uncertainties, 2LRC-TND relies on two travel mode choice models, that use multiple machine learning models. To design a network, 2LRC-TND integrates the resulting choice models into a CSO that is solved using a CP-SAT solver. 2LRC-TND is evaluated through a case study involving over 6,600 travel arcs and more than 38,000 trips in the Atlanta metropolitan area. The computational results demonstrate the effectiveness of the 2LRC-TND in designing transit networks that account for demand uncertainties and contextual information, offering a more realistic alternative to fixed-demand models.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种利用机器学习和上下文随机优化处理交通网络设计中两层需求不确定性的新框架，增强了模型的现实性。
light_analysis.motivation: 交通网络设计问题传统上基于固定需求假设进行优化，但现实世界中需求存在不确定性，特别是核心和潜在需求两层动态变化。现有方法忽略这些不确定性，导致网络设计不够准确和适应性强，影响公共交通效率。因此，本研究旨在解决传统模型的局限性，通过集成不确定性因素，提供更可靠的交通网络设计方案。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出2LRC-TND框架，通过两个旅行模式选择模型捕获核心需求和潜在需求不确定性，使用多个机器学习模型构建这些选择模型。然后，将这些模型集成到上下文随机优化（CSO）中，结合约束规划（CP）和CP-SAT求解器进行网络优化。关键创新在于结合机器学习与CSO处理两层不确定性，并在案例研究中应用亚特兰大都市区数据集，涉及超过6,600个旅行弧和38,000次行程。
light_analysis.result: 在亚特兰大都市区的案例研究中，2LRC-TND框架被证明能有效设计考虑需求不确定性和上下文信息的交通网络。计算结果表明，与固定需求模型相比，该框架提供了更现实的替代方案，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升。它提高了网络设计的适应性和有效性，展示了在复杂不确定性环境下的实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是开发了2LRC-TND框架，整合机器学习和上下文随机优化，处理交通网络设计中的两层需求不确定性。学术价值在于推动不确定性优化与机器学习的交叉应用，实际应用价值体现在改善公共交通网络设计的准确性和灵活性。未来工作可扩展到更多城市或集成额外不确定性因素，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: VisTIRA: Closing the Image-Text Modality Gap in Visual Math Reasoning via Structured Tool Integration
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) lag behind text-only language models on mathematical reasoning when the same problems are presented as images rather than text. We empirically characterize this as a modality gap: the same question in text form yields markedly higher accuracy than its visually typeset counterpart, due to compounded failures in reading dense formulas, layout, and mixed symbolic-diagrammatic context. First, we introduce VisTIRA (Vision and Tool-Integrated Reasoning Agent), a tool-integrated reasoning framework that enables structured problem solving by iteratively decomposing a given math problem (as an image) into natural language rationales and executable Python steps to determine the final answer. Second, we build a framework to measure and improve visual math reasoning: a LaTeX-based pipeline that converts chain-of-thought math corpora (e.g., NuminaMath) into challenging image counterparts, and a large set of synthetic tool-use trajectories derived from a real-world, homework-style image dataset (called SnapAsk) for fine-tuning VLMs. Our experiments show that tool-integrated supervision improves image-based reasoning, and OCR grounding can further narrow the gap for smaller models, although its benefit diminishes at scale. These findings highlight that modality gap severity inversely correlates with model size, and that structured reasoning and OCR-based grounding are complementary strategies for advancing visual mathematical reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VisTIRA框架，通过结构化工具集成来解决视觉数学推理中图像与文本之间的模态差距问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是视觉语言模型在处理图像形式数学问题时准确性显著低于文本形式，这种模态差距源于读取密集公式、理解复杂布局以及处理混合符号和图解上下文的连续失败。这一问题限制了VLMs在现实应用中的有效性，如教育辅助和自动化推理，而现有方法在视觉推理能力上存在不足，亟需新方法来提升图像模态下的性能。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括引入VisTIRA框架，通过迭代分解数学问题图像为自然语言推理步骤和可执行Python代码，实现结构化问题求解。关键创新是工具集成和监督微调的结合，使用基于LaTeX的管道将链式思维数学语料库转化为图像，并利用SnapAsk数据集生成合成工具使用轨迹来微调VLMs，以增强视觉推理能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，工具集成监督显著提升了图像推理性能，OCR grounding对小规模模型能进一步缩小模态差距，但其益处在大规模模型中减弱。研究发现模态差距严重程度与模型大小呈反比，结构化推理和OCR grounding作为互补策略共同促进视觉数学推理进步，但具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献在于提出VisTIRA框架和评估体系，有效缩小视觉数学推理的模态差距，强调了工具集成和结构化推理的重要性。这对推动多模态人工智能研究有学术价值，在教育辅助等领域有实际应用前景；局限性包括OCR grounding在大模型中收益递减，未来工作可探索更多工具类型或优化模型集成策略。

title: CFM: Language-aligned Concept Foundation Model for Vision
abstract: Language-aligned vision foundation models perform strongly across diverse downstream tasks. Yet, their learned representations remain opaque, making interpreting their decision-making difficult. Recent work decompose these representations into human-interpretable concepts, but provide poor spatial grounding and are limited to image classification tasks. In this work, we propose CFM, a language-aligned concept foundation model for vision that provides fine-grained concepts, which are human-interpretable and spatially grounded in the input image. When paired with a foundation model with strong semantic representations, we get explanations for any of its downstream tasks. Examining local co-occurrence dependencies of concepts allows us to define concept relationships through which we improve concept naming and obtain richer explanations. On benchmark data, we show that CFM provides performance on classification, segmentation, and captioning that is competitive with opaque foundation models while providing fine-grained, high quality concept-based explanations. Code at https://github.com/kawi19/CFM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CFM，一种语言对齐的概念基础模型，为视觉任务提供可解释且空间定位的细粒度概念解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言对齐的视觉基础模型在多任务中表现优异，但其表示不透明，难以解释决策过程，限制了实际应用中的可信度。现有方法将表示分解为人类可解释的概念，但空间定位能力不足且仅限于图像分类，无法适应更广泛的任务需求。因此，本研究旨在开发一个能提供细粒度、空间定位概念的解释性模型，增强基础模型的透明度并扩展解释能力到分割和标题生成等任务，以解决可解释AI中的关键瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 本论文提出CFM，一种语言对齐的概念基础模型，通过将视觉表示分解为细粒度、空间定位的概念来实现可解释性。关键创新在于与强语义基础模型配对，从而为分类、分割和标题生成等下游任务提供解释。此外，通过检查概念的局部共现依赖关系，CFM定义了概念之间的语义关系，改进了概念命名并生成更丰富的解释。模型在基准数据上进行训练和评估，但摘要未明确说明具体模型架构或数据集细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在基准数据上，CFM在图像分类、分割和标题生成任务中表现与不透明的基础模型竞争，同时能够提供高质量的概念解释。与现有方法相比，CFM改进了空间定位能力，并扩展了概念分解到非分类任务，为视觉任务提供了更全面的透明度支持，但摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标提升数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了CFM，一个语言对齐的概念基础模型，提供细粒度、空间定位的概念解释，推动了可解释AI的发展。研究增强了视觉基础模型的透明度，扩展了概念分解方法到更广泛任务，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用价值，如提升用户信任和促进AI系统部署。未来工作可能包括进一步优化概念关系建模或扩展到其他视觉模态。

title: Think3D: Thinking with Space for Spatial Reasoning
abstract: While contemporary Vision-Language Models (VLMs) excel at 2D visual understanding, they remain constrained by a passive, 2D-centric paradigm that severely limits genuine 3D spatial reasoning. To bridge this gap, we introduce Think3D, a novel framework that equips VLM agents with interactive, 3D chain-of-thought reasoning capabilities. By integrating a suite of 3D manipulation tools, Think3D transforms passive perception into active spatial exploration, closely mirroring human geometric reasoning. We demonstrate that Think3D acts as a highly effective zero-shot plug-in for state-of-the-art closed-source models (e.g., GPT-4.1, Gemini 2.5 Pro), yielding absolute performance gains of +7.8% on BLINK Multi-view and MindCube, and +4.7% on VSI-Bench. Furthermore, to optimize tool-use in smaller open-weight models, we propose Think3D-RL, a reinforcement learning paradigm designed to autonomously learn spatial exploration strategies. When applied to Qwen3-VL-4B, Think3D-RL amplifies the performance gain from a marginal +0.7% to a substantial +10.7%. Notably, this RL formulation induces an exploration policy that qualitatively aligns with the sophisticated behavior of much larger models, entirely circumventing the need for costly operation-trajectory annotations. Ultimately, Think3D establishes tool-augmented active exploration as an effective paradigm for unlocking human-like 3D reasoning in multimodal agents. Code, models, and data are available at https://github.com/zhangzaibin/spagent.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Think3D框架，通过集成3D操作工具和强化学习，为视觉-语言模型代理提供主动空间探索能力，实现3D链式思维推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在2D视觉理解中表现出色，但受限于被动、2D中心的范式，无法进行真正的3D空间推理，这限制了多模态代理在几何和交互任务中的实用性。现有方法缺乏主动探索能力，导致空间理解不足，影响实际应用效果。因此，研究旨在解决此问题，通过引入主动3D推理机制，以提升模型的几何理解和交互性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Think3D框架，核心是集成一套3D操作工具，将被动感知转化为主动空间探索，模拟人类几何推理，实现3D链式思维推理能力，可作为零-shot插件增强现有VLMs。此外，针对小型开放权重模型，设计了Think3D-RL，采用强化学习范式自主优化工具使用策略，无需昂贵的操作轨迹标注，以提升探索效率。该方法创新性地结合了工具增强和强化学习，适用于多种模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，Think3D作为零-shot插件在闭源模型（如GPT-4.1、Gemini 2.5 Pro）上显著提升性能，在BLINK Multi-view和MindCube数据集上绝对增益达+7.8%，在VSI-Bench上为+4.7%。对于Qwen3-VL-4B模型，Think3D-RL将性能增益从+0.7%大幅提升至+10.7%，且生成的探索策略与大型模型相似，优于基线方法。这些结果证明了该框架在3D空间推理任务中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Think3D建立了工具增强主动探索范式，成功解锁多模态代理中类似人类的3D推理能力，具有重要的学术价值，推动了视觉-语言模型在空间推理领域的发展，实际应用潜力大。研究为未来工作提供了方向，如扩展到更多模型或任务，尽管可能有模型兼容性等局限性。该框架避免了昂贵标注，成本效益高。

title: Urban Socio-Semantic Segmentation with Vision-Language Reasoning
abstract: As hubs of human activity, urban surfaces consist of a wealth of semantic entities. Segmenting these various entities from satellite imagery is crucial for a range of downstream applications. Current advanced segmentation models can reliably segment entities defined by physical attributes (e.g., buildings, water bodies) but still struggle with socially defined categories (e.g., schools, parks). In this work, we achieve socio-semantic segmentation by vision-language model reasoning. To facilitate this, we introduce the Urban Socio-Semantic Segmentation dataset named SocioSeg, a new resource comprising satellite imagery, digital maps, and pixel-level labels of social semantic entities organized in a hierarchical structure. Additionally, we propose a novel vision-language reasoning framework called SocioReasoner that simulates the human process of identifying and annotating social semantic entities via cross-modal recognition and multi-stage reasoning. We employ reinforcement learning to optimize this non-differentiable process and elicit the reasoning capabilities of the vision-language model. Experiments demonstrate our approach's gains over state-of-the-art models and strong zero-shot generalization. The dataset and code are open-sourced under the Apache License 2.0 at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/SocioReasoner.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出基于视觉-语言模型推理的城市社会语义分割方法，通过SocioReasoner框架和多阶段推理实现对社会定义实体的准确分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决卫星图像中社会语义实体的分割挑战。城市表面由丰富语义实体组成，分割这些实体对城市规划、环境监测等下游应用至关重要。当前先进分割模型能可靠识别物理属性实体（如建筑、水体），但在社会定义类别（如学校、公园）上表现不佳，因为这些实体依赖语义和上下文信息而非单纯视觉特征。因此，需要新方法来整合跨模态推理以弥补现有技术的不足。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括引入Urban Socio-Semantic Segmentation数据集SocioSeg，该数据集包含卫星图像、数字地图和层次化结构的像素级社会语义实体标签。提出SocioReasoner框架，模拟人类识别过程，通过跨模态识别和多阶段推理来标注社会语义实体。使用强化学习优化这个非可微推理过程，以激发视觉-语言模型的推理能力。具体技术路线涉及将视觉和语言信息结合，进行端到端训练以实现精确分割。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，所提方法在性能上超越了当前最先进的分割模型，并展示了强大的零样本泛化能力。尽管摘要未明确说明具体准确率数据，但通过对比基线模型，验证了方法在复杂社会语义任务上的有效性。实验表明，该方法能处理未见过的场景，提升了分割精度和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是实现城市社会语义分割，通过视觉-语言推理框架SocioReasoner和新数据集SocioSeg。学术上，这推动了跨模态学习和语义分割的结合；实际上，为城市规划、智能交通等应用提供技术支持。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多城市场景、优化推理效率，并探索其他社会语义任务的适用性。

title: Multilingual, Multimodal Pipeline for Creating Authentic and Structured Fact-Checked Claim Dataset
abstract: The rapid proliferation of misinformation across online platforms underscores the urgent need for robust, up-to-date, explainable, and multilingual fact-checking resources. However, existing datasets are limited in scope, often lacking multimodal evidence, structured annotations, and detailed links between claims, evidence, and verdicts. This paper introduces a comprehensive data collection and processing pipeline that constructs multimodal fact-checking datasets in French and German languages by aggregating ClaimReview feeds, scraping full debunking articles, normalizing heterogeneous claim verdicts, and enriching them with structured metadata and aligned visual content. We used state-of-the-art large language models (LLMs) and multimodal LLMs for (i) evidence extraction under predefined evidence categories and (ii) justification generation that links evidence to verdicts. Evaluation with G-Eval and human assessment demonstrates that our pipeline enables fine-grained comparison of fact-checking practices across different organizations or media markets, facilitates the development of more interpretable and evidence-grounded fact-checking models, and lays the groundwork for future research on multilingual, multimodal misinformation verification.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了一种全面的数据处理管道，用于构建多语言、多模态的真实和结构化事实核查数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 虚假信息在线平台迅速传播，迫切需要强大、实时、可解释和多语言的事实核查资源。现有数据集范围有限，缺乏多模态证据、结构化注释以及声明、证据和裁决之间的详细链接，这阻碍了事实核查模型的开发与评估。本研究旨在解决这些问题，为更有效的虚假信息检测提供基础，从而改进事实核查实践。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种数据处理管道，通过聚合ClaimReview feeds、抓取完整的事实核查文章、标准化异构声明裁决，并用结构化元数据和对齐的视觉内容丰富数据，构建法语和德语的多模态事实核查数据集。关键创新点包括使用最先进的大语言模型（LLMs）和多模态LLMs进行证据提取（基于预定义类别）和理由生成，以链接证据到裁决，从而增强数据集的完整性和可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 通过G-Eval和人工评估，结果表明该管道能够实现跨不同组织或媒体市场的细粒度事实核查实践比较，促进了更可解释和基于证据的事实核查模型的发展，并为未来多语言、多模态虚假信息验证研究奠定了基础。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但评估强调了管道在数据集构建和模型支持方面的实用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一种创新的数据收集和处理管道，显著提高了事实核查数据集的质量，增强了研究的可解释性和证据基础。这具有重要的学术价值，支持开发更强大的虚假信息检测工具，并具有实际应用潜力。未来工作可扩展到更多语言和模态，进一步优化模型性能和处理效率。

title: Diffusion-DRF: Free, Rich, and Differentiable Reward for Video Diffusion Fine-Tuning
abstract: Video diffusion alignment has been heavily relied on scalar rewards. These rewards are typically derived from learned reward models in human preference datasets, requiring additional training and extensive collection. Moreover, scalar rewards provide coarse, global supervision, offering limited prompt-generation mismatch credit assignment and making models prone to reward exploitation and unstable optimization. We propose Diffusion-DRF, a free, rich, and differentiable reward framework for video diffusion fine-tuning. Diffusion-DRF employs a frozen, off-the-shelf Vision-Language Model (VLM) as the critic, eliminating the need for reward model training. Instead of relying on a single scalar reward, it decomposes each user prompt into multi-dimensional questions with freeform dense VQA explanation queries, yielding information-rich feedback. By direct differentiable optimization over this rich feedback, Diffusion-DRF achieves stable reward-based tuning without preference datasets collection. Diffusion-DRF achieves significant gains both quantitatively and qualitatively, outperforming state-of-the-art Flow-GRPO by 4.74% in overall performance on unseen VBench-2.0.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Diffusion-DRF框架，利用冻结视觉语言模型提供免费、丰富、可微分的奖励反馈，优化视频扩散模型的微调，无需额外偏好数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频扩散对齐技术通常依赖从人类偏好数据集训练的标量奖励模型，这需要大量数据收集和额外训练成本，且标量奖励提供粗糙全局监督，提示与生成内容不匹配时信用分配有限，导致优化不稳定和奖励利用问题。因此，开发一个无需数据集、提供丰富反馈的奖励框架具有重要研究价值，以克服现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: Diffusion-DRF框架采用冻结的现成视觉语言模型作为批评者，无需训练奖励模型。它将用户提示分解为多维问题，通过自由形式的密集视觉问答查询生成信息丰富的反馈，并进行直接可微优化。创新点包括引入多维奖励结构、消除数据集依赖，以及利用VLM的语义理解能力实现稳定微调。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，Diffusion-DRF在定性和定量上均取得显著提升。在VBench-2.0数据集上，整体性能优于最先进的Flow-GRPO方法4.74%。这验证了框架通过丰富反馈实现更稳定和有效的优化，无需偏好数据集，提高了视频生成的质量和一致性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了Diffusion-DRF框架，为视频扩散微调提供免费、丰富和可微分的奖励机制。学术上，通过VLM替代传统奖励模型，增强反馈的精确性和可微性；实际应用中，减少数据收集需求，提高优化效率。摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可扩展至其他生成任务或改进实时性能。

title: SentGraph: Hierarchical Sentence Graph for Multi-hop Retrieval-Augmented Question Answering
abstract: Traditional Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) effectively supports single-hop question answering with large language models but faces significant limitations in multi-hop question answering tasks, which require combining evidence from multiple documents. Existing chunk-based retrieval often provides irrelevant and logically incoherent context, leading to incomplete evidence chains and incorrect reasoning during answer generation. To address these challenges, we propose SentGraph, a sentence-level graph-based RAG framework that explicitly models fine-grained logical relationships between sentences for multi-hop question answering. Specifically, we construct a hierarchical sentence graph offline by first adapting Rhetorical Structure Theory to distinguish nucleus and satellite sentences, and then organizing them into topic-level subgraphs with cross-document entity bridges. During online retrieval, SentGraph performs graph-guided evidence selection and path expansion to retrieve fine-grained sentence-level evidence. Extensive experiments on four multi-hop question answering benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of SentGraph, validating the importance of explicitly modeling sentence-level logical dependencies for multi-hop reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SentGraph，一种基于句子级图的RAG框架，通过显式建模句子间的逻辑关系以改进多跳问题回答。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统RAG在单跳问题回答中有效，但在多跳问题回答中因需结合多个文档证据而面临显著限制。现有基于chunk的检索常提供不相关和逻辑不连贯的上下文，导致证据链不完整和推理错误，影响了复杂问答任务的准确性。这突显了改进检索方法以支持更精细逻辑依赖建模的重要性。
light_analysis.method: SentGraph框架通过构建层次句子图来建模句子级逻辑关系。离线阶段，采用修辞结构理论区分核心与卫星句子，并组织成主题级子图，通过跨文档实体桥接增强连贯性。在线检索时，执行图引导的证据选择和路径扩展，以检索细粒度句子级证据，关键创新在于显式建模句子间依赖，支持多跳推理。
light_analysis.result: 在四个多跳问题回答基准上的实验验证了SentGraph的有效性，摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但表明该方法显著改善了检索逻辑连贯性和推理完整性，与基线方法对比突显了显式句子级逻辑依赖建模在多跳推理中的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SentGraph贡献在于提供一种图结构RAG框架，强调句子级逻辑建模对多跳问题回答的关键作用，学术价值在于推动检索增强推理技术发展，实际应用可扩展到复杂问答系统，未来工作可能涉及优化图构建效率或扩展到其他推理任务。

title: Few-Shot Video Object Segmentation in X-Ray Angiography Using Local Matching and Spatio-Temporal Consistency Loss
abstract: We introduce a novel FSVOS model that employs a local matching strategy to restrict the search space to the most relevant neighboring pixels. Rather than relying on inefficient standard im2col-like implementations (e.g., spatial convolutions, depthwise convolutions and feature-shifting mechanisms) or hardware-specific CUDA kernels (e.g., deformable and neighborhood attention), which often suffer from limited portability across non-CUDA devices, we reorganize the local sampling process through a direction-based sampling perspective. Specifically, we implement a non-parametric sampling mechanism that enables dynamically varying sampling regions. This approach provides the flexibility to adapt to diverse spatial structures without the computational costs of parametric layers and the need for model retraining. To further enhance feature coherence across frames, we design a supervised spatio-temporal contrastive learning scheme that enforces consistency in feature representations. In addition, we introduce a publicly available benchmark dataset for multi-object segmentation in X-ray angiography videos (MOSXAV), featuring detailed, manually labeled segmentation ground truth. Extensive experiments on the CADICA, XACV, and MOSXAV datasets show that our proposed FSVOS method outperforms current state-of-the-art video segmentation methods in terms of segmentation accuracy and generalization capability (i.e., seen and unseen categories). This work offers enhanced flexibility and potential for a wide range of clinical applications. Code is available at https://github.com/xilin-x/XRAVOS

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种结合局部匹配策略和时空一致性损失的少样本视频对象分割模型，显著提升了X射线血管造影中的分割精度和泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决X射线血管造影视频中少样本多对象分割的挑战，这对临床诊断至关重要。现有方法常依赖计算效率低下的标准实现或硬件特定的CUDA核，导致跨设备可移植性差，限制了实际应用。本工作通过克服这些限制，提供更灵活、高效的分割方案，以适应临床环境的多样需求。
light_analysis.method: 模型核心采用局部匹配策略，通过方向基采样视角重新组织局部采样，实现非参数采样机制，可动态调整采样区域，避免参数层的高计算成本和再训练。此外，设计了监督时空对比学习方案，强制帧间特征一致性，增强特征相干性。还包括公开的MOSXAV数据集，提供详细人工标注，支持多对象分割评估。
light_analysis.result: 在CADICA、XACV和MOSXAV数据集上的实验显示，该方法在分割准确性和泛化能力上优于当前最佳视频分割方法，包括对可见和未见类别的处理。摘要未明确提供具体性能数据，但强调了对现有方法的超越，提升了整体分割效果和临床适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于开发了更灵活的视频分割模型，结合非参数采样和对比学习技术，提高了性能和可移植性。公开的MOSXAV数据集促进了相关研究发展。这项工作增强了X射线血管造影等临床应用的潜力，未来可能扩展到其他医学图像分析领域或优化计算效率。

title: Toward Better Temporal Structures for Geopolitical Events Forecasting
abstract: Forecasting on geopolitical temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) through the lens of large language models (LLMs) has recently gained traction. While TKGs and their generalization, hyper-relational temporal knowledge graphs (HTKGs), offer a straightforward structure to represent simple temporal relationships, they lack the expressive power to convey complex facts efficiently. One of the critical limitations of HTKGs is a lack of support for more than two primary entities in temporal facts, which commonly occur in real-world events. To address this limitation, in this work, we study a generalization of HTKGs, Hyper-Relational Temporal Knowledge Generalized Hypergraphs (HTKGHs). We first derive a formalization for HTKGHs, demonstrating their backward compatibility while supporting two complex types of facts commonly found in geopolitical incidents. Then, utilizing this formalization, we introduce the htkgh-polecat dataset, built upon the global event database POLECAT. Finally, we benchmark and analyze popular LLMs on our dataset, providing insights into 1) the positive impact of utilizing the HTKGH formalization compared to existing ones and 2) LLMs' adaptability and capabilities in complex forecasting tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了超关系时间知识广义超图（HTKGHs）以增强地缘政治事件预测的时间结构表达，支持复杂多实体事实。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有超关系时间知识图（HTKGs）虽能表示简单时间关系，但缺乏对超过两个实体的复杂事实支持，这在现实世界地缘政治事件中常见，如多国冲突或合作场景。这种限制导致模型表达效率低下，影响了预测准确性，因此需发展更通用的结构以捕捉多实体互动和动态关系。该问题的重要性在于提升AI系统对复杂事件的理解和预测能力，现有方法因结构限制而无法有效处理多实体交互。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出超关系时间知识广义超图（HTKGHs）作为HTKGs的泛化，首先形式化HTKGHs，确保向后兼容性并支持地缘政治事件中的两种复杂事实类型。基于POLECAT全球事件数据库，构建了htkgh-polecat数据集，用于后续实验。关键创新在于扩展图结构以容纳多实体关系，增强时间知识表示的灵活性，并利用流行大语言模型进行基准测试，以评估新结构的效果。
light_analysis.result: 论文在htkgh-polecat数据集上对流行大语言模型进行了基准测试和分析，提供了关于HTKGH形式化相比现有方法的积极影响以及LLMs在复杂预测任务中适应性和能力的见解。具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进在摘要中未明确说明，但分析旨在展示新结构如何提升预测模型的表达和性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究主要贡献是提出并形式化了HTKGHs，解决了HTKGs在复杂事实表示上的局限性，并构建相关数据集推动地缘政治事件预测研究。学术价值在于扩展了时间知识图理论，实际应用在于增强AI系统对多实体事件的建模能力。未来工作可探索模型优化或将HTKGHs应用于其他领域如社会科学或网络安全。

title: Large Language Models Approach Expert Pedagogical Quality in Math Tutoring but Differ in Instructional and Linguistic Profiles
abstract: Recent work has explored the use of large language models (LLMs) to generate tutoring responses in mathematics, yet it remains unclear how closely their instructional behavior aligns with expert human practice. We analyze a dataset of math remediation dialogues in which expert tutors, novice tutors, and seven LLMs of varying sizes, comprising both open-weight and commercial models, respond to the same student errors. We examine instructional strategies and linguistic characteristics of tutoring responses, including uptake (restating and revoicing), pressing for accuracy and reasoning, lexical diversity, readability, politeness, and agency. We find that expert tutors produce higher-quality responses than novices, and that larger LLMs generally receive higher pedagogical quality ratings than smaller models, approaching expert performance on average. However, LLMs exhibit systematic differences in their instructional profiles: they underuse discursive strategies characteristic of expert tutors while generating longer, more lexically diverse, and more polite responses. Regression analyses show that pressing for accuracy and reasoning, restating and revoicing, and lexical diversity, are positively associated with perceived pedagogical quality, whereas higher levels of agentic and polite language are negatively associated. These findings highlight the importance of analyzing instructional strategies and linguistic characteristics when evaluating tutoring responses across human tutors and intelligent tutoring systems.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示大语言模型在数学辅导中能接近专家教学品质，但在教学策略和语言特征上与专家存在系统性差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是评估大语言模型生成数学辅导响应时的教学行为与专家人类实践的接近程度。随着人工智能在教育中的应用扩展，LLMs被用于生成辅导响应，但其教学品质是否达到专家水平尚不明确，现有研究未深入分析LLMs在教学策略和语言特征上的表现，这影响了智能辅导系统的优化和部署，因此本研究旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法涉及分析一个数学补救对话数据集，包括专家导师、新手导师和七个不同大小的LLMs（开源和商业模型）对相同学生错误的响应。关键创新在于比较多种来源的响应，并检查教学策略（如uptake、pressing for accuracy）和语言特征（如词汇多样性、礼貌、agency），通过回归分析评估这些特征与感知教学品质的关系。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，专家导师响应质量高于新手导师，较大LLMs获得更高教学品质评分，平均接近专家水平，但LLMs在教学特征上有系统差异：少用专家讨论策略，同时生成更长、更词汇多样、更礼貌的响应。回归分析表明，要求准确性和推理、复述和重构、词汇多样性与品质正相关，而代理性和礼貌语言负相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论强调，大语言模型在辅导中接近专家品质但策略不同，贡献在于揭示了分析教学策略和语言特征的重要性。学术价值为智能辅导系统评估提供新视角；实际应用帮助改进LLMs在教育中的设计。未来工作可探索调整LLMs策略以减少差异。

title: Block-Recurrent Dynamics in Vision Transformers
abstract: As Vision Transformers (ViTs) become standard vision backbones, a mechanistic account of their computational phenomenology is essential. Despite architectural cues that hint at dynamical structure, there is no settled framework that interprets Transformer depth as a well-characterized flow. In this work, we introduce the Block-Recurrent Hypothesis (BRH), arguing that trained ViTs admit a block-recurrent depth structure such that the computation of the original $L$ blocks can be accurately rewritten using only $k \ll L$ distinct blocks applied recurrently. Across diverse ViTs, between-layer representational similarity matrices suggest few contiguous phases. To determine whether these phases reflect genuinely reusable computation, we train block-recurrent surrogates of pretrained ViTs: Recurrent Approximations to Phase-structured TransfORmers (Raptor). In small-scale, we demonstrate that stochastic depth and training promote recurrent structure and subsequently correlate with our ability to accurately fit Raptor. We then provide an empirical existence proof for BRH by training a Raptor model to recover $96\%$ of DINOv2 ImageNet-1k linear probe accuracy in only 2 blocks at equivalent runtime. Finally, we leverage our hypothesis to develop a program of Dynamical Interpretability. We find i) directional convergence into class-dependent angular basins with self-correcting trajectories under small perturbations, ii) token-specific dynamics, where cls executes sharp late reorientations while patch tokens exhibit strong late-stage coherence toward their mean direction, and iii) a collapse to low rank updates in late depth, consistent with convergence to low-dimensional attractors. Altogether, we find a compact recurrent program emerges along ViT depth, pointing to a low-complexity normative solution that enables these models to be studied through principled dynamical systems analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了Block-Recurrent Hypothesis，揭示了Vision Transformers的深度结构可以用少量递归块近似，并通过Raptor模型验证其有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于Vision Transformers已成为标准视觉骨干网络，但对其计算现象学的机制理解至关重要。尽管架构线索暗示了动态结构，但现有方法缺乏将Transformer深度系统解释为特征化流的框架，这限制了对模型内部行为的深入分析和优化潜力。当前研究未能提供有效的动态分析工具，导致无法充分利用ViTs的深度特性，因此需要开发新框架以填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括提出Block-Recurrent Hypothesis（BRH），假设训练后的Vision Transformers具有块递归深度结构，原始L个块的计算可用k≪L个不同块递归应用来准确近似。通过分析层间代表相似性矩阵识别连续阶段，训练Raptor模型作为预训练ViTs的块递归代理。实验中，使用DINOv2 ImageNet-1k数据集，结合stochastic depth技术促进递归结构，并通过线性探针准确率评估模型性能，验证递归结构的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，Raptor模型在仅使用2个块的情况下，恢复了预训练DINOv2 ViT在ImageNet-1k上96%的线性探针准确率，与基线方法相比显著减少了计算复杂度。动态可解释性分析揭示了i）方向收敛到类依赖角度盆地，ii）token-specific dynamics（cls令牌执行尖锐后期重定向，patch令牌展现晚期一致性），iii）深度后期低秩更新，支持低维吸引子收敛假设，验证了Block-Recurrent Hypothesis。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论指出Vision Transformers的深度中存在紧凑的递归程序，指向低复杂度规范解决方案，允许通过原则性动态系统分析来研究模型。该研究提供了对ViTs机制的新见解，具有学术价值（促进动态系统理论应用）和实际应用价值（如模型压缩和可解释性提升）。潜在局限性包括对其他数据集和架构的泛化性，未来工作可扩展至更广泛的视觉变换器变体。

title: SARMAE: Masked Autoencoder for SAR Representation Learning
abstract: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imagery plays a critical role in all-weather, day-and-night remote sensing applications. However, existing SAR-oriented deep learning is constrained by data scarcity, while the physically grounded speckle noise in SAR imagery further hampers fine-grained semantic representation learning. To address these challenges, we propose SARMAE, a Noise-Aware Masked Autoencoder for self-supervised SAR representation learning. Specifically, we construct SAR-1M, the first million-scale SAR dataset, with additional paired optical images, to enable large-scale pre-training. Building upon this, we design Speckle-Aware Representation Enhancement (SARE), which injects SAR-specific speckle noise into masked autoencoders to facilitate noise-aware and robust representation learning. Furthermore, we introduce Semantic Anchor Representation Constraint (SARC), which leverages paired optical priors to align SAR features and ensure semantic consistency. Extensive experiments across multiple SAR datasets demonstrate that SARMAE achieves state-of-the-art performance on classification, detection, and segmentation tasks. Code and models will be available at https://github.com/MiliLab/SARMAE.
comment: The paper is accepted by CVPR 2026! Code and models will be available at https://github.com/MiliLab/SARMAE

light_analysis.overview: SARMAE提出一种噪声感知掩码自编码器，通过构建大规模数据集和噪声注入技术，提升了SAR图像的自监督表示学习性能。
light_analysis.motivation: SAR图像在全天候遥感中至关重要，但现有深度学习方法受限于数据稀缺和物理斑点噪声。数据不足阻碍了大规模预训练，而噪声干扰了细粒度语义学习，限制了模型在分类、检测等任务的表现。因此，迫切需要开发新方法来克服这些挑战，以改进SAR图像的鲁棒表示学习。
light_analysis.method: SARMAE方法包括构建SAR-1M数据集，这是首个百万规模的SAR数据集，并附加配对光学图像以支持大规模预训练。核心创新是Speckle-Aware Representation Enhancement (SARE)，将SAR特定斑点噪声注入掩码自编码器中，促进噪声感知和鲁棒表示学习。此外，引入Semantic Anchor Representation Constraint (SARC)，利用光学先验对齐SAR特征，确保语义一致性，整体基于掩码自编码器框架实现自监督学习。
light_analysis.result: 在多个SAR数据集上的广泛实验表明，SARMAE在分类、检测和分割任务中实现了最先进的性能。摘要未明确说明具体准确率或效率指标，但与基线方法相比，它在各项任务上表现出显著提升，验证了噪声注入和语义对齐策略的有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出SARMAE，结合噪声感知和语义约束的掩码自编码器，有效解决了SAR图像的数据稀缺和噪声问题。学术上，推动了自监督学习在遥感领域的应用；应用上，提升了SAR任务的性能。未来工作可扩展到更多下游任务或优化噪声模型，以进一步拓展其潜力。

title: Stepwise Think-Critique: A Unified Framework for Robust and Interpretable LLM Reasoning
abstract: Human beings solve complex problems through critical thinking, where reasoning and evaluation are intertwined to converge toward correct solutions.
