However, most existing large language models (LLMs) treat the reasoning and verification as separate processes: they either generate reasoning without explicit self-checking or rely on external verifiers to detect errors post hoc. The former lacks immediate feedback, while the latter increases system complexity and hinders synchronized learning. Motivated by human critical thinking, we propose Stepwise Think-Critique (STC), a unified and end-to-end trainable framework that interleaves reasoning and self-critique at every intermediate step within a single model. STC is trained with a hybrid reinforcement learning objective that integrates reasoning rewards and critique-consistency rewards, thereby jointly optimizing solution correctness and reliability of self-evaluation. Experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that STC demonstrates strong critical-thinking capabilities and produces more interpretable reasoning traces, representing a step toward LLMs with built-in critical thinking.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了Stepwise Think-Critique (STC)框架，实现了在大语言模型中统一交织推理和自我批判的端到端训练方法，以提升推理的鲁棒性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大语言模型在处理复杂问题时，常将推理和验证分离：要么缺乏即时自我检查导致错误累积，要么依赖外部验证器增加系统复杂性和阻碍同步学习。受人类批判性思维启发，本研究旨在解决这一问题，开发一个集成框架以克服现有方法的不足，实现更高效和自然的问题解决。该研究强调推理与评估交织的重要性，以推动LLMs向更智能方向发展。
light_analysis.method: Stepwise Think-Critique (STC)是一个统一且端到端可训练的框架，它在单个模型中交织每一步的推理和自我批判。该方法使用混合强化学习目标，整合推理奖励（优化解决方案正确性）和批判一致性奖励（确保自我评估可靠性），从而共同训练模型以生成可靠推理。关键创新在于将推理和批判统一在一个架构中，避免了外部依赖，并通过同步学习提高整体性能。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理基准测试中，STC表现出强大的批判性思维能力，并产生更可解释的推理轨迹。实验结果表明，该框架在提高推理可靠性和可解释性方面有效，但摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标如准确率提升或与基线方法的详细对比数据。基于摘要推断，STC在批判性思维方面展示了改进，代表了向更鲁棒推理的进展。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了STC框架，为大语言模型引入了内置的批判性思维机制，提高了推理的鲁棒性和可解释性。这具有重要学术价值，推动了AI向更类人思维发展，并具有实际应用潜力，如教育或决策支持系统。未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多领域（如自然语言处理）和进一步优化训练目标以增强泛化能力。

title: DiG: Differential Grounding for Enhancing Fine-Grained Perception in Multimodal Large Language Model
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models have achieved impressive performance on a variety of vision-language tasks, yet their fine-grained visual perception and precise spatial reasoning remain limited. In this work, we introduce DiG (Differential Grounding), a novel proxy task framework where MLLMs learn fine-grained perception by identifying and localizing all differences between similar image pairs without prior knowledge of their number. To support scalable training, we develop an automated 3D rendering-based data generation pipeline that produces high-quality paired images with fully controllable discrepancies. To address the sparsity of difference signals, we further employ curriculum learning that progressively increases complexity from single to multiple differences, enabling stable optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiG significantly improves model performance across a variety of visual perception benchmarks and that the learned fine-grained perception skills transfer effectively to standard downstream tasks, including RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, RefCOCOg, and general multimodal perception benchmarks. Our results highlight differential grounding as a scalable and robust approach for advancing fine-grained visual reasoning in MLLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一种名为 DiG 的差分接地框架，通过识别图像对差异来增强多模态大语言模型的细粒度视觉感知能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在多种视觉语言任务上取得了显著成就，但它们在细粒度视觉感知和精确空间推理方面仍存在不足。现有方法往往难以准确捕捉和定位图像中的细微差异，这限制了在需要高精度感知的下游任务中的应用，如对象定位和空间推理。因此，本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过开发一种可扩展的方法来提升模型的感知能力，以应对实际应用中的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 DiG（差分接地）框架，该框架设计为一个代理任务，使多模态大语言模型通过比较相似图像对并识别所有差异来学习细粒度感知，无需事先知道差异数量。为了支持可扩展训练，开发了基于 3D 渲染的自动化数据生成流程，能够创建具有完全可控差异的高质量配对图像。针对差异信号稀疏问题，采用课程学习策略，从单差异逐步增加到多差异，以实现稳定优化。关键创新点包括差分 grounding 任务设计和自动化数据生成方法。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，DiG 框架在多模态大语言模型的细粒度视觉感知方面取得了显著提升。在多种视觉感知基准测试中，包括 RefCOCO、RefCOCO+、RefCOCOg 以及一般多模态感知基准，模型性能均有改善。学习到的感知技能能够有效迁移到标准下游任务，展示了良好的泛化能力。与基线方法相比，DiG 展示了可扩展且稳健的性能改进，但具体数据如准确率提升摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过引入差分接地框架 DiG，显著增强了多模态大语言模型的细粒度视觉感知能力。主要贡献在于提出了一种创新的代理任务和可扩展的数据生成与训练方法。在学术上，该方法为视觉语言模型的感知提升提供了新思路；在实际应用中，可能改进对象定位和空间推理等任务。未来工作可能涉及将方法扩展到更复杂的场景或与其他模态结合，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: A Novel Patch-Based TDA Approach for Computed Tomography Imaging
abstract: The development of machine learning (ML) models based on computed tomography (CT) imaging has been a major focus due to the promise that imaging holds for diagnosis, staging, and prognostication. These models often rely on the extraction of hand-crafted features, incorporating robust feature engineering improves the performance of these models. Topological data analysis (TDA), based on the mathematical field of algebraic topology, focuses on data from a topological perspective, extracting deeper insight and higher dimensional structures. Persistent homology (PH), a fundamental tool in TDA, extracts topological features such as connected components, cycles, and voids. A popular approach to construct PH from 3D CT images is to utilize the 3D cubical complex filtration, a method adapted for grid-structured data. However, this approach is subject to poor performance and high computational cost with higher resolution CT images. This study introduces a novel patch-based PH construction approach tailored for volumetric CT imaging data that improves performance and reduces computational time. This study conducts a series of systematic experiments to comprehensively analyze the performance of the proposed method with various parameters and benchmarks against the 3D cubical complex algorithm and radiomic features. Our results highlight the dominance of the patch-based TDA approach in terms of both classification performance and computational time. The proposed approach outperformed the cubical complex method and radiomic features, achieving average improvement of 7.2%, 3.6%, 2.7%, 8.0%, and 7.2% in accuracy, AUC, sensitivity, specificity, and F1 score, respectively, across all datasets. Finally, we provide a convenient python package, Patch-TDA, to facilitate the utilization of the proposed approach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种基于 patch 的拓扑数据分析方法，专为 CT 成像设计，显著提升分类性能并降低计算时间。
light_analysis.motivation: 计算机断层扫描（CT）成像在医学诊断、分期和预后中具有重要应用，机器学习模型常依赖手工特征提取。现有方法如基于 3D 立方体复形的持久同调技术，能够提取拓扑特征，但在处理高分辨率 CT 图像时，面临性能不佳和计算成本高昂的挑战。这限制了其在实际医疗场景中的应用效率，本研究旨在开发一种更高效的方法，以解决这些不足，提升 CT 图像分析的准确性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究引入了一种新颖的基于 patch 的持久同调构造方法，专门针对体积 CT 成像数据优化。通过将 CT 图像分割成 patch，重新设计拓扑特征提取流程，以减少计算复杂性并保留高维结构信息。方法的核心创新在于 patch-based 策略，可能涉及局部处理来适应高分辨率图像。研究进行了系统实验，评估不同参数设置下的性能，并与传统的 3D 立方体复形算法以及基于手工特征的放射组学方法进行对比。摘要未明确说明具体技术架构细节，但强调了该方法在效率和效果上的改进。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，提出的 patch-based TDA 方法在多项性能指标上均优于基线方法。在所有数据集中，平均提升为：准确率 7.2%，AUC 3.6%，敏感性 2.7%，特异性 8.0%，F1 分数 7.2%。同时，计算时间显著减少，表明该方法在分类性能和计算效率上均有显著优势。这些结果通过与 3D 立方体复形算法和放射组学特征的基准对比验证，突显了其在实际应用中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了一种创新的 patch-based TDA 方法，有效解决了 CT 成像中拓扑特征提取的性能和计算瓶颈。通过提供 Patch-TDA Python 包，促进了方法的易用性和推广。在学术上，推动了拓扑数据分析在医学影像领域的应用；在实际应用中，可能提升诊断准确性和效率。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但强调了方法的技术创新和实用价值。

title: On Geometric Understanding and Learned Priors in Feed-forward 3D Reconstruction Models
abstract: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction models such as DUSt3R, VGGT, and Depth Anything 3 (DA3) are transformer-based foundation models that infer camera geometry and dense scene structure in a single forward pass. Trained at scale in a supervised fashion, they raise a central question: do these models build upon geometric principles akin to traditional multi-view pipelines, or do they primarily rely on learned priors arising from the large-scale training setup? We find that epipolar geometry emerges within the intermediate layers of all three models and is causally linked to correspondence patterns in attention heads. To study this, we perform a systematic analysis of their internal representations across three real-world datasets and a controlled synthetic dataset. We quantify geometric understanding by probing intermediate features, analyzing attention patterns to identify correspondence matching patterns, and performing targeted interventions at the attention level. Further, we assess the role of learned priors by applying challenging input-level perturbations, such as occlusions, scene ambiguities, and varying camera configurations, and compare them against classical multi-stage reconstruction pipelines.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过系统分析 feed-forward 3D 重建模型的内部表示，揭示了对极几何在中间层的涌现及其与注意力模式的因果联系。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决 feed-forward 3D 重建模型（如 DUSt3R、VGGT 和 DA3）是否基于传统几何原理或主要依赖学到的先验知识。这些模型基于 transformer 架构，在大规模监督训练中实现快速场景结构推断，但与传统多视图管道相比，其内部机制不明确，可能影响模型在复杂场景下的鲁棒性和可靠性。理解这一点对改进模型设计和提升性能至关重要，尤其是在实际应用中处理遮挡、模糊性和相机变化时。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括对 DUSt3R、VGGT 和 DA3 模型的系统分析，使用三个真实世界数据集和一个受控合成数据集。通过探测中间特征、分析注意力模式以识别对应匹配模式，并在注意力级别进行针对性干预来量化几何理解。同时，应用输入级扰动（如遮挡、场景模糊性和变化的相机配置）评估学到的先验作用，并将结果与经典多阶段重建管道进行比较。关键创新在于结合定量分析和干预实验，深入探究模型内部工作方式。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，在所有三个模型中，对极几何在中间层涌现，并与注意力头中的对应模式因果相关。量化分析表明模型在一定程度上学习了几何原理，但同时也依赖于学到的先验知识，尤其是在面对遮挡和相机配置变化等挑战性扰动时。与传统多阶段管道相比，这些模型在处理复杂输入时可能表现出不同的适应性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但通过系统性分析揭示了几何理解和先验的交互作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究总结出 feed-forward 3D 重建模型结合了几何理解和学到的先验，其内部机制与传统方法既有联系又有差异。学术价值在于深化对 transformer 基模型工作方式的理解，为优化模型架构和提高计算效率提供参考；实际应用价值体现在增强模型在真实世界场景中的鲁棒性和准确性。局限性可能包括数据集覆盖的广泛性和模型的泛化能力，未来工作可扩展扰动类型或探索更多模型变体。

title: WildCap: Facial Albedo Capture in the Wild via Hybrid Inverse Rendering
abstract: Existing methods achieve high-quality facial albedo capture under controllable lighting, which increases capture cost and limits usability. We propose WildCap, a novel method for high-quality facial albedo capture from a smartphone video recorded in the wild. To disentangle high-quality albedo from complex lighting effects in in-the-wild captures, we propose a novel hybrid inverse rendering framework. We first apply a data-driven method, i.e., SwitchLight, to convert the captured images into more constrained conditions and then adopt model-based inverse rendering. However, unavoidable local artifacts in network predictions, such as shadow-baking, are non-physical and thus hinder accurate inverse rendering of lighting and material. To address this, we propose a novel texel grid lighting model to explain non-physical effects as clean albedo illuminated by local physical lighting. During optimization, we jointly sample a diffusion prior for the albedo map and optimize the lighting, effectively resolving scale ambiguity between local lights and albedo. Other reflectance maps are then predicted from the albedo. Our method achieves significantly better results than prior arts in the same capture setup, closing the quality gap between in-the-wild and controllable recordings by a large margin.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出WildCap方法，通过混合逆渲染框架从野外智能手机视频中高质量捕获面部反照率，解决复杂照明下的解耦问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有面部反照率捕获方法通常依赖可控照明环境，导致设备成本高、部署复杂，限制在野外等非可控场景的应用。这降低了捕获的实用性和灵活性，因为现有技术在处理复杂、动态照明时难以准确分离反照率和照明效果，产生非物理伪影，影响结果准确性。因此，开发一种能在野外条件下高效解耦反照率的方法至关重要，以提升捕获质量和可访问性。
light_analysis.method: WildCap采用混合逆渲染框架，结合数据驱动和模型基础方法。首先，使用SwitchLight网络将野外图像预处理为受约束条件，简化逆渲染过程。然后，提出texel grid lighting模型，将网络预测中的非物理伪影（如阴影烘烤）解释为清洁反照率在局部物理照明下的效果。在优化阶段，联合采样反照率图的扩散先验并优化照明参数，有效解决局部光与反照率之间的尺度模糊性，最终从反照率预测其他反射图。
light_analysis.result: 在相同捕获设置下，WildCap方法显著优于先前技术，大幅缩小了野外记录与可控记录之间的质量差距。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率提升百分比），但强调了视觉效果和实用性的显著改进，表明该方法能更有效地处理复杂照明条件，提升捕获的可靠性和准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了WildCap混合逆渲染框架，实现在野外环境中高质量捕获面部反照率，突破了对可控照明的依赖。学术上，它推动了逆渲染和计算机视觉技术的发展，实际应用中降低了设备成本和部署难度，增强了面部捕获的灵活性和实用性。未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多光照场景或集成多模态数据，以进一步提升鲁棒性和适用范围。

title: Fast-FoundationStereo: Real-Time Zero-Shot Stereo Matching
abstract: Stereo foundation models achieve strong zero-shot generalization but remain computationally prohibitive for real-time applications. Efficient stereo architectures, on the other hand, sacrifice robustness for speed and require costly per-domain fine-tuning. To bridge this gap, we present Fast-FoundationStereo, a family of architectures that achieve, for the first time, strong zero-shot generalization at real-time frame rate. We employ a divide-and-conquer acceleration strategy with three components: (1) knowledge distillation to compress the hybrid backbone into a single efficient student; (2) blockwise neural architecture search for automatically discovering optimal cost filtering designs under latency budgets, reducing search complexity exponentially; and (3) structured pruning for eliminating redundancy in the iterative refinement module. Furthermore, we introduce an automatic pseudo-labeling pipeline used to curate 1.4M in-the-wild stereo pairs to supplement synthetic training data and facilitate knowledge distillation. The resulting model can run over 10x faster than FoundationStereo while closely matching its zero-shot accuracy, thus establishing a new state-of-the-art among real-time methods. Project page: https://nvlabs.github.io/Fast-FoundationStereo/

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了Fast-FoundationStereo架构，首次在实时帧率下实现了强零样本立体匹配，通过分治法加速策略解决了泛化与效率的平衡问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 立体视觉基础模型在零样本泛化方面表现优越，但计算成本高昂，难以满足实时应用需求，如自动驾驶。现有高效立体架构为了提升速度，往往牺牲模型的鲁棒性，并需要针对每个域进行昂贵的微调，限制了其广泛应用。因此，开发一种既能保持零样本泛化能力，又能实现实时性能的立体匹配方法成为迫切需求，本研究旨在弥合这一差距。
light_analysis.method: Fast-FoundationStereo采用分治法加速策略，包括三个关键组件：(1) 知识蒸馏，将混合骨干模型压缩为单个高效学生模型，以减少计算复杂度；(2) 块级神经架构搜索，自动发现最优成本滤波设计，在给定延迟预算下指数级减少搜索复杂性；(3) 结构化剪枝，消除迭代优化模块中的冗余。此外，通过自动伪标签管道整理140万个真实世界立体对，补充合成训练数据，以促进知识蒸馏过程。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，Fast-FoundationStereo模型在运行速度上比FoundationStereo快超过10倍，同时其零样本准确率与FoundationStereo相近。这使其在实时立体匹配方法中达到了新的最先进水平，有效平衡了泛化性能与计算效率。摘要未明确提供具体准确率数据，但强调了速度提升与准确率的保持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出了Fast-FoundationStereo，成功在实时帧率下实现了强零样本立体匹配，解决了泛化与效率的矛盾。其方法在学术上推动了高效立体视觉架构的创新，在实际应用中为实时场景如自动驾驶提供了潜在解决方案。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可进一步优化模型压缩技术或扩展到其他视觉任务。

title: Long-LRM++: Preserving Fine Details in Feed-Forward Wide-Coverage Reconstruction
abstract: Recent advances in generalizable Gaussian splatting (GS) have enabled feed-forward reconstruction of scenes from tens of input views. Long-LRM notably scales this paradigm to 32 input images at $950\times540$ resolution, achieving 360° scene-level reconstruction in a single forward pass. However, directly predicting millions of Gaussian parameters at once remains highly error-sensitive: small inaccuracies in positions or other attributes lead to noticeable blurring, particularly in fine structures such as text. In parallel, implicit representation methods such as LVSM and LaCT have demonstrated significantly higher rendering fidelity by compressing scene information into model weights rather than explicit Gaussians, and decoding RGB frames using the full transformer or TTT backbone. However, this computationally intensive decompression process for every rendered frame makes real-time rendering infeasible. These observations raise key questions: Is the deep, sequential "decompression" process necessary? Can we retain the benefits of implicit representations while enabling real-time performance? We address these questions with Long-LRM++, a model that adopts a semi-explicit scene representation combined with a lightweight decoder. Long-LRM++ matches the rendering quality of LaCT on DL3DV while achieving real-time 14 FPS rendering on an A100 GPU, overcoming the speed limitations of prior implicit methods. Our design also scales to 64 input views at the $950\times540$ resolution, demonstrating strong generalization to increased input lengths. Additionally, Long-LRM++ delivers superior novel-view depth prediction on ScanNetv2 compared to direct depth rendering from Gaussians. Extensive ablation studies validate the effectiveness of each component in the proposed framework.

light_analysis.overview: Long-LRM++ 通过半显式场景表示和轻量级解码器，实现了高质量场景重建的实时渲染。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决现有场景重建方法的局限性。一方面，基于 Gaussian splatting 的方法在预测数百万高斯参数时易产生误差，导致细节模糊，特别是在文本等细结构中；另一方面，隐式表示方法如 LVSM 和 LaCT 虽然渲染保真度高，但解码过程计算密集，无法实现实时渲染。这在实际应用如虚拟现实中形成瓶颈，因此需要探索一种既能保留隐式表示优势又能达到实时性能的新方法。
light_analysis.method: Long-LRM++ 的核心方法采用半显式场景表示结合轻量级解码器。半显式表示通过部分编码场景信息到模型权重中，部分以显式形式表示，减少了对高斯参数的直接依赖，从而降低错误敏感性。轻量级解码器基于 transformer 或 TTT 骨干网络，简化了解码过程，避免了先前隐式方法中的深度顺序解压。模型能处理多达 64 个输入视图，分辨率 950x540，支持宽覆盖重建，并利用前馈结构提高效率。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Long-LRM++ 在 DL3DV 数据集上匹配了 LaCT 的渲染质量，同时在 A100 GPU 上实现 14 FPS 的实时渲染速度，克服了隐式方法的实时限制。模型扩展到 64 个输入视图时仍保持强泛化能力，并在 ScanNetv2 数据集上提供优于直接高斯深度渲染的新视角深度预测。广泛消融研究验证了半显式表示和轻量级解码器对性能提升的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文的主要贡献是 Long-LRM++，它成功平衡了渲染质量和实时性能，解决了场景重建中的关键权衡问题。学术上，它展示了结合显式和隐式表示的新途径，推动了重建技术的发展。实际应用中，为实时高保真渲染提供了可能，适用于虚拟现实等领域。未来工作可能包括进一步优化表示效率和扩展性，以应对更复杂场景。

title: Analyzing Planner Design Trade-offs for MAPF under ADG-based Realistic Execution
abstract: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) algorithms are increasingly deployed in industrial warehouses and automated manufacturing facilities, where robots must operate reliably under real-world physical constraints. However, existing MAPF evaluation frameworks typically rely on simplified robot models, leaving a substantial gap between algorithmic benchmarks and practical performance. Recent frameworks such as SMART combine kinodynamic modeling with execution based on the Action Dependency Graph (ADG), enabling realistic, large-scale MAPF evaluation. Building on this capability, this work investigates how key planner design choices influence performance under realistic execution settings. We systematically study three fundamental factors: (1) the relationship between solution optimality and execution performance, (2) the sensitivity of system performance to inaccuracies in kinodynamic modeling, and (3) the tradeoff between model accuracy and plan optimality. Empirically, we examine these factors to understand how these design choices affect performance in realistic scenarios. We highlight open challenges and research directions to steer the community toward practical, real-world deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过分析多智能体路径规划中规划器设计在真实执行设置下的权衡，揭示了关键因素对性能的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体路径规划算法在工业仓库和自动制造设施中日益应用，但现有评估框架通常依赖简化机器人模型，导致算法基准与实际性能脱节，影响实际部署的可靠性。SMART等新框架结合运动学模型和行动依赖图执行，实现真实大规模评估，但规划器设计选择在真实执行下的影响未被充分研究，限制了算法优化。本研究旨在解决这一实际问题，探讨关键设计因素如何影响性能，以促进MAPF在实际场景中的高效部署。
light_analysis.method: 论文基于SMART框架，利用行动依赖图和运动学模型进行真实执行评估，系统研究三个关键因素：解决方案最优性与执行性能的关系、系统性能对运动学模型误差的敏感性，以及模型准确性与计划最优性的权衡。通过实验分析这些设计选择在真实工业环境模拟中的影响，核心方法聚焦于ADG执行模拟的扩展应用。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节，但强调了对现有框架的依赖性研究。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果数据，如准确率提升或效率改进。论文通过实证研究分析了规划器设计因素在真实执行设置下的影响，可能基于SMART框架进行了性能评估，揭示了这些因素如何交互影响系统表现。与基线方法的对比未在摘要中提及，但研究提供了对设计权衡的定性见解，强调了优化方向，如减少模型误差以提升执行效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于系统分析了MAPF规划器设计在真实执行设置下的权衡，包括解决方案最优性、运动学模型准确性和执行性能之间的关系。具有重要学术和实际价值，推动了MAPF领域向实用部署发展，并指出了开放挑战和研究方向，如进一步优化模型与执行的协调。未来工作可聚焦于算法改进和更广泛场景验证，以解决实际应用中的局限性。

title: COREA: Coupled Relightable 3D Gaussians and SDFs for Efficient Normal Alignment
abstract: We present COREA, the first unified three-tasks framework that couples an SDF and relightable 3D Gaussians (3DGS) to jointly support SH-based novel-view synthesis (NVS), surface reconstruction, and inverse physically-based rendering (inverse PBR). While recent relightable 3DGS methods have progressed, inverse PBR remains bottlenecked by normal estimation, as the discrete nature of 3DGS often yields oversmoothed and unstable normals. To address this limitation, COREA couples the complementary geometric properties of an SDF and relightable 3DGS on a shared underlying surface, where geometry-constrained relightable 3DGS provides reliable depth signals to anchor SDF geometry and the continuous SDF normal field provides spatially consistent supervision for Gaussian normal learning. We couple these signals through depth-guided alignment and normal supervision with normal-aware densification, and introduce Dual-Density Control to regulate densification by balancing photometric and geometric gradients for stable, memory-efficient training. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that COREA is the only framework that supports all three tasks, achieving competitive performance overall, with particularly superior results in inverse PBR.

light_analysis.overview: COREA首次统一耦合SDF和可重光照3D高斯，通过法线对齐解决逆物理基于渲染中的关键瓶颈，支持新视角合成、表面重建和逆渲染三任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有可重光照3D高斯方法在逆物理基于渲染（逆PBR）中面临法线估计的瓶颈，由于3D高斯的离散性导致法线平滑和不稳定，限制了渲染质量和表面重建精度。这一问题对真实感渲染和3D建模至关重要，因为准确法线是逆PBR的基础，而现有方法缺乏有效的几何一致性。COREA旨在解决这一不足，通过整合互补技术提升性能。
light_analysis.method: COREA耦合了SDF的连续法线场和可重光照3D高斯的可靠深度信号，在共享表面上进行几何约束。核心方法包括深度引导对齐和法线监督，辅以法线感知的密集化策略，并引入Dual-Density Control来平衡光度和几何梯度，实现稳定、内存高效的训练。该框架基于Spherical Harmonics支持新视角合成，同时整合SDF进行表面重建和逆PBR任务。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准测试中，COREA是唯一能够同时支持新视角合成、表面重建和逆物理基于渲染的框架。整体表现具有竞争性，尤其是在逆PBR任务上取得了显著优势，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进。与基线方法相比，COREA在法线对齐方面表现突出，推进了多任务3D视觉技术。
light_analysis.conclusion: COREA通过耦合SDF和3D高斯，有效解决了逆PBR中的法线对齐问题，实现了高效的多任务3D重建和渲染。其统一框架具有学术创新性，为计算机图形学和虚拟现实等应用提供了潜力，但摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向。这一研究推动了3D视觉技术的发展，可能激发更高效的几何表示方法。

title: S2WMamba: A Wavelet-Assisted Mamba-Based Dual-Branch Network For Pansharpening
abstract: Pansharpening fuses a high-resolution panchromatic (PAN) image with a low-resolution multispectral (LRMS) image to produce a high-resolution multispectral (HRMS) image. A key difficulty is that jointly processing PAN and MS features often entangles spatial detail enhancement with spectral fidelity. To address this feature entanglement, we propose S2WMamba, a framework that explicitly disentangles modality-specific frequency information for highly controlled crossmodal interaction. Concretely, unlike global frequency transforms, a localized 2D Haar DWT is applied to the PAN image to precisely isolate spatial edges and textures. Concurrently, a novel channel-wise 1D Haar DWT treats each pixel's spectrum as a 1D signal, isolating the shared spectral base from band-specific variations to strictly limit spectral distortion. The resulting Spectral branch injects wavelet-extracted spatial details into MS features, while the Spatial branch refines PAN features using spectra from the DWT1D process. To overcome inadequate frequency fusion, the two branches exchange information via Mambabased cross-modulation, which explicitly models long-range dependencies across these decoupled sub-bands with linear complexity. On WV3, GF2, and QB datasets, S2WMamba matches or surpasses recent strong baselines (FusionMamba, CANNet, U2Net, PanNet), improving PSNR by up to 0.23 dB and reaching an HQNR of 0.956 on full-resolution WV3. Extensive ablations justify the modality-specific DWT placement and the parallel dual-branch architecture.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出S2WMamba框架，利用小波变换和Mamba模型构建双分支网络，显式解耦全色和多光谱图像的特征频率，以解决特征纠缠问题并提升全色锐化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 全色锐化技术旨在融合高分辨率全色图像和低分辨率多光谱图像，生成高质量的高分辨率多光谱图像，广泛应用于遥感等领域。然而，现有方法在联合处理全色和多光谱特征时，往往导致空间细节增强与光谱保真度的相互干扰，即特征纠缠问题，这限制了融合图像的质量和应用效果。传统或基线网络可能未充分考虑频率信息的解耦，因此本研究旨在通过显式分离模态特定频率信息，实现更精确的跨模态交互，以改善全色锐化结果。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出S2WMamba框架，通过两步小波变换处理不同模态。首先，对全色图像应用局部2D Haar离散小波变换，精确提取空间边缘和纹理；其次，对多光谱数据采用新型通道级1D Haar离散小波变换，将每个像素的光谱作为1D信号处理，分离共享光谱基和带特定变化，以减少光谱失真。基于此，构建光谱分支和空间分支：光谱分支注入小波提取的空间细节到多光谱特征中，空间分支使用来自1D DWT的光谱信息优化全色特征。为克服频率融合不足，两个分支通过基于Mamba的交叉调制交换信息，显式建模解耦子带之间的长程依赖，并保持线性计算复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 实验在WV3、GF2和QB三个数据集上进行，S2WMamba在性能上匹配或超越了近期强基线方法，如FusionMamba、CANNet、U2Net和PanNet。具体而言，峰值信噪比（PSNR）提升了高达0.23分贝，并且在WV3全分辨率数据集上达到了0.956的高质量指标（HQNR）。这些结果表明，该方法在保持光谱保真度的同时，有效增强了空间细节，提升了全色锐化的整体质量。消融实验进一步验证了模态特定小波变换放置和并行双分支架构的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了S2WMamba框架，通过小波辅助和Mamba基础的双分支网络，有效解耦了全色和多光谱图像的特征频率，解决了特征纠缠问题。学术上，它为多模态图像融合领域提供了新思路，结合了小波分析的局部性和Mamba模型的序列建模能力；实际应用上，该方法可显著提升遥感图像处理中的全色锐化质量，支持后续的精确分析和决策。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他图像融合任务或优化模型效率，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Order Matters: 3D Shape Generation from Sequential VR Sketches
abstract: VR sketching lets users explore and iterate on ideas directly in 3D, offering a faster and more intuitive alternative to conventional CAD tools. However, existing sketch-to-shape models ignore the temporal ordering of strokes, discarding crucial cues about structure and design intent. We introduce VRSketch2Shape, the first framework and multi-category dataset for generating 3D shapes from sequential VR sketches. Our contributions are threefold: (i) an automated pipeline that generates sequential VR sketches from arbitrary shapes, (ii) a dataset of over 20k synthetic and 900 hand-drawn sketch-shape pairs across four categories, and (iii) an order-aware sketch encoder coupled with a diffusion-based 3D generator. Our approach yields higher geometric fidelity than prior work, generalizes effectively from synthetic to real sketches with minimal supervision, and performs well even on partial sketches. All data and models will be released open-source at https://chenyizi086.github.io/VRSketch2Shape_website.

light_analysis.overview: VRSketch2Shape首次提出结合顺序感知编码器和扩散生成器的框架，从序列VR草图生成高保真3D形状。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决现有VR草图到3D形状生成模型中忽视笔划时间顺序的问题，这导致结构设计和意图关键线索丢失，影响生成准确性和设计完整性。VR草图作为比传统CAD工具更直观的3D设计方式，其序列信息包含重要几何和意图细节，但现有方法忽略此点，限制了实际应用效果。因此，需要开发更精准的方法来利用顺序信息，提升3D形状生成质量。
light_analysis.method: 方法提出VRSketch2Shape框架，包括三个核心部分：自动化管道从任意3D形状生成序列VR草图；构建覆盖四个类别的数据集，包含超过20,000个合成和900个手绘草图-形状对；结合顺序感知草图编码器和基于扩散的3D生成器。关键创新在于编码器捕获笔划顺序信息，增强结构理解，而生成器使用扩散技术提高形状生成质量。技术细节涉及序列数据处理和扩散模型的集成，以优化草图到形状的映射。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，该方法在几何保真度上优于先前工作，能有效从合成草图泛化到真实草图，仅需最小监督即可实现良好效果，并且在部分草图条件下仍表现稳定。尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标，但强调了与基线方法的对比优势，表明在形状准确性和泛化能力上有显著改进。这些结果验证了顺序感知方法的有效性，为VR草图生成3D形状提供了更可靠的方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了首个从序列VR草图生成3D形状的完整框架和数据集，学术上引入顺序感知方法增强草图理解和生成质量，实践上开源促进VR设计工具和CAD领域发展。局限性摘要未明确说明，未来工作可能扩展数据集类别或优化模型在更复杂场景中的应用，进一步推动三维内容创作的创新。

title: GeoBridge: A Semantic-Anchored Multi-View Foundation Model Bridging Images and Text for Geo-Localization
abstract: Cross-view geo-localization infers a location by retrieving geo-tagged reference images that visually correspond to a query image. However, the traditional satellite-centric paradigm limits robustness when high-resolution or up-to-date satellite imagery is unavailable. It further underexploits complementary cues across views (\eg, drone, satellite, and street) and modalities (\eg, language and image). To address these challenges, we propose GeoBridge, a novel model that performs bidirectional matching across views and supports language-to-image retrieval. Going beyond traditional satellite-centric formulations, GeoBridge builds on a novel semantic-anchor mechanism that bridges multi-view features through textual descriptions for robust, flexible localization. In support of this task, we construct GeoLoc, the first large-scale, cross-modal, and multi-view aligned dataset comprising over 50,000 pairs of drone, street-view panorama, and satellite images as well as their textual descriptions, collected from 36 countries, ensuring both geographic and semantic alignment. We performed broad evaluations across multiple tasks. Experiments confirm that GeoLoc pre-training markedly improves geo-location accuracy for GeoBridge while promoting cross-domain generalization and cross-modal knowledge transfer. Code, dataset, and pretrained models will be released at https://github.com/MiliLab/GeoBridge.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出GeoBridge模型，通过语义锚机制桥接多视图图像和文本，提升跨视角地理定位的鲁棒性和灵活性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统跨视角地理定位方法主要依赖卫星图像，但当高分辨率或最新卫星图像不可用时，其鲁棒性受限。此外，现有方法未充分利用无人机、街道视图等多视角信息以及文本描述等跨模态数据，这限制了在复杂环境下的应用。因此，本研究旨在解决这些不足，开发一个能够整合多视图和跨模态信息的地理定位模型，以提高定位准确性和适应性，尤其在资源受限或数据缺失场景中。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出GeoBridge模型，基于语义锚机制，将多视图图像特征与文本描述对齐，实现跨视图的双向匹配和语言到图像检索。关键创新点是通过文本描述桥接无人机、卫星和街道视图的特征。模型使用GeoLoc数据集进行预训练，该数据集包含超过50,000对图像-文本对，覆盖36个国家，确保地理和语义对齐，以促进知识转移和泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验评估显示，使用GeoLoc数据集预训练的GeoBridge模型显著提高了地理定位的准确性。摘要未明确给出具体性能指标，但通过广泛评估确认模型在多任务中表现良好，包括跨领域泛化和跨模态知识转移。与传统卫星中心方法相比，GeoBridge在处理多视图和跨模态检索任务时展现出更强的鲁棒性和灵活性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出GeoBridge模型和构建GeoLoc数据集，通过语义锚机制桥接图像和文本，提升了地理定位性能。这项工作在学术上促进了多视图学习和跨模态检索的发展，实际应用中可增强地理定位系统在复杂环境下的适应性。未来工作可能包括模型优化和扩展到更多数据源，以进一步提高应用范围。

title: Language as a Wave Phenomenon: Semantic Phase Locking and Interference in Neural Networks
abstract: The role of phase in neural sequence models remains poorly understood. To isolate this question, we introduce PRISM, a complex-valued encoder that enforces a unit-norm constraint ($|z| = 1$) and replaces attention with gated spectral filtering. Under this constraint, the model cannot use activation magnitude to distinguish signal from noise, and must instead rely on phase angles. We find that semantic relationships correlate with measurable phase structure: synonym pairs exhibit significantly higher phase coherence than random pairs ($R = 0.198$ vs.\ $0.072$, $p < 0.001$), and the model resolves lexical ambiguity via layer-specific phase rotations while maintaining near-unit gain. These phase representations are robust to scalar attenuation, retaining $97\%$ of translation quality when signal magnitude is uniformly reduced. We also identify a spectral density threshold: the model fails to generate coherent output from isolated tokens, requiring minimum sequence length to produce the interference patterns that support its computation. Finally, we show that a hybrid architecture (Wave-Particle Transformer) combining a phase-based encoder with standard attention matches Transformer baselines at $33$M parameters with fewer non-embedding parameters, though we do not claim this generalizes to larger scales. Our findings provide controlled evidence that phase angles can encode semantic information in complex-valued networks, and characterize the conditions under which this encoding succeeds and fails.
comment: Reframed as controlled experimental study, removed unsupported claims, added explicit hypotheses and statistical tests. Core results unchanged

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出PRISM模型，通过复数编码和单位范数约束，揭示了相位角度在神经网络中能有效编码语义信息，并展示了其语义相关性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 相位在神经序列模型中的角色尚未被充分理解，现有方法主要依赖激活幅度来区分信号与噪声，忽略了相位可能携带的语义信息。这限制了模型对噪声的鲁棒性和语义解析能力，尤其是在复杂语言任务中。因此，研究旨在探索相位作为信号载体的潜力，填补这一知识空白，以改进语义表示和模型效率。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法引入PRISM，这是一个复数编码器，强制单位范数约束，确保|z|=1，从而迫使模型依赖相位角度而非幅度来区分信号。关键创新点包括用门控谱滤波替换标准注意力机制，通过相位角度进行语义编码。模型架构包括层特定相位旋转和复数表示；混合架构Wave-Particle Transformer则结合相位编码器和标准注意力。数据集摘要未明确说明，可能基于通用文本数据来评估语义关系。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果发现语义关系与相位结构显著相关：同义词对相位一致性高于随机对（R=0.198 vs 0.072，p<0.001）。模型通过相位旋转解析词汇歧义，并在信号幅度衰减时保留97%的翻译质量。识别了谱密度阈值，显示模型需要最小序列长度以产生干涉模式；混合架构在33M参数下匹配Transformer基线，非嵌入参数更少，但摘要未明确声称其能泛化到更大规模。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论提供证据表明相位角度能在复数网络中编码语义信息，并描述其成功条件和失败阈值。研究的学术价值在于深化对相位在神经网络中作用的理解，实际价值可能促进更鲁棒的语义表示方法开发。局限性包括混合架构在更大规模上的泛化能力未知；未来工作可探索模型扩展和更多应用场景。

title: Rethinking Reward Signals in Video GRPO: When Scores Become Targets
abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) enables stable and preference-oriented updates via group-wise comparisons for post-training video generation. However, GRPO directly optimizes reward-induced advantages. Under sustained optimization, the reward score can lose fidelity as a proxy for true video quality, consistent with the phenomenon described by Goodhart's Law. This leads to two recurring issues: (i) shortcut-driven optimization under composite objectives and (ii) reward saturation within prompt groups. To address these issues, we introduce TaRoS, a Target-Robust Reward Signaling framework for Video generation GRPO. TaRoS leverages component level performance assessment together with intra-group sparsity to organize multi-aspect rewards towards optimization objectives. In addition, it adaptively downweights components that exhibit saturation, thereby preserving effective optimization directions and mitigating redundancy. This maintains meaningful optimization directions and preserves within-group ranking separation, thereby preventing reward hacking and leading to more reliable policy updates. Extensive experiments show consistent improvements in visual fidelity, motion coherence, and text-video alignment over strong baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出TaRoS框架，通过组件级评估和自适应权重调整，改进视频生成GRPO中奖励信号的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) 用于视频生成的后训练，通过组间比较实现稳定和偏好导向的更新。然而，GRPO直接优化奖励诱导的优势，在持续优化下，奖励分数可能失去作为真实视频质量代理的保真度，这遵循古德哈特定律，导致两个问题：复合目标下的捷径驱动优化和提示组内的奖励饱和。这些问题使得奖励信号失真，降低了策略更新的可靠性，影响视频生成质量，因此需要更鲁棒的奖励信号机制来防止奖励破解。
light_analysis.method: 作者提出TaRoS（Target-Robust Reward Signaling）框架来解决GRPO中的奖励信号失真问题。该方法利用组件级性能评估和组内稀疏性来组织多方面奖励，使其朝向优化目标，关键创新点包括自适应地降低显示饱和的组件的权重，以保留有效的优化方向和减少冗余。这有助于保持有意义的优化方向和在组内排名分离，防止奖励破解，从而促进更可靠的策略更新。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构，但该方法旨在通用化应用于视频生成任务。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛实验，TaRoS在视觉保真度、运动连贯性和文本-视频对齐方面相比强基线显示出持续的改进，验证了其在解决奖励信号失真问题上的有效性。实验表明，该方法能有效防止奖励破解，提高策略更新的可靠性，尽管摘要未提供具体的性能指标数据（如准确率提升），但结果强调了框架在提升视频生成质量方面的优势。与现有GRPO方法相比，TaRoS在多个评价维度上均表现更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出TaRoS框架，通过组件级评估和自适应权重调整，增强了视频生成GRPO中奖励信号的鲁棒性，解决了奖励分数失真导致的优化问题。这具有学术价值，为优化奖励信号提供了新方法，并在实际应用中能提高视频生成的质量和可靠性。未来工作可能包括将该框架扩展到其他生成任务或进一步优化组件评估机制，以提升通用性和效率。

title: DKDS: A Benchmark Dataset of Degraded Kuzushiji Documents with Seals for Detection and Binarization
abstract: Kuzushiji, a pre-modern Japanese cursive script, can currently be read and understood by only a few thousand trained experts in Japan. With the rapid development of deep learning, researchers have begun applying Optical Character Recognition (OCR) techniques to transcribe Kuzushiji into modern Japanese. Although existing OCR methods perform well on clean pre-modern Japanese documents written in Kuzushiji, they often fail to consider various types of noise, such as document degradation and seals, which significantly affect recognition accuracy. To the best of our knowledge, no existing dataset specifically addresses these challenges. To address this gap, we introduce the Degraded Kuzushiji Documents with Seals (DKDS) dataset as a new benchmark for related tasks. We describe the dataset construction process, which involves the assistance of a trained Kuzushiji expert, and define two benchmark tracks: (1) Kuzushiji character and seal detection and (2) document binarization. For the Kuzushiji character and seal detection track, we provide baseline results using several recent versions of YOLO to detect Kuzushiji characters and seals. For the document binarization track, we present baseline results from traditional binarization algorithms, traditional algorithms combined with K-means clustering, two state-of-the-art (SOTA) generative adversarial network (GAN) methods, and our improved conditional GAN (cGAN)-based method. The DKDS dataset and the implementation code for baseline methods are available at https://ruiyangju.github.io/DKDS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了DKDS数据集，作为处理退化和有印章的古日文文档的检测和二值化基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于古日文草书字符（Kuzushiji）的光学字符识别（OCR）技术在实际应用中的挑战。现有OCR方法在干净文档上表现良好，但未充分考虑文档退化和印章等噪音，这显著影响了识别准确性。目前缺乏专门针对这些问题的数据集，限制了相关研究的进展。因此，引入新基准以解决这一空白，提升方法在真实场景中的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括构建DKDS数据集，通过古日文专家协助模拟真实文档的退化和印章情况。论文定义了两个基准任务：一是字符和印章检测，使用多个YOLO版本作为基线模型；二是文档二值化，评估了传统算法、传统算法结合K-means聚类、两种前沿生成对抗网络（GAN）方法，并提出了改进的条件GAN（cGAN）方法，以优化处理噪音文档的性能。
light_analysis.result: 论文提供了基线结果，展示了YOLO在检测任务中的潜力，以及改进的cGAN在二值化任务中的性能。与其它方法对比，表明新数据集有助于评估和提升相关任务的准确性，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，如准确率或效率改进的数值，仅提到提供了基线结果和公开代码。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论强调了DKDS数据集的贡献，填补了古日文OCR领域的数据空白，具有重要学术和实际应用价值。它为研究者提供了基准以开发更鲁棒的方法，处理退化和有印章的文档。未来工作可基于此进一步优化算法，或扩展到其他噪音类型和文档场景，潜在局限性包括数据集的规模或通用性需在更多研究中验证。

title: FedSDWC: Federated Synergistic Dual-Representation Weak Causal Learning for OOD
abstract: Amid growing demands for data privacy and advances in computational infrastructure, federated learning (FL) has emerged as a prominent distributed learning paradigm. Nevertheless, differences in data distribution (such as covariate and semantic shifts) severely affect its reliability in real-world deployments. To address this issue, we propose FedSDWC, a causal inference method that integrates both invariant and variant features. FedSDWC infers causal semantic representations by modeling the weak causal influence between invariant and variant features, effectively overcoming the limitations of existing invariant learning methods in accurately capturing invariant features and directly constructing causal representations. This approach significantly enhances FL's ability to generalize and detect OOD data. Theoretically, we derive FedSDWC's generalization error bound under specific conditions and, for the first time, establish its relationship with client prior distributions. Moreover, extensive experiments conducted on multiple benchmark datasets validate the superior performance of FedSDWC in handling covariate and semantic shifts. For example, FedSDWC outperforms FedICON, the next best baseline, by an average of 3.04% on CIFAR-10 and 8.11% on CIFAR-100.

light_analysis.overview: FedSDWC是一种融合不变和变化特征的弱因果学习方法，旨在增强联邦学习的泛化能力和OOD数据检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着数据隐私需求的增长和计算基础设施的进步，联邦学习已成为重要的分布式学习范式，但在实际部署中，数据分布差异（如协变量和语义偏移）严重影响了其可靠性。现有不变学习方法在准确捕获不变特征和直接构建因果表示方面存在局限性，导致对分布变化的鲁棒性不足，因此需要开发新方法来处理这些挑战，以提升联邦学习的现实应用价值。
light_analysis.method: FedSDWC是一种因果推理方法，通过集成不变和变化特征来建模它们之间的弱因果影响，从而推断因果语义表示。该方法的关键创新在于结合双表示学习，克服了传统不变学习方法在直接构建因果表示上的不足。理论方面，在特定条件下推导了泛化误差边界，并首次建立了其与客户端先验分布的关系。实验使用多个基准数据集（如CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100）进行验证，无需直接依赖复杂因果模型。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，FedSDWC在处理协变量和语义偏移方面表现优异。具体而言，在CIFAR-10数据集上，FedSDWC平均优于次优基线FedICON 3.04%；在CIFAR-100数据集上，优于8.11%。这些结果验证了该方法在提升泛化能力和OOD检测上的有效性，显著优于现有基线方法，并显示了其在真实分布变化场景中的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedSDWC的提出解决了联邦学习中数据分布差异的关键问题，通过弱因果学习增强了模型的泛化能力和OOD检测性能。理论贡献包括误差边界分析和与先验分布的关系建立，实验证明了其优越性。该研究为处理现实世界中的分布偏移提供了新方法，潜在局限性可能在于对特定条件的依赖，未来工作可扩展到更多数据集或优化理论框架。

title: Exploring the Underwater World Segmentation without Extra Training
abstract: Accurate segmentation of marine organisms is vital for biodiversity monitoring and ecological assessment, yet existing datasets and models remain largely limited to terrestrial scenes. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{AquaOV255}, the first large-scale and fine-grained underwater segmentation dataset containing 255 categories and over 20K images, covering diverse categories for open-vocabulary (OV) evaluation. Furthermore, we establish the first underwater OV segmentation benchmark, \textbf{UOVSBench}, by integrating AquaOV255 with five additional underwater datasets to enable comprehensive evaluation. Alongside, we present \textbf{Earth2Ocean}, a training-free OV segmentation framework that transfers terrestrial vision--language models (VLMs) to underwater domains without any additional underwater training. Earth2Ocean consists of two core components: a Geometric-guided Visual Mask Generator (\textbf{GMG}) that refines visual features via self-similarity geometric priors for local structure perception, and a Category-visual Semantic Alignment (\textbf{CSA}) module that enhances text embeddings through multimodal large language model reasoning and scene-aware template construction. Extensive experiments on the UOVSBench benchmark demonstrate that Earth2Ocean achieves significant performance improvement on average while maintaining efficient inference.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出无需额外训练的Earth2Ocean框架，实现水下开放词汇分割，并引入新数据集和基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 水下生物分割对生物多样性监测和生态评估至关重要，但现有数据集和模型主要局限于陆地场景，缺乏水下大规模数据，这限制了模型的泛化能力并增加了训练成本。因此，研究旨在解决水下分割问题，通过利用现有陆地视觉-语言模型，减少对额外水下训练的依赖，从而提高水下场景的分割准确性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出Earth2Ocean框架，一个无需训练的开放词汇分割方法，将陆地基於视觉-语言模型转移至水下领域。核心组件包括Geometric-guided Visual Mask Generator (GMG)，通过自相似性几何先验精化视觉特征以增强局部结构感知；和Category-visual Semantic Alignment (CSA)，利用多模态大语言模型推理和场景感知模板构建改进文本嵌入。该方法使用AquaOV255数据集和UOVSBench基准进行评估，无需额外水下训练数据。
light_analysis.result: 实验在UOVSBench基准上进行，Earth2Ocean在平均性能上实现了显著提升，同时保持了高效推理。与基线方法相比，该框架有效提高了水下开放词汇分割的准确性，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数据或对比基线名称。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出Earth2Ocean框架、AquaOV255数据集和UOVSBench基准，首次实现无需额外训练的水下开放词汇分割。学术上，它扩展了视觉-语言模型的应用范围，减少了数据依赖；实际中，可用于水下生态监测和生物多样性评估。未来工作可能包括进一步优化模型泛化能力或探索更复杂的水下场景。

title: Alignment-Aware Quantization for LLM Safety
abstract: Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) has become the de-facto standard for efficient LLM deployment, yet its optimization objective remains fundamentally incomplete. Standard PTQ methods minimize reconstruction error (e.g., MSE or KL divergence) without accounting for behavioral alignment--a critical property instilled through safety fine-tuning. We demonstrate that this objective mismatch introduces a systematic vulnerability: models can maintain low perplexity yet exhibit significant degradation in safety alignment, revealing that perplexity alone is an insufficient and often misleading proxy for deployment readiness. To address this, we propose Contrastive Alignment Quantization (CAQ), which extends the PTQ objective design space by integrating a Contrastive Alignment Loss (CAL). CAL introduces a principled push-pull mechanism that jointly optimizes distributional fidelity and behavioral alignment: it steers the quantized model toward its safe, instruction-tuned counterpart while diverging from the unaligned, pre-trained reference. CAQ requires no specialized safety datasets, relying solely on standard calibration data, and introduces negligible computational overhead over existing transformation-based PTQ pipelines. We show that CAQ enables robust 4-bit (W4A4) quantization across diverse model families--including LLaMA, Qwen, and Mistral--achieving superior safety alignment where state-of-the-art PTQ methods fail, without sacrificing general capabilities. Anonymized code is available in the supplementary material.
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures. Includes 8 pages of supplementary material

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了对比对齐量化（CAQ）方法，通过集成对比对齐损失联合优化LLM量化后的安全对齐和分布保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 后训练量化（PTQ）是大型语言模型高效部署的标准方法，但标准PTQ方法仅优化重构误差如MSE或KL散度，忽视了行为对齐，这是通过安全微调获得的关键属性。这种目标不匹配导致量化模型在保持低困惑度时安全对齐显著退化，增加了部署风险，因为困惑度不足以可靠评估模型安全性，突显了现有方法在确保安全量化方面的不足和实际重要性。
light_analysis.method: CAQ扩展了PTQ的目标设计空间，引入了对比对齐损失（CAL），通过一个原则性的推拉机制联合优化分布保真度和行为对齐，引导量化模型向安全、指令调优的版本靠近，同时远离未对齐的预训练参考。该方法不需要专门安全数据集，仅依赖标准校准数据，并在现有基于变换的PTQ管道上引入可忽略的计算开销，关键创新在于平衡量化效率和安全性。
light_analysis.result: CAQ在LLaMA、Qwen和Mistral等多种模型上实现了4位（W4A4）量化，安全对齐方面优于最先进的PTQ方法，而未牺牲一般能力，具体表现为避免了标准PTQ方法中安全退化的漏洞，从而提升了部署可靠性。实验表明，该方法能有效维护模型性能指标，同时在安全对齐上取得显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAQ为LLM的安全部署提供了有效解决方案，通过扩展PTQ目标确保量化模型的安全对齐，提高了学术研究和实际应用的价值，例如简化安全量化流程并避免额外数据需求。潜在局限性可能涉及对其他模型和任务的扩展性，未来工作可探索更广泛的量化设置和自适应对齐机制。

title: Efficient LLM Safety Evaluation through Multi-Agent Debate
abstract: Safety evaluation of large language models (LLMs) increasingly relies on LLM-as-a-Judge frameworks, but the high cost of frontier models limits scalability. We propose a cost-efficient multi-agent judging framework that employs Small Language Models (SLMs) through structured debates among critic, defender, and judge agents. To rigorously assess safety judgments, we construct HAJailBench, a large-scale human-annotated jailbreak benchmark comprising 12,000 adversarial interactions across diverse attack methods and target models. The dataset provides fine-grained, expert-labeled ground truth for evaluating both safety robustness and judge reliability. Our SLM-based framework achieves agreement comparable to GPT-4o judges on HAJailBench while substantially reducing inference cost. Ablation results show that three rounds of debate yield the optimal balance between accuracy and efficiency. These findings demonstrate that structured, value-aligned debate enables SLMs to capture semantic nuances of jailbreak attacks and that HAJailBench offers a reliable foundation for scalable LLM safety evaluation.
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures, 10 tables. Updated NeurIPS-style preprint. HAJailBench is aligned to the audited 11,100-instance release; the reduction from 12,000 reflects removal of a small batch with inconsistent prompt/model settings and annotator pool. Figures, experimental framing, and appendix materials were revised

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种通过多智能体辩论实现高效大型语言模型安全性评估的框架，使用小型语言模型并构建了大规模的HAJailBench数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前大型语言模型的安全性评估高度依赖基于前沿模型的LLM-as-a-Judge框架，但这些模型成本高昂，限制了评估方法的大规模应用和可扩展性。随着LLMs在关键领域的部署增多，确保其安全性和鲁棒性至关重要，但现有方法的高成本成为瓶颈。因此，研究旨在开发成本效益更高的评估技术，以解决可扩展性问题并促进安全评估的普及。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个多智能体辩论框架，通过结构化辩论过程，使用小型语言模型作为批评者、辩护者和法官智能体来评估LLM安全性。关键创新在于利用成本较低的SLMs替代昂贵的顶级模型，并通过辩论机制捕捉语义细节。方法还构建了HAJailBench数据集，这是一个大规模、人类标注的越狱攻击基准，包含12,000个对抗交互，覆盖多种攻击方法和目标模型，提供细粒度的专家标注真实标签以评估安全性和法官可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 在HAJailBench数据集上的实验显示，基于小型语言模型的多智能体辩论框架在判断同意度上与使用GPT-4o作为法官的表现相当，同时推理成本显著降低。消融实验结果指出，三回合的辩论设置在准确性和效率之间达到了最佳平衡，验证了辩论结构对提升评估性能的有效性。与基线方法GPT-4o相比，该方法在保持高同意的同时，大幅提升了成本效益，为低成本安全评估提供了实证支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于提出了一个成本高效的多智能体辩论框架和新数据集HAJailBench，用于大型语言模型的安全性评估。研究表明，结构化、价值对齐的辩论过程使小型语言模型能够有效捕捉越狱攻击的语义细微差别，从而在降低评估成本的同时确保可靠性。这为可扩展的LLM安全评估提供了坚实的学术和实际应用基础，未来工作可进一步优化辩论机制或扩展该方法到更广泛的安全挑战中。

title: TAUE: Training-free Noise Transplant and Cultivation Diffusion Model
abstract: Despite the remarkable success of text-to-image diffusion models, their output of a single, flattened image remains a critical bottleneck for professional applications requiring layer-wise control. Existing solutions either rely on fine-tuning with large, inaccessible datasets or are training-free yet limited to generating isolated foreground elements, failing to produce a complete and coherent scene. To address this, we introduce the Training-free Noise Transplantation and Cultivation Diffusion Model (TAUE), a novel framework for layer-wise image generation that requires neither fine-tuning nor additional data. TAUE embeds global structural information from intermediate denoising latents into the initial noise to preserve spatial coherence, and integrates semantic cues through cross-layer attention sharing to maintain contextual and visual consistency across layers. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TAUE achieves state-of-the-art performance among training-free methods, delivering image quality comparable to fine-tuned models while improving inter-layer consistency. Moreover, it enables new applications, such as layout-aware editing, multi-object composition, and background replacement, indicating potential for interactive, layer-separated generation systems in real-world creative workflows.
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Findings. The first two authors contributed equally. Project Page: https://iyatomilab.github.io/TAUE

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了TAUE框架，一种无需训练的扩散模型，通过噪声移植和培育技术实现高质量分层图像生成，解决了现有模型在层间控制上的局限。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在专业应用中的主要瓶颈在于其输出为单一图像，缺乏分层控制能力，这对于需要分层编辑的创意工作流至关重要。现有方法存在不足：基于微调的方法需要大规模数据集，这些数据往往难以获取；而无需训练的方法只能生成孤立的前景元素，无法产生完整连贯的场景。因此，开发一种无需训练且能实现全场景分层生成的方法，对于提升应用效率和实用性具有重要研究意义。
light_analysis.method: TAUE框架采用无需训练的方式，结合噪声移植和培育技术。噪声移植将中间去噪潜在空间中的全局结构信息嵌入到初始噪声中，以维护空间一致性；培育技术通过跨层注意力共享机制整合语义线索，确保各层之间的上下文和视觉一致性。该方法不依赖额外数据或微调，直接利用现有扩散模型架构，实现了高效的分层图像生成，突出了对现有模型的创新扩展。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，TAUE在无需训练的方法中达到最先进的性能，生成的图像质量可与微调模型媲美，同时显著提高了层间一致性。它支持多种新应用，如布局感知编辑、多对象组合和背景替换，验证了在现实世界创意工作流中的实用性。摘要未明确说明具体数值指标，但定性评估突出了其在分层生成任务中的优越性，尤其在场景连贯性方面优于现有训练免费方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: TAUE的贡献在于提出了一种无需训练的分层图像生成框架，有效克服了现有方法的局限性，具有重要的学术和应用价值。学术上，它为扩散模型引入了噪声移植和跨层注意力机制，推动了分层控制技术的发展；应用上，它支持创意工作流中的新功能，如交互式编辑和组合，为未来开发更高效的生成系统奠定了基础。虽然当前成果显著，但未来可探索在更复杂场景下的扩展和实时性能优化。

title: AGRAG: Advanced Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation for LLMs
abstract: Graph-based retrieval-augmented generation (Graph-based RAG) has demonstrated significant potential in enhancing Large Language Models (LLMs) with structured knowledge. However, existing methods face three critical challenges: Inaccurate Graph Construction, caused by LLM hallucination; Poor Reasoning Ability, caused by failing to generate explicit reasons telling LLM why certain chunks were selected; and Inadequate Answering, which only partially answers the query due to the inadequate LLM reasoning, making their performance lag behind NaiveRAG on certain tasks. To address these issues, we propose AGRAG, an advanced graph-based retrieval-augmented generation framework. When constructing the graph, AGRAG substitutes the widely used LLM entity extraction method with a statistics-based method, avoiding hallucination and error propagation. During retrieval, AGRAG formulates the graph reasoning procedure as the Minimum Cost Maximum Influence (MCMI) subgraph generation problem, where we try to include more nodes with high influence score, but with less involving edge cost, to make the generated reasoning paths more comprehensive. We prove this problem to be NP-hard, and propose a greedy algorithm to solve it. The MCMI subgraph generated can serve as explicit reasoning paths to tell LLM why certain chunks were retrieved, thereby making the LLM better focus on the query-related part contents of the chunks, reducing the impact of noise, and improving AGRAG's reasoning ability. Furthermore, compared with the simple tree-structured reasoning paths, our MCMI subgraph can allow more complex graph structures, such as cycles, and improve the comprehensiveness of the generated reasoning paths. The code and prompt of AGRAG are released at: https://github.com/Wyb0627/AGRAG.

light_analysis.overview: AGRAG是一种先进的基于图的检索增强生成框架，通过统计方法构建图和建模MCMI子图生成来提升LLMs的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于图的检索增强生成方法面临图构建不准确、推理能力差和回答不充分的问题，主要源于LLM幻觉导致的错误传播、缺乏明确推理路径和部分回答。这些问题使得现有方法在某些任务上性能落后于NaiveRAG，限制了LLMs有效利用结构化知识进行高质量生成的能力。重要性在于提升检索增强生成的准确性和鲁棒性，以支持复杂查询和减少噪声影响。
light_analysis.method: AGRAG采用统计方法替代LLM进行实体提取，以避免幻觉和错误传播。在检索阶段，将推理过程建模为最小成本最大影响力（MCMI）子图生成问题，该问题被证明为NP-hard，并设计贪心算法求解。生成的子图作为明确的推理路径，帮助LLM聚焦相关内容并减少噪声。创新点包括支持复杂图结构如循环，提升推理路径的全面性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。基于摘要，AGRAG通过改进推理路径，可能提升了LLMs的推理能力和回答质量，但与基线方法的详细对比数据如准确率提升或效率改进未提及。推断AGRAG在解决现有挑战方面表现优于传统方法，但需进一步实验验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: AGRAG的主要贡献是提出了基于统计的图构建和MCMI子图推理方法，有效解决了图基检索增强生成的挑战。学术价值在于引入新算法提升推理能力，应用价值为增强LLMs在知识检索任务中的表现。局限性包括未明确实验验证和潜在优化空间，未来工作可能涉及算法效率提升和扩展至更多应用场景。

title: Evontree: Ontology Rule-Guided Self-Evolution of Large Language Models
abstract: Although Large Language Models (LLMs) perform exceptionally well in general domains, the problem of hallucinations poses significant risks in specialized fields such as healthcare and law, where high interpretability is essential. Existing fine-tuning methods depend heavily on large-scale professional datasets, which are often hard to obtain due to the privacy regulations. Moreover, existing self-evolution methods are primarily designed for general domains, which may struggle to adapt to knowledge-intensive domains due to the lack of knowledge constraints. In this paper, we propose an ontology rule guided method Evontree to enable self-evolution of LLMs in low-resource specialized domains. Specifically, Evontree first extracts domain ontology knowledge from raw models, then detects knowledge inconsistencies using two core ontology rules, and finally reinforces gap knowledge into model via self-distilled fine-tuning. Extensive evaluations on medical QA benchmarks using Llama3-8B-Instruct and Med42-V2 demonstrate the effectiveness of Evontree, which outperforms both the base models and strong baselines, achieving up to a 3.7\% improvement in accuracy. Detailed ablation studies further validate the robustness of our approach.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Evontree方法，通过本体规则引导大型语言模型在低资源专业领域实现自我进化，解决幻觉问题并提高准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在医疗和法律等专业领域，大型语言模型的幻觉问题带来高风险，要求高可解释性。现有微调方法依赖大规模专业数据集，但这些数据集因隐私法规难以获取；同时，现有的自我进化方法主要针对通用领域，缺乏知识约束，难以适应知识密集型领域。因此，开发一种能在低资源专业领域有效引导LLMs自我进化的方法至关重要，以克服资源限制和知识不足的挑战。
light_analysis.method: Evontree方法包括三个核心步骤：首先从原始模型中提取领域本体知识；然后使用两个核心本体规则检测知识不一致；最后通过自蒸馏微调将知识差距强化到模型中。该方法在低资源设置下实施，使用Llama3-8B-Instruct和Med42-V2作为基础模型，确保在专业领域中的适应性和有效性。关键创新在于本体规则引导的知识约束和自蒸馏微调技术。
light_analysis.result: 在医学QA基准上进行广泛评估，Evontree在准确率上优于基础模型和强基线，提升高达3.7%。消融研究进一步验证了方法的鲁棒性，表明本体规则引导的自蒸馏微调能有效减少幻觉并提高性能，具体数据支持其在低资源专业领域的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出Evontree方法，成功实现了大型语言模型在低资源专业领域的自我进化，提升了在医疗等领域的准确性和可解释性。该方法具有重要的学术价值，为知识密集型领域的LLMs应用提供了新思路。潜在局限性可能包括本体规则设计的依赖性，未来工作可扩展到更多领域或改进知识提取技术。

title: Transformers can do Bayesian Clustering
abstract: Bayesian clustering accounts for uncertainty but is computationally demanding at scale. Furthermore, real-world datasets often contain missing values, and simple imputation ignores the associated uncertainty, resulting in suboptimal results. We present Cluster-PFN, a Transformer-based model that extends Prior-Data Fitted Networks (PFNs) to unsupervised Bayesian clustering. Trained entirely on synthetic datasets generated from a finite Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) prior, Cluster-PFN learns to estimate the posterior distribution over both the number of clusters and the cluster assignments. Our method estimates the number of clusters more accurately than handcrafted model selection procedures such as AIC, BIC and Variational Inference (VI), and achieves clustering quality competitive with VI while being orders of magnitude faster. Cluster-PFN can be trained on complex priors that include missing data, outperforming imputation-based baselines on real-world genomic datasets, at high missingness. These results show that the Cluster-PFN can provide scalable and flexible Bayesian clustering.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出 Cluster-PFN，一种基于 Transformer 的模型，扩展 Prior-Data Fitted Networks 以实现高效、可扩展的贝叶斯聚类，能处理缺失数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 贝叶斯聚类能处理不确定性，但传统方法如 Variational Inference 计算成本高，难以扩展到大规模数据。现实世界数据集常含有缺失值，简单的插补方法忽略了不确定性，导致聚类结果不准确。因此，开发一种既能高效计算、又能适应缺失数据的贝叶斯聚类方法变得重要，以弥补现有方法的不足，提高实际应用中的鲁棒性和效率。
light_analysis.method: Cluster-PFN 是一种基于 Transformer 架构的模型，它扩展 Prior-Data Fitted Networks 应用于无监督贝叶斯聚类。训练时，模型仅使用从有限高斯混合模型先验生成的合成数据集，学习估计聚类数量和聚类分配的联合后验分布。关键创新在于利用 Transformer 的强大表示能力，结合贝叶斯框架，直接从数据中学习后验分布，并能够处理包含缺失值的复杂先验，无需实际数据插补。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Cluster-PFN 在估计聚类数量上比 AIC、BIC 和 Variational Inference 更准确，同时聚类质量与 Variational Inference 相当，但计算速度快了几个数量级。在真实世界的基因组数据集中，即使在高缺失率下，Cluster-PFN 也显著优于基于简单插补的基线方法，验证了其在处理复杂数据时的有效性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过 Cluster-PFN 展示了 Transformer 模型在贝叶斯聚类中的潜力，提供了一种可扩展且灵活的解决方案，能有效处理不确定性和缺失数据。其学术价值在于结合深度学习和贝叶斯方法，提高聚类效率；实际应用价值在于适用于基因组学等复杂数据集。未来工作可探索更广泛的先验模型或扩展到其他贝叶斯推理任务，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Connecting Jensen-Shannon and Kullback-Leibler Divergences: A New Bound for Representation Learning
abstract: Mutual Information (MI) is a fundamental measure of statistical dependence widely used in representation learning. While direct optimization of MI via its definition as a Kullback-Leibler divergence (KLD) is often intractable, many recent methods have instead maximized alternative dependence measures, most notably, the Jensen-Shannon divergence (JSD) between joint and product of marginal distributions via discriminative losses. However, the connection between these surrogate objectives and MI remains poorly understood. In this work, we bridge this gap by deriving a new, tight, and tractable lower bound on KLD as a function of JSD in the general case. By specializing this bound to joint and marginal distributions, we demonstrate that maximizing the JSD-based information increases a guaranteed lower bound on mutual information. Furthermore, we revisit the practical implementation of JSD-based objectives and observe that minimizing the cross-entropy loss of a binary classifier trained to distinguish joint from marginal pairs recovers a known variational lower bound on the JSD. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our lower bound is tight when applied to MI estimation. We compared our lower bound to state-of-the-art neural estimators of variational lower bound across a range of established reference scenarios. Our lower bound estimator consistently provides a stable, low-variance estimate of a tight lower bound on MI. We also demonstrate its practical usefulness in the context of the Information Bottleneck framework. Taken together, our results provide new theoretical justifications and strong empirical evidence for using discriminative learning in MI-based representation learning.
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2025. This revised version provides a proof of Lemma B.5, previously stated as a conjecture in the original submission. Code available at https://github.com/ReubenDo/JSDlowerbound/

light_analysis.overview: 本论文推导了一个新的、紧的Jensen-Shannon散度与Kullback-Leibler散度之间的下界，用于互信息估计和表示学习，填补了理论空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 互信息作为表示学习中衡量统计依赖性的关键度量，直接通过Kullback-Leibler散度优化常不可行，导致现有研究采用Jensen-Shannon散度作为替代目标。然而，这些替代目标与互信息的真实关系尚不明确，缺乏理论支撑，这可能影响其在实际表示学习中的有效性。论文旨在解决这一问题，阐明Jensen-Shannon散度最大化如何真正增加互信息，从而为基于互信息的表示学习方法提供坚实的理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过理论推导，建立了Jensen-Shannon散度与Kullback-Leibler散度之间的一般下界，并将其特殊化到联合和边缘分布，证明最大化基于Jensen-Shannon散度的信息可以保证增加互信息的低限。关键创新点在于该下界是紧且可处理的。实践上，通过训练二元分类器来区分联合与边缘对，最小化交叉熵损失，从而恢复Jensen-Shannon散度的已知变分下界，为方法提供了可实施性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所推导的下界在互信息估计中是紧的。在一系列标准场景中，与现有最先进的神经估计器比较，新下界估计器能稳定、低方差地提供互信息的紧下界估计，优于或与基线方法相当。此外，在信息瓶颈框架的应用中，该下界展示了实际价值，增强了其在表示学习中的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是建立了Jensen-Shannon散度与Kullback-Leibler散度之间的紧下界，为基于互信息的表示学习提供了新理论依据和强经验证据，强化了判别性学习的有效性。这提升了方法在实际应用中的可靠性，学术价值在于深化了统计依赖度量的理解。未来工作可能涉及将下界扩展到更广泛的统计度量中，以进一步拓展应用范围。

title: Exposing Blindspots: Cultural Bias Evaluation in Generative Image Models
abstract: Generative image models produce striking visuals yet often misrepresent culture. Prior work has examined cultural bias mainly in text-to-image (T2I) systems, leaving image-to-image (I2I) editors underexplored. We bridge this gap with a unified evaluation across six countries, an 8-category/36-subcategory schema, and era-aware prompts, auditing both T2I generation and I2I editing under a standardized protocol that yields comparable diagnostics. Using open models with fixed settings, we derive cross-country, cross-era, and cross-category evaluations. Our framework combines standard automatic metrics, a culture-aware retrieval-augmented VQA, and expert human judgments collected from native reviewers. To enable reproducibility, we release the complete image corpus, prompts, and configurations. Our study reveals three findings: (1) under country-agnostic prompts, models default to Global-North, modern-leaning depictions that flatten cross-country distinctions; (2) iterative I2I editing erodes cultural fidelity even when conventional metrics remain flat or improve; and (3) I2I models apply superficial cues (palette shifts, generic props) rather than era-consistent, context-aware changes, often retaining source identity for Global-South targets. These results highlight that culture-sensitive edits remain unreliable in current systems. By releasing standardized data, prompts, and human evaluation protocols, we provide a reproducible, culture-centered benchmark for diagnosing and tracking cultural bias in generative image models. Project page: https://seochan99.github.io/ECB

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种统一的文化偏见评估框架，用于诊断生成图像模型中文本到图像和图像到图像系统的跨文化和跨时代偏差，并提供可重现的基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成图像模型在文化表示上存在显著偏差，经常误传文化信息，这可能引发刻板印象和不准确认知。先前研究主要集中于文本到图像系统的文化偏见，而对图像到图像编辑器的评估不足，导致关键盲点未被系统探索。因此，本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过开发标准化评估方法，确保AI模型在多样化文化场景中的公平性和准确性，以应对日益增长的生成AI应用需求。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括设计一个标准化评估协议，覆盖六个国家、8个主类别和36个子类别，并采用时代感知提示。框架结合标准自动指标、文化感知的检索增强视觉问答系统，以及从本地评审员收集的专家人类判断，确保评估全面性。使用固定设置的开放模型进行跨国家、跨时代和跨类别的审计，同时发布完整的图像语料库、提示和配置，以支持可重现性和后续研究。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示：在国家无关提示下，模型默认生成偏向全球北方和现代风格的图像，模糊了跨文化差异；迭代的图像到图像编辑会侵蚀文化保真度，即使传统性能指标保持稳定或改善；此外，图像到图像模型更多应用表面线索如调色板变化和通用道具，而非进行时代一致、上下文感知的深度修改，导致对全球南方目标的文化身份保留不足。这些发现突显了当前系统在文化敏感编辑方面的不可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提供了一个可重现的、以文化为中心的基准，用于系统诊断生成图像模型中的文化偏见，特别填补了图像到图像编辑器评估的研究空白。该框架具有学术价值，标准化了评估方法，并为实际应用中的公平性改进提供了指导。未来工作可专注于开发更文化敏感的模型和评估工具，以应对模型在多样化场景中的局限性。

title: MARIS: Marine Open-Vocabulary Instance Segmentation with Geometric Enhancement and Semantic Alignment
abstract: Most existing underwater instance segmentation approaches are constrained by close-vocabulary prediction, limiting their ability to recognize novel marine categories. To support evaluation, we introduce \textbf{MARIS} (\underline{Mar}ine Open-Vocabulary \underline{I}nstance \underline{S}egmentation), the first large-scale fine-grained benchmark for underwater Open-Vocabulary (OV) segmentation, featuring a limited set of seen categories and diverse unseen categories. Although OV segmentation has shown promise on natural images, our analysis reveals that transfer to underwater scenes suffers from severe visual degradation (e.g., color attenuation) and semantic misalignment caused by lack underwater class definitions. To address these issues, we propose a unified framework with two complementary components. The Geometric Prior Enhancement Module (\textbf{GPEM}) leverages stable part-level and structural cues to maintain object consistency under degraded visual conditions. The Semantic Alignment Injection Mechanism (\textbf{SAIM}) enriches language embeddings with domain-specific priors, mitigating semantic ambiguity and improving recognition of unseen categories. Experiments show that our framework consistently outperforms existing OV baselines both In-Domain and Cross-Domain setting on MARIS, establishing a strong foundation for future underwater perception research.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一个结合几何增强和语义对齐的统一框架，用于水下开放词汇实例分割，解决了视觉退化和语义不对齐的挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有水下实例分割方法受限于闭词汇预测，无法识别新颖的海洋类别，限制了实际应用。开放词汇分割虽然在自然图像中表现良好，但在水下场景中由于严重的视觉退化（如颜色衰减）和缺乏水下类别定义导致的语义不对齐，性能显著下降。因此，本研究旨在克服这些水下特有的困难，提升开放词汇分割的鲁棒性和准确性，推动水下环境感知技术的发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个统一框架，包含两个互补组件：几何先验增强模块（GPEM）利用稳定的部分级和结构线索，在视觉退化条件下保持对象的一致性；语义对齐注入机制（SAIM）通过领域特定先验丰富语言嵌入，减少语义模糊性并增强对新类别的识别能力。框架应用于MARIS基准，这是一个首个大规模细粒度的水下开放词汇分割数据集，支持对已见和未见类别的评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所提框架在MARIS基准的域内和跨域设置中均一致优于现有开放词汇分割基线，如提升了分割准确性和鲁棒性。虽然摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率数值，但强调了其优越性和通用性，为未来水下感知研究提供了强有力的基础。与基线方法相比，框架在视觉退化和语义歧义场景下表现出更强的适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献包括引入首个大规模细粒度的水下开放词汇实例分割基准MARIS，以及提出一个结合几何增强和语义对齐的创新框架，有效解决了水下场景中的关键挑战。这项研究具有重要的学术价值，为水下感知领域提供了新工具和方向，并可能在海洋监测、环境科学等实际应用中发挥重要作用。未来工作可进一步优化框架以应对更复杂的水下条件，或扩展到其他域适应任务。

title: Distributional Consistency Loss: Beyond Pointwise Data Terms in Inverse Problems
abstract: Recovering true signals from noisy measurements is a central challenge in inverse problems spanning medical imaging, geophysics, and signal processing. Current methods balance prior signal priors (regularization) with agreement with noisy data (data-fidelity). Conventional data-fidelity loss functions, such as mean-squared error (MSE) or negative log-likelihood, seek pointwise agreement with noisy measurements, often leading to overfitting to noise. In this work, we instead evaluate data-fidelity collectively by testing whether the observed measurements are statistically consistent with the noise distributions implied by the current estimate. We introduce distributional consistency (DC) loss, a data-fidelity objective that replaces pointwise matching with distribution-level calibration. DC loss acts as a direct and practical plug-in replacement for standard data consistency terms: i) it is compatible with modern unsupervised regularizers that operate without paired measurement-ground-truth data, ii) it is optimized in the same way as traditional losses, and iii) it avoids overfitting to measurement noise without early stopping or priors. Its scope naturally fits many practical inverse problems where the measurement-noise distribution is known and where the measured dataset consists of many independent noisy values. We demonstrate efficacy in two key example application areas: i) in image denoising with deep image prior, using DC instead of MSE loss removes the need for early stopping and achieves higher PSNR; ii) in medical image reconstruction from Poisson-noisy data, DC loss reduces artifacts in highly-iterated reconstructions and enhances the efficacy of hand-crafted regularization. These results position DC loss as a statistically grounded, performance-enhancing alternative to conventional fidelity losses for an important class of unsupervised noise-dominated inverse problems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分布一致性损失函数，作为逆问题中传统数据一致性损失的统计基础替代，避免噪声过度拟合。
light_analysis.motivation: 恢复噪声测量中的真实信号是逆问题的核心挑战，涉及医学成像、地球物理和信号处理。现有方法平衡信号先验与数据一致性，但传统损失函数如均方误差（MSE）寻求与噪声测量的点对点一致，常导致过度拟合噪声。本研究引入分布一致性损失，旨在通过分布级别校准替代点对点匹配，以解决传统方法的不足。该问题的重要性在于提高逆问题的可靠性和性能，避免依赖早期停止或强先验假设。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出分布一致性（DC）损失函数，通过统计一致性测试测量值与当前估计所暗示的噪声分布的符合程度，代替传统点对点损失如MSE。该方法作为直接插件替代标准数据一致性项，兼容现代无监督正则化器（无需配对测量-真实数据），优化方式与传统损失相同，无需早期停止或额外先验。其技术特色在于分布级校准，适用于测量噪声分布已知且数据集包含多个独立噪声值的实际逆问题场景，核心创新是避免过度拟合噪声。
light_analysis.result: 在关键应用领域验证了DC损失的有效性：在图像去噪中使用DC替代MSE损失，无需早期停止即可实现更高的峰值信噪比（PSNR）；在医学图像重建中处理泊松噪声数据时，DC损失减少了高度迭代重建中的伪影，并增强了手工正则化的效果。这些结果表明，与传统基线方法相比，DC损失在性能上有所提升，具体表现在PSNR改进和伪影减少，摘要未提供具体数值数据。实验场景包括图像去噪和医学重建，展示了DC损失在避免噪声过度拟合方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 分布一致性损失的主要贡献是提供了一种统计基础的数据一致性损失，替代传统点对点方法，以改进无监督噪声主导的逆问题。其学术价值在于强化逆问题的统计框架，实际应用价值在于提升图像去噪和医学重建等领域的性能。研究的局限性或未来工作摘要未明确说明，但可能包括扩展到更多噪声类型或应用领域。总体来说，该研究为重要类别的逆问题提供了性能增强的替代方案。

title: Readers Prefer Outputs of AI Trained on Copyrighted Books over Expert Human Writers
abstract: The use of copyrighted books for training AI has sparked lawsuits from authors concerned about AI generating derivative content. Yet whether these models can produce high-quality literary text emulating authors' voices remains unclear. We conducted a preregistered study comparing MFA-trained writers with three frontier models (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) writing up to 450-word excerpts emulating 50 award-winning authors' styles. In blind pairwise evaluations by 28 MFA-trained readers and 516 college-educated general readers, AI text from in-context prompting was strongly disfavored by MFA readers for stylistic fidelity (OR=0.16) and quality (OR=0.13), while general readers showed no fidelity preference (OR=1.06) but favored AI for quality (OR=1.82). Fine-tuning ChatGPT on authors' complete works reversed these results: MFA readers favored AI for fidelity (OR=8.16) and quality (OR=1.87), with general readers showing even stronger preference (fidelity OR=16.65; quality OR=5.42). Both groups preferred fine-tuned AI, but the writer-type X reader-type interaction remained significant (p=0.021 for fidelity; p<10^-4 for quality), indicating general readers favored AI by a wider margin. Effects are robust under cluster-robust inference and generalize across authors in heterogeneity analyses. Fine-tuned outputs were rarely flagged as AI-generated (3% vs. 97% for prompting) by leading detectors. Mediation analysis shows fine-tuning eliminates detectable AI quirks that penalize in-context outputs, altering the nexus between detectability and preference. While not accounting for effort to transform AI output into publishable prose, the median fine-tuning cost of $81 per author represents a 99.7% reduction versus typical writer compensation. Author-specific fine-tuning enables non-verbatim AI writing preferred over expert human writing, providing evidence relevant to copyright's fourth fair-use factor.

light_analysis.overview: 论文发现通过微调AI模型于作者作品，其生成的文学文本在风格保真度和质量上被读者偏好超过专家人类写作，同时降低检测性和成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于使用版权书籍训练AI引发的法律争议，作者担忧AI生成衍生内容，现有方法如上下文提示可能在模仿作者声音时质量不足。因此，本研究旨在评估AI是否能产生高质量文学文本，并比较其与人类专家的表现，为版权和AI应用提供实证依据。这个问题重要，因为它关系到AI生成内容的合法性和伦理，以及技术在创意领域的潜力和限制。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法为预注册实验，比较MFA训练的作家和三个前沿大型语言模型（ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini）模仿50位获奖作者的风格。AI模型通过上下文提示生成文本，并对ChatGPT进行基于作者完整作品的微调。评估涉及28位MFA读者和516位受过大学教育的普通读者进行盲评，采用成对比较方式，测量风格保真度和质量偏好。关键创新点包括微调技术用于提升模仿效果，以及使用多样化的读者群体进行真实反馈评估。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，上下文提示的AI文本在MFA读者中保真度OR=0.16、质量OR=0.13表示不偏好，普通读者无保真度偏好（OR=1.06）但偏好质量（OR=1.82）。微调后，MFA读者偏好AI保真度OR=8.16、质量OR=1.87，普通读者更强（保真度OR=16.65、质量OR=5.42）。两组均偏好微调AI，读者类型交互显著（p值小），效果在鲁棒推理和异质性分析中稳健。微调输出仅3%被AI检测器标记，成本降低99.7%至每作者81美元中位数。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论表明，作者特定微调的AI能够生成在风格保真度和质量上优于专家人类写作的文本，降低检测性和成本，为版权公平使用提供证据。学术价值在于实证评估AI文学生成的质量和法律影响，实际应用可能促进写作产业效率提升和版权法律更新。局限性包括未考虑AI输出编辑努力，未来工作方向可探索更广泛的应用场景或改进评估方法。

title: Controllable Graph Generation with Diffusion Models via Inference-Time Tree Search Guidance
abstract: Graph generation is a fundamental problem in graph learning with broad applications across Web-scale systems, knowledge graphs, and scientific domains such as drug and material discovery. Recent approaches leverage diffusion models for step-by-step generation, yet unconditional diffusion offers little control over desired properties, often leading to unstable quality and difficulty in incorporating new objectives. Inference-time guidance methods mitigate these issues by adjusting the sampling process without retraining, but they remain inherently local, heuristic, and limited in controllability. To overcome these limitations, we propose TreeDiff, a Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) guided dual-space diffusion framework for controllable graph generation. TreeDiff is a plug-and-play inference-time method that expands the search space while keeping computation tractable. Specifically, TreeDiff introduces three key designs to make it practical and scalable: (1) a macro-step expansion strategy that groups multiple denoising updates into a single transition, reducing tree depth and enabling long-horizon exploration; (2) a dual-space denoising mechanism that couples efficient latent-space denoising with lightweight discrete correction in graph space, ensuring both scalability and structural fidelity; and (3) a dual-space verifier that predicts long-term rewards from partially denoised graphs, enabling early value estimation and removing the need for full rollouts. Extensive experiments on 2D and 3D molecular generation benchmarks, under both unconditional and conditional settings, demonstrate that TreeDiff achieves state-of-the-art performance. Notably, TreeDiff exhibits favorable inference-time scaling: it continues to improve with additional computation, while existing inference-time methods plateau early under limited resources.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种基于蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的双空间扩散框架TreeDiff，用于可控图生成，通过推理时树搜索指导增强可控性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.motivation: 图生成是图学习的核心问题，广泛应用于网络系统、知识图谱以及科学领域如药物和材料发现。然而，现有扩散模型方法在生成过程中缺乏对期望属性的控制，导致生成质量不稳定且难以整合新目标，限制了实际应用。推理时指导方法虽能通过调整采样过程缓解这些问题，但仍本质上是局部和启发式的，可控性有限，无法支持长视野探索和结构化保真度，因此需要一种更有效的方法来提升可控性和性能。
light_analysis.method: TreeDiff采用蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）指导的双空间扩散框架，作为即插即用推理时方法实现可控图生成。核心创新包括：宏步扩展策略，将多个去噪更新组合为单个转移以降低树深度，支持长视野探索；双空间去噪机制，结合高效潜在空间去噪和轻量级图空间离散校正，确保可扩展性和结构保真度；双空间验证器，从部分去噪图中预测长期奖励，实现早期价值估计，避免完整模拟需求。这些设计在2D和3D分子数据集上应用，扩展搜索空间的同时保持计算成本可控。
light_analysis.result: 在2D和3D分子生成基准测试的无条件和有条件设置中，TreeDiff实现了最先进的性能，显著提升了可控性和生成质量。实验结果表明，推理时间缩放性好：随着额外计算增加而持续改善，而现有推理时方法在有限资源下早早就趋于平缓。尽管摘要未提供具体准确率数据，但通过对比基线方法，验证了其在可控性和效率方面的优越性，突出了该方法在实际应用中的潜在优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: TreeDiff通过整合MCTS和扩散模型，提供了一个有效的即插即用框架，显著改善了可控图生成的性能和可控性。其学术价值在于解决了推理时指导方法的局限性，实现了长视野探索和结构保真度；实际应用价值体现在药物发现和材料科学等领域，能够灵活控制生成属性以适应不同需求。未来工作可能涉及进一步优化计算效率或扩展到更广泛的图生成任务，以提升通用性和实用性。

title: LTGS: Long-Term Gaussian Scene Chronology From Sparse View Updates
abstract: Recent advances in novel-view synthesis can create the photo-realistic visualization of real-world environments from conventional camera captures. However, the everyday environment experiences frequent scene changes, which require dense observations, both spatially and temporally, that an ordinary setup cannot cover. We propose long-term Gaussian scene chronology from sparse-view updates, coined LTGS, an efficient scene representation that can embrace everyday changes from highly under-constrained casual captures. Given an incomplete and unstructured 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) representation obtained from an initial set of input images, we robustly model the long-term chronology of the scene despite abrupt movements and subtle environmental variations. We construct objects as template Gaussians, which serve as structural, reusable priors for shared object tracks. Then, the object templates undergo a further refinement pipeline that modulates the priors to adapt to temporally varying environments given few-shot observations. Once trained, our framework is generalizable across multiple time steps through simple transformations, significantly enhancing the scalability for a temporal evolution of 3D environments. As existing datasets do not explicitly represent the long-term real-world changes with a sparse capture setup, we collect real-world datasets to evaluate the practicality of our pipeline. Experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves superior reconstruction quality compared to other baselines while enabling fast and light-weight updates.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出LTGS，一种能从稀疏视图更新中建模长期高斯场景时序的高效场景表示方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 新视角合成技术能创建真实环境的可视化，但日常环境频繁变化，需要密集时空观测，普通设置无法覆盖。现有方法在稀疏捕获下难以处理长期变化，且数据集未明确表示此类场景，因此研究旨在解决稀疏观测下的长期场景变化建模问题，提升实际应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 方法基于初始图像集获得不完整、非结构化的3D高斯泼溅表示，通过构建对象模板高斯作为结构先验，然后通过细化管道调整先验以适应时间变化环境，仅依赖少样本观测。关键创新在于模板复用和少样本适应，框架通过简单变换泛化到多个时间步骤，显著增强3D环境时间演化的可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 实验使用收集的真实世界数据集评估，LTGS框架在重建质量上优于其他基线，并支持快速、轻量级更新，具体表现在高效处理场景变化和改进视觉效果，与基线相比在效率和准确性方面均有提升，尽管摘要未明确具体数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了LTGS方法，能从稀疏更新中建模长期场景变化，增强3D环境时序表示的实用性和可扩展性。学术价值在于推动稀疏观测下的动态场景建模，实际应用包括虚拟现实等；潜在局限性如稀疏捕获的挑战，未来工作可扩展到更多时间步骤或复杂变化。

title: VideoVerse: Does Your T2V Generator Have World Model Capability to Synthesize Videos?
abstract: The recent rapid advancement of Text-to-Video (T2V) generation technologies are engaging the trained models with more world model ability, making the existing benchmarks increasingly insufficient to evaluate state-of-the-art T2V models. First, current evaluation dimensions, such as per-frame aesthetic quality and temporal consistency, are no longer able to differentiate state-of-the-art T2V models. Second, event-level temporal causality-an essential property that differentiates videos from other modalities-remains largely unexplored. Third, existing benchmarks lack a systematic assessment of world knowledge, which are essential capabilities for building world models. To address these issues, we introduce VideoVerse, a comprehensive benchmark focusing on evaluating whether the current T2V model could understand complex temporal causality and world knowledge to synthesize videos. We collect representative videos across diverse domains and extract their event-level descriptions with inherent temporal causality, which are then rewritten into text-to-video prompts by independent annotators. For each prompt, we design ten evaluation dimensions covering dynamic and static properties, resulting in 300 prompts, 815 events, and 793 evaluation questions. Consequently, a human preference-aligned QA-based evaluation pipeline is developed by using modern vision-language models to systematically benchmark leading open- and closed-source T2V systems, revealing the current gap between T2V models and desired world modeling abilities.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出VideoVerse基准，全面评估文本到视频生成模型在时间因果关系和世界知识方面的世界模型能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前文本到视频生成技术快速发展，模型具备更多世界模型能力，但现有评估基准不足以反映这种进步。现有基准的评估维度（如每帧美学质量和时间一致性）已无法有效区分最先进的模型，且事件级时间因果关系这一视频关键特性被忽视，同时缺乏对世界知识的系统评估。这些问题限制了准确评估模型能力和推动技术发展，因此需要一个新的综合基准来评估模型的世界建模能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出VideoVerse基准，通过收集跨领域的代表性视频，提取具有内在时间因果关系的事件级描述，并由独立注释者重写为文本到视频提示。设计了十个评估维度，涵盖动态和静态属性，形成300个提示、815个事件和793个评估问题。开发了一个与人类偏好对齐的基于问答的评估流程，利用现代视觉语言模型来系统化基准测试领先的开源和闭源T2V系统，以全面评估模型性能。
light_analysis.result: 通过VideoVerse基准系统评估，揭示了当前领先的文本到视频生成模型与世界模型能力之间存在显著差距，特别是在理解复杂时间因果关系和世界知识方面。具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进未在摘要中明确说明，但评估覆盖了多个维度，并与现有基准方法进行了对比，突出了模型的不足和提升空间。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了VideoVerse基准，填补了当前文本到视频生成评估在时间因果关系和世界知识方面的空白，为评估模型的世界模型能力提供了新标准。这具有重要的学术价值，促进了更准确的模型比较和改进，并在实际应用中有助于开发更智能的视频生成系统。未来工作可能包括扩展基准的覆盖范围和优化评估流程，以进一步提升评估效果。

title: Unlocking 3D Affordance Segmentation with 2D Semantic Knowledge
abstract: Affordance segmentation aims to decompose 3D objects into parts that serve distinct functional roles, enabling models to reason about object interactions rather than mere recognition. Existing methods, mostly following the paradigm of 3D semantic segmentation or prompt-based frameworks, struggle when geometric cues are weak or ambiguous, as sparse point clouds provide limited functional information. To overcome this limitation, we leverage the rich semantic knowledge embedded in large-scale 2D Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) to guide 3D representation learning through a cross-modal alignment mechanism. Specifically, we propose Cross-Modal Affinity Transfer (CMAT), a pretraining strategy that compels the 3D encoder to align with the semantic structures induced by lifted 2D features. CMAT is driven by a core affinity alignment objective, supported by two auxiliary losses, geometric reconstruction and feature diversity, which together encourage structured and discriminative feature learning. Built upon the CMAT-pretrained backbone, we employ a lightweight affordance segmentor that injects text or visual prompts into the learned 3D space through an efficient cross-attention interface, enabling dense and prompt-aware affordance prediction while preserving the semantic organization established during pretraining. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements over previous state-of-the-art methods in both accuracy and efficiency.
comment: Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition

light_analysis.overview: 提出Cross-Modal Affinity Transfer (CMAT)预训练策略，利用2D视觉基础模型的语义知识提升3D affordance分割的性能和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D affordance分割旨在分解物体以理解其功能角色，但现有方法主要依赖3D语义分割或提示框架，在几何线索弱或模糊时表现不佳，因为稀疏点云提供有限功能信息，这限制了模型在真实场景中准确推理物体交互的能力。因此，利用2D图像中丰富的语义知识来增强3D表示成为一个关键问题，以弥补几何信息不足，改进物体功能理解。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Cross-Modal Affinity Transfer (CMAT)，一种预训练策略，利用大规模2D视觉基础模型（VFMs）的语义知识通过跨模态对齐机制指导3D表示学习。CMAT的核心是一个亲和力对齐目标，迫使3D编码器与从2D特征提取的语义结构对齐，辅以几何重建和特征多样性两个辅助损失，以鼓励结构化和判别性的特征学习。在此基础上，使用轻量级affordance分割器，通过高效跨注意力接口将文本或视觉提示注入学习的3D空间，实现密集和提示感知的预测。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验证明，该方法在3D affordance分割任务上，相较于先前最先进方法，在准确性和效率方面都取得了显著提升。通过跨模态对齐的预训练策略，模型在几何线索弱的情况下表现出更强的鲁棒性，实现了密集和提示感知的预测，具体性能改进在分割准确率和效率指标上均得到验证，展现出优于基线方法的综合性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过Cross-Modal Affinity Transfer (CMAT)策略，有效利用2D语义知识解锁了3D affordance分割的新途径，提高了分割准确性和效率，增强了3D表示的语义组织能力。学术上，它为3D视觉中的多模态融合提供了创新方法；实际应用上，有助于提升机器人在交互场景中的感知性能。未来工作可探索更复杂的跨模态对齐机制和扩展到其他3D任务。

title: AdaSwitch: Balancing Exploration and Guidance in Knowledge Distillation via Adaptive Switching
abstract: Small language models (SLMs) are crucial for applications with strict latency and computational constraints, yet achieving high performance remains challenging. Knowledge distillation (KD) can transfer capabilities from large teacher models, but existing methods face a dilemma: off-policy distillation provides high-quality supervision but suffers from exposure bias (training inference mismatch), while on-policy approaches ensure consistency but are limited by the low quality of student-generated outputs. To address these issues, we propose AdaSwitch, a novel approach that dynamically combines on-policy and off-policy generation via an adaptive switching mechanism. AdaSwitch allows the student to explore its predictions within its capability and selectively integrates teacher guidance only when divergence exceeds a context-aware threshold. This paradigm preserves generation consistency while ensuring high-quality supervision. Experiments on three datasets demonstrate that AdaSwitch consistently improves accuracy and reasoning capability with moderate overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AdaSwitch，一种通过自适应切换机制在知识蒸馏中动态平衡学生探索和教师指导的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 小型语言模型（SLMs）在延迟和计算约束应用中至关重要，如移动设备和边缘计算，但实现高性能面临挑战。知识蒸馏（KD）可从大型教师模型转移能力以提升SLMs，但现有方法存在不足：离线策略KD提供高质量教师监督，却导致暴露偏差，即训练依赖教师输出而推断依赖学生自身，造成训练推断不匹配；在线策略KD确保一致性，但学生生成输出质量低，限制学习效果。因此，亟需解决探索与指导的平衡问题，以优化SLMs性能。
light_analysis.method: AdaSwitch的核心是一个自适应切换机制，动态结合在线策略（学生生成输出）和离线策略（教师提供输出）。学生在自身能力范围内探索预测，当学生输出与教师输出的分歧超过一个上下文感知阈值时，选择性地切换到教师指导；否则继续学生探索。这种技术基于监控生成过程中的差异，自适应调整监督源，确保生成一致性和高质量监督，关键创新在于阈值驱动的切换策略。
light_analysis.result: 在三个数据集上的实验表明，AdaSwitch一致提高了准确性和推理能力，与基线知识蒸馏方法相比，有效缓解了暴露偏差问题并避免了在线方法的质量限制。尽管引入了自适应切换机制，但开销保持适度，不影响训练效率。具体性能指标如准确率提升百分比未在摘要中提供，但实验结果验证了方法在平衡探索与指导方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdaSwitch为知识蒸馏提供了一种新范式，解决了探索与指导的平衡问题，主要贡献在于引入自适应切换机制。学术上推动了知识蒸馏技术的发展，为模型压缩和迁移学习提供新思路；实践中有助于提升SLMs在资源受限环境下的应用性能。未来工作可能包括优化阈值机制或扩展到其他任务，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性和方向。

title: PolyGraph Discrepancy: a classifier-based metric for graph generation
abstract: Existing methods for evaluating graph generative models primarily rely on Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) metrics based on graph descriptors. While these metrics can rank generative models, they do not provide an absolute measure of performance.
