Their values are also highly sensitive to extrinsic parameters, namely kernel and descriptor parametrization, making them incomparable across different graph descriptors. We introduce PolyGraph Discrepancy (PGD), a new evaluation framework that addresses these limitations. It approximates the Jensen-Shannon distance of graph distributions by fitting binary classifiers to distinguish between real and generated graphs, featurized by these descriptors. The data log-likelihood of these classifiers approximates a variational lower bound on the JS distance between the two distributions. Resulting metrics are constrained to the unit interval [0,1] and are comparable across different graph descriptors. We further derive a theoretically grounded summary metric that combines these individual metrics to provide a maximally tight lower bound on the distance for the given descriptors. Thorough experiments demonstrate that PGD provides a more robust and insightful evaluation compared to MMD metrics. The PolyGraph framework for benchmarking graph generative models is made publicly available at https://github.com/BorgwardtLab/polygraph-benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了PolyGraph Discrepancy (PGD)，一种基于分类器的图生成评估框架，以解决现有最大均值差异(MMD)指标在绝对性能评估和参数敏感性方面的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的图生成模型评估方法主要依赖于基于图描述符的最大均值差异(MMD)度量。这些度量虽然可以对生成模型进行排序，但无法提供绝对性能评估，且其数值对核函数和描述符参数的选择高度敏感，导致不同描述符下的结果不可比较。因此，需要一种新的评估框架来提供更稳定、可比较和绝对的性能衡量标准，以克服这些不足并推动图生成研究的进展。
light_analysis.method: PGD通过拟合二元分类器来区分真实图和生成图，使用图描述符作为输入特征进行特征化。分类器的数据对数似然被用来近似真实分布和生成分布之间的Jensen-Shannon (JS)距离的变分下界。这一方法产生的度量被约束在单位区间[0,1]，确保跨不同图描述符的可比性。关键创新包括基于分类器的近似JS距离和推导的理论基础总结度量，结合多个个体度量为给定描述符提供最大紧下界，从而增强评估的准确性和一致性。
light_analysis.result: 通过全面实验，PGD被证明相比MMD度量在评估图生成模型时具有更高的鲁棒性和洞察力。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进，但强调了PGD在跨描述符比较和提供绝对性能评估方面的优势。实验结果表明PGD能够更有效地反映生成模型的质量，尽管具体数据未详细列出，但框架的公开可用性促进了进一步验证和应用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了PolyGraph Discrepancy (PGD)框架，它通过分类器方法近似JS距离，解决了现有MMD指标在绝对评估和参数敏感性方面的不足。PGD具有理论基础，提供可比较的度量，并公开可用，为图生成模型的标准化评估提供了新工具。这一方法提高了评估的鲁棒性和一致性，摘要未明确说明局限性或具体未来工作方向，但为图生成研究奠定了更坚实的评估基础。

title: VLOD-TTA: Test-Time Adaptation of Vision-Language Object Detectors
abstract: Vision-language object detectors (VLODs) such as YOLO-World and Grounding DINO exhibit strong zero-shot generalization, but their performance degrades under distribution shift. Test-time adaptation (TTA) offers a practical way to adapt models online using only unlabeled target data. However, despite substantial progress in TTA for vision-language classification, TTA for VLODs remains largely unexplored. The only prior method relies on a mean-teacher framework that introduces significant latency and memory overhead. To this end, we introduce \textsc{VLOD-TTA}, a TTA method that leverages dense proposal overlap and image-conditioned prompts to adapt VLODs with low additional overhead. \textsc{VLOD-TTA} combines (i) an IoU-weighted entropy objective that emphasizes spatially coherent proposal clusters and mitigates confirmation bias from isolated boxes, and (ii) image-conditioned prompt selection that ranks prompts by image-level compatibility and aggregates the most informative prompt scores for detection. Our experiments across diverse distribution shifts, including artistic domains, adverse driving conditions, low-light imagery, and common corruptions, indicate that \textsc{VLOD-TTA} consistently outperforms standard TTA baselines and the prior state-of-the-art method using YOLO-World and Grounding DINO. Code : https://github.com/imatif17/VLOD-TTA

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出VLOD-TTA方法，通过密集提议重叠和图像条件提示，以低开销实现视觉语言物体检测器的测试时适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言物体检测器（VLODs）如YOLO-World和Grounding DINO在零样本泛化中表现强，但在分布偏移下性能下降，影响实际应用。测试时适应（TTA）提供了一种在线使用未标记目标数据适应模型的实用方法，可提高模型鲁棒性。然而，尽管在视觉语言分类的TTA方面有进展，VLODs的TTA仍未被充分探索，现有唯一方法基于mean-teacher框架，引入显著延迟和内存开销，限制了效率和实用性。因此，研究旨在开发低开销的TTA方法来应对这一挑战。
light_analysis.method: VLOD-TTA方法结合了两个核心技术：一是IoU加权的熵目标，它通过强调空间上一致的提议簇并减轻孤立框的确认偏差，优化检测性能；二是图像条件提示选择，通过图像级兼容性排名提示，并聚合信息最丰富的提示分数用于物体检测。该方法利用密集提议重叠来提升适应效果，旨在以低额外开销适应VLODs。研究中以YOLO-World和Grounding DINO为基础检测器，在多种分布偏移场景下进行评估，如艺术和低光照图像，但摘要未明确说明具体数据集细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多样化的分布偏移下进行，包括艺术领域、不利驾驶条件、低光照图像和常见损坏。结果表明，VLOD-TTA consistently outperforms标准TTA基线和现有最先进方法，使用YOLO-World和Grounding DINO均表现优越。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标如准确率提升百分比，但论文强调该方法在多个场景下始终优于其他方法，展现了其稳定性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VLOD-TTA的主要贡献是提出了一个高效的测试时适应方法，专门针对视觉语言物体检测器，通过低开销策略显著提升了在分布偏移下的性能。该研究在学术上推进了TTA在物体检测领域的应用，具有实际价值，如增强自动驾驶或图像分析系统的鲁棒性。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多模型类型或更复杂的分布偏移场景，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: ERGO: Efficient High-Resolution Visual Understanding for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Efficient processing of high-resolution images is crucial for real-world vision-language applications. However, existing Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) incur substantial computational overhead due to the large number of vision tokens. With the advent of "thinking with images" models, reasoning now extends beyond text to the visual domain. This capability motivates our two-stage "coarse-to-fine" reasoning pipeline: first, a downsampled image is analyzed to identify task-relevant regions; then, only these regions are cropped at full resolution and processed in a subsequent reasoning stage. This approach reduces computational cost while preserving fine-grained visual details where necessary. A major challenge lies in inferring which regions are truly relevant to a given query. Recent related methods often fail in the first stage after input-image downsampling, due to perception-driven reasoning, where clear visual information is required for effective reasoning. To address this issue, we propose ERGO (Efficient Reasoning & Guided Observation) that performs reasoning-driven perception-leveraging multimodal context to determine where to focus. Our model can account for perceptual uncertainty, expanding the cropped region to cover visually ambiguous areas for answering questions. To this end, we develop simple yet effective reward components in a reinforcement learning framework for coarse-to-fine perception. Across multiple datasets, our approach delivers higher accuracy than the original model and competitive methods, with greater efficiency. For instance, ERGO surpasses Qwen2.5-VL-7B on the V* benchmark by 4.7 points while using only 23% of the vision tokens, achieving a 3x inference speedup. The code and models can be found at: https://github.com/nota-github/ERGO.

light_analysis.overview: ERGO 提出了一种高效的两阶段推理方法，通过粗到细的处理减少高分辨率图像的计算开销，提升视觉语言模型的效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于现实世界视觉语言应用中高效处理高分辨率图像的迫切需求。现有大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）因视觉令牌数量庞大而产生显著计算开销，尤其在降采样图像后，基于感知的推理方法常因缺乏清晰视觉信息而失效。这一问题限制了模型在保留细节同时实现实时应用的可行性，因此需要开发更智能的推理机制来减少成本并保持准确性。
light_analysis.method: ERGO 采用两阶段“粗到细”推理管道：首先分析降采样图像，识别与任务相关的区域；然后仅对这些区域进行全分辨率裁剪和处理。关键创新在于推理驱动的感知，利用多模态上下文（如文本查询）确定焦点区域，并通过扩展覆盖视觉模糊区域来应对不确定性。技术实现包括在强化学习框架中开发简单而有效的奖励组件，以优化区域选择过程，从而平衡计算效率和视觉细节保留。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上，ERGO 展现了优于原始模型和竞争方法的性能。具体而言，在 V* 基准测试中，ERGO 超越了 Qwen2.5-VL-7B 模型 4.7 个百分点，同时仅使用 23% 的视觉令牌，实现了 3 倍的推理速度提升。这表明 ERGO 在保持高准确性的同时，显著降低了计算资源消耗，为高效视觉理解提供了实证支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: ERGO 的主要贡献在于提出了一种高效的高分辨率视觉理解方法，通过推理驱动感知减少计算开销。学术上，该方法为视觉语言模型的高效推理提供了新思路，弥补了现有方法的不足；实际应用中，其高效率特性适合实时视觉语言任务，如智能助手或自动驾驶。局限性或未来工作摘要未明确说明，但可能涉及扩展到更复杂场景或进一步优化强化学习策略。

title: LANCE: Low Rank Activation Compression for Efficient On-Device Continual Learning
abstract: On-device learning is essential for personalization, privacy, and long-term adaptation in resource-constrained environments. Achieving this requires efficient learning, both fine-tuning existing models and continually acquiring new tasks without catastrophic forgetting. Yet both settings are constrained by high memory cost of storing activations during backpropagation. Existing activation compression methods reduce this cost but rely on repeated low-rank decompositions, introducing computational overhead. Also, such methods have not been explored for continual learning. We propose LANCE (Low-rank Activation Compression), a framework that performs one-shot higher-order Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) to obtain a reusable low-rank subspace for activation projection. This eliminates repeated decompositions, reducing both memory and computation. Moreover, fixed low-rank subspaces further enable on-device continual learning by allocating tasks to orthogonal subspaces without storing large task-specific matrices. Experiments show that LANCE reduces activation storage up to 250$\times$ while maintaining accuracy comparable to full backpropagation on CIFAR-10/100, Oxford-IIIT Pets, Flowers102, and CUB-200 datasets. On continual learning benchmarks (Split CIFAR-100, Split MiniImageNet, 5-Datasets), it performs competitively with orthogonal gradient projection methods at a fraction of the memory cost. These results position LANCE as a practical and scalable solution for efficient fine-tuning and continual learning on edge devices.

light_analysis.overview: LANCE框架通过一次性高阶奇异值分解实现低秩激活压缩，显著减少内存和计算开销，并支持设备上的高效连续学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 设备上学习在资源受限环境中对个性化、隐私和长期适应至关重要，但反向传播时存储激活的高内存成本限制了其效率。现有激活压缩方法虽能降低内存成本，但依赖重复低秩分解引入计算开销，且未深入探索连续学习场景。因此，亟需一种既能减少内存占用又能避免计算负担的解决方案，以支持高效的设备上微调和连续学习任务。
light_analysis.method: LANCE框架采用一次性高阶奇异值分解（SVD）来获取可重用的低秩子空间，用于激活投影，从而消除重复分解过程，降低内存和计算开销。关键创新点包括固定低秩子空间的构建，使其能够分配不同任务到正交子空间中，避免存储大型任务特定矩阵，从而支持设备上连续学习。摘要未明确说明具体模型架构，但提及在多个数据集上进行实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，LANCE在CIFAR-10/100、Oxford-IIIT Pets、Flowers102和CUB-200数据集上，将激活存储减少高达250倍，同时保持与全反向传播相当的准确率。在连续学习基准（如Split CIFAR-100、Split MiniImageNet和5-Datasets）上，LANCE的性能与正交梯度投影方法竞争，但内存成本显著降低。这些结果证实了LANCE在减少资源消耗的同时不牺牲学习效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: LANCE的主要贡献是提供了一个高效、可扩展的设备上微调和连续学习解决方案，通过低秩激活压缩减少内存和计算开销。该研究在学术上推动了激活压缩和连续学习技术的发展，实际应用中可用于边缘设备的个性化学习和长期适应。虽然摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能涉及扩展到更复杂模型或动态环境。

title: Transformer-Encoder Trees for Efficient Multilingual Machine Translation and Speech Translation
abstract: Multilingual translation suffers from computational redundancy, especially when translating into multiple languages simultaneously. In addition, translation quality can suffer for low-resource languages. To address this, we introduce Transformer Encoder Tree (TET), a hierarchical, non-autoregressive encoder-only architecture trained with Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) for multilingual translation. TET shares intermediate representations among linguistically similar target languages, improving accuracy on low-resource languages while reducing computational redundancy and enabling the generation of all target languages in a single forward pass. TET eliminates the sequential bottleneck of autoregressive models and supports fully parallel decoding of all tokens across all target languages. Compared to a naive one-to-many multilingual design, TET reduces the total parameter count by 66% and lowers inference computation by 60%. In speech translation, combining TET with a non-autoregressive speech recognition backbone (Wav2Vec2) shows competitive translation quality compared to autoregressive systems while speeding up inference by approximately 7-14 times.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Transformer Encoder Tree (TET)架构，通过共享表示和并行解码，高效实现多语言翻译，减少计算冗余并提升低资源语言准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多语言翻译系统在处理多种语言时，尤其是在同时翻译成多语言时，面临计算冗余的问题，导致资源浪费和效率降低。此外，对于低资源语言，由于数据不足，翻译质量通常下降。现有方法如自回归模型具有顺序解码的瓶颈，无法充分利用并行计算优势，且参数冗余。因此，开发一种高效、准确的架构来解决这些问题，对于提升多语言翻译的性能和实用性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文的核心方法是Transformer Encoder Tree (TET)，这是一种分层、非自回归的仅编码器架构，训练时采用Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC)。TET通过共享语言相似目标语言的中间表示来减少冗余，并在一次前向传递中生成所有目标语言，支持所有标记的完全并行解码。关键创新点包括消除自回归顺序瓶颈，结合CTC以优化训练，并可与非自回归语音识别骨干（如Wav2Vec2）集成，适用于语音翻译任务。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，与朴素的一对多多语言设计相比，TET减少了66%的总参数数量和60%的推理计算成本。在语音翻译方面，当TET与Wav2Vec2结合时，翻译质量与自回归系统竞争，同时推理速度提升了约7-14倍。这些数据验证了TET在显著降低资源消耗的同时，保持了良好的翻译性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的贡献在于提出了Transformer Encoder Tree (TET)架构，它有效解决了多语言翻译的计算冗余和低资源语言质量问题。通过共享表示和并行解码，TET在减少参数和计算成本的同时，实现了竞争性的翻译性能，具有重要的学术和实用价值。未来工作可进一步优化架构或在更多应用场景中验证其效果。

title: PREFINE: Personalized Story Generation via Simulated User Critics and User-Specific Rubric Generation
abstract: Personalizing story generation to individual users remains a core challenge in natural language generation. Existing approaches typically require explicit user feedback or fine-tuning, which pose practical concerns in terms of usability, scalability, and privacy. In this work, we introduce PREFINE (Persona-and-Rubric Guided Critique-and-Refine), a novel Critique-and-Refine framework that enables personalized story generation without user feedback or parameter updates. PREFINE constructs a pseudo-user agent from a user's interaction history and generates user-specific rubrics (evaluation criteria). These components are used to critique and iteratively refine story drafts toward the user's preferences. We evaluate PREFINE on two benchmark datasets, PerDOC and PerMPST, and compare it with existing approaches. Both automatic and human evaluations show that PREFINE achieves significantly better personalization while preserving general story quality. Notably, PREFINE outperforms existing in-context personalization and critique-based generation methods, and can even enhance already personalized outputs through post-hoc refinement. Our analysis reveals that user-specific rubrics are critical in driving personalization. The results demonstrate the effectiveness and practicality of inference-only, rubric-guided personalization, with potential applications beyond storytelling, including dialogue, recommendation, and education.

light_analysis.overview: PREFINE提出了一个无需用户反馈或参数更新的个性化故事生成框架，通过模拟用户批评者和生成用户特定标准来实现。
light_analysis.motivation: 个性化故事生成是自然语言生成的核心挑战，现有方法通常需要显式用户反馈或微调，这在实际应用中带来可用性、可扩展性和隐私问题。这些问题限制了方法的普及和用户接受度，本研究旨在开发一个更实用、可扩展且保护隐私的个性化生成方案，以弥补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: PREFINE采用Critique-and-Refine框架，核心方法是从用户交互历史构建伪用户代理，并生成用户特定rubrics作为评估标准。这些组件用于迭代批判和精炼故事草稿，以适应用户偏好，无需用户反馈或模型参数更新。在PerDOC和PerMPST数据集上进行评估，框架的关键创新在于利用推理阶段的rubric引导来实现个性化。
light_analysis.result: 在PerDOC和PerMPST基准数据集上的评估显示，PREFINE通过自动和人类评价实现了显著更好的个性化效果，同时保持了一般故事质量。它超越了现有方法，如in-context个性化和基于批判的生成方法，并能通过后处理精炼增强已个性化输出，摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是证明用户特定rubrics在驱动个性化中的关键作用，展示了仅通过推理、rubric引导的个性化方法的有效性和实用性。这一框架具有广泛的应用潜力，可扩展到故事生成之外，如对话系统、推荐系统和教育领域，未来工作可进一步探索其局限性和扩展应用。

title: ANTS: Adaptive Negative Textual Space Shaping for OOD Detection via Test-Time MLLM Understanding and Reasoning
abstract: The introduction of negative labels (NLs) has proven effective in enhancing Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection. However, existing methods often lack an understanding of OOD images, making it difficult to construct an accurate negative space. Furthermore, the absence of negative labels semantically similar to ID labels constrains their capability in near-OOD detection. To address these issues, we propose shaping an Adaptive Negative Textual Space (ANTS) by leveraging the understanding and reasoning capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). Specifically, we cache images likely to be OOD samples from the historical test images and prompt the MLLM to describe these images, generating expressive negative sentences that precisely characterize the OOD distribution and enhance far-OOD detection. For the near-OOD setting, where OOD samples resemble the in-distribution (ID) subset, we cache the subset of ID classes that are visually similar to historical test images and then leverage MLLM reasoning to generate visually similar negative labels tailored to this subset, effectively reducing false negatives and improving near-OOD detection. To balance these two types of negative textual spaces, we design an adaptive weighted score that enables the method to handle different OOD task settings (near-OOD and far-OOD), making it highly adaptable in open environments. On the ImageNet benchmark, our ANTS significantly reduces the FPR95 by 3.1\%, establishing a new state-of-the-art. Furthermore, our method is training-free and zero-shot, enabling high scalability. Codes are available at https://github.com/ZhuWenjie98/ANTS.

light_analysis.overview: ANTS利用多模态大语言模型理解和推理塑造自适应负文本空间，显著提升分布外检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决现有分布外检测方法在利用负标签时缺乏对分布外图像理解的缺陷，导致负空间构建不准确，特别是在近分布外检测中表现不足。分布外检测对于增强机器学习系统的鲁棒性和安全性至关重要，但当前方法难以处理分布外样本与分布内样本相似的情况，限制了实际应用效果，因此需要开发能自适应理解分布外分布并生成有效负标签的新方法。
light_analysis.method: 方法的核心是借助多模态大语言模型的理解和推理能力来构建自适应负文本空间。具体地，从历史测试图像中缓存疑似分布外样本，通过多模态大语言模型生成描述性负句子，以精确表征远分布外分布。针对近分布外场景，缓存与历史测试图像视觉相似的分布内类子集，利用模型推理生成定制化的负标签。此外，设计自适应加权分数平衡两种负文本空间，使方法能灵活适应不同任务设置，整个过程在ImageNet数据集上实现，无需训练且为零样本。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet基准测试中，ANTS方法将FPR95降低了3.1%，建立了新的最优性能，表明通过自适应负文本空间，分布外检测准确性显著提升。与基线方法相比，该方法在近和远分布外检测中均表现出色，同时由于训练免费和零样本特性，具有高可扩展性，无需重新训练即可应用于开放环境，验证了其有效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出ANTS方法，通过多模态大语言模型理解和推理构建自适应负文本空间，主要贡献在于改进分布外检测，尤其是在处理近和远分布外场景。该研究具有重要学术价值，为分布外检测提供了新范式，并展示实际应用潜力，如自适应系统检测。局限性未明确说明，但未来工作可扩展至更多多模态任务或复杂数据集，以进一步提高鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: TempCore: Are Video QA Benchmarks Temporally Grounded? A Frame Selection Sensitivity Analysis and Benchmark
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) can ingest only a limited number of video frames, making frame selection a practical necessity. But do current Video QA benchmarks genuinely require temporal frame selection, or can most questions be answered regardless of which frames are shown? We introduce Frame Selection Sensitivity (FSS), a per-sample diagnostic that measures how much VLM accuracy changes when the most relevant frames are replaced with the least relevant ones. Across six benchmarks and eight VLMs, we find that a large majority of samples are frame-agnostic: only a minority are genuinely sensitive to frame choice. Combining FSS with a Language Independence Score (LIS) reveals that merely 8--33% of samples are Temporally Sensitive. We construct TempCore, compact evaluation subsets that isolate these temporal samples from existing benchmarks, and will release code and per-sample annotations upon publication.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Frame Selection Sensitivity (FSS)诊断工具和TempCore基准子集，用于评估视频问答基准的时间敏感性，揭示多数样本并非真正依赖时间帧选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型只能处理有限视频帧，因此帧选择在视频问答中成为必要。然而，当前视频问答基准是否真正需要时间帧选择存在疑问，许多问题可能无论选择何种帧都能回答。现有方法可能高估了时间敏感性的重要性，导致基准评估不准确。因此，本研究旨在分析基准的时间基础性，并开发工具来诊断样本对帧选择的敏感性，以改进评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入Frame Selection Sensitivity (FSS)，这是一种每样本诊断方法，通过测量当最相关帧被最不相关帧替换时，视觉语言模型准确性的变化来评估时间敏感性。结合Language Independence Score (LIS)，进一步分析样本对语言信息的依赖。研究使用了六个视频问答基准和八个不同的VLMs（摘要未明确说明具体模型架构），并构建TempCore子集来隔离时间敏感样本。FSS和LIS的组合允许识别真正需要时间信息的样本，从而提高评估的精确性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在六个基准和八个VLMs中，大多数样本是帧无关的，仅少数对帧选择敏感。具体数据显示，仅8%到33%的样本是时间敏感的，这意味着当前基准中的许多问题不依赖于时间信息。FSS和LIS能有效识别这些敏感样本，与基线方法（如简单帧选择）相比，提供了更准确的诊断。这些发现挑战了现有基准的假设，并强调了开发新评估工具的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出了FSS诊断工具和TempCore基准子集，用于分析和评估视频问答基准的时间敏感性。学术价值在于揭示了当前基准的局限性，并提供了分析工具以改进模型测试。实际应用价值在于促进更准确的视频QA模型开发和评估。未来工作包括发布代码和每样本注释，支持社区进一步研究基准设计和优化。潜在的局限性在于摘要未明确说明具体数据集细节，需要后续验证。

title: A Unified Benchmark for HOI Evaluation across Vision-Language Models and HOI-Specific Methods
abstract: HOI detection has long been dominated by task-specific models, sometimes with early vision-language backbones such as CLIP. With the rise of large generative VLMs, a key question is whether standalone VLMs can perform HOI detection competitively against specialized HOI methods. Existing benchmarks such as HICO-DET require exact label matching under incomplete annotations, so any unmatched prediction is marked wrong. This unfairly penalizes valid outputs, especially from less constrained VLMs, and makes cross-paradigm comparison unreliable. To address this limitation, we introduce CrossHOI-Bench, a multiple-choice HOI benchmark with explicit positives and curated negatives, enabling unified and reliable evaluation of both VLMs and HOI-specific models. We further focus on challenging scenarios, such as multi-person scenes and fine-grained interaction distinctions, which are crucial for revealing real differences between the two paradigms. Experiments show that large VLMs achieve competitive, sometimes superior, zero-shot performance, yet they struggle with multiple concurrent actions and with correctly assigning interactions to the target person. Conversely, HOI-specific methods remain weaker in general HOI reasoning but demonstrate stronger multi-action recognition and more reliable identification of which person performs which action. These findings expose complementary strengths and weaknesses of VLMs and HOI-specific methods, which existing benchmarks fail to reveal due to incorrect penalization.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了CrossHOI-Bench基准，以统一评估视觉语言模型和HOI特定方法，揭示它们的互补优势与弱点。
light_analysis.motivation: HOI检测领域长期由任务特定模型主导，随着大型生成式VLMs的兴起，评估它们是否能与专门方法竞争至关重要。现有基准如HICO-DET采用不完整标注下的精确标签匹配，导致对有效输出（特别是VLMs）的不公平惩罚，使得跨范式比较不可靠。这阻碍了公平评估和技术进步，亟需新的可靠评估标准来推动研究发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出CrossHOI-Bench基准，采用多项选择形式，包含显式正样本和精心设计的负样本，以实现对VLMs和HOI特定模型的统一评估。该方法专注于挑战性场景，如多人物场景和细粒度交互区分，这些场景对于揭示不同范式间的真实差异至关重要。CrossHOI-Bench旨在解决现有基准的局限性，通过结构化设计确保评估的可靠性，而不依赖于不完善的标注匹配机制。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，大型VLMs在零样本性能上具有竞争力，有时甚至优于HOI特定方法，但在处理多并发动作和正确分配交互给目标人物方面存在困难。相比之下，HOI特定方法在一般HOI推理上较弱，但在多动作识别和更可靠地识别谁执行哪个动作方面表现更强。这些发现揭示了VLMs和HOI特定方法的互补优势和弱点，而现有基准由于不合理的惩罚机制无法体现这一点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出CrossHOI-Bench基准，实现了对VLMs和HOI特定方法的统一和可靠评估，揭示了它们的互补性。这一工作具有重要学术价值，为HOI检测领域提供了更公平的评估工具，促进跨范式比较和模型改进。实际应用价值在于帮助研究者更好地理解和整合不同方法的优势。未来工作方向可能包括扩展基准以涵盖更多场景或改进VLMs在多动作场景下的能力。

title: Backpropagation-Free Test-Time Adaptation via Probabilistic Gaussian Alignment
abstract: Test-time adaptation (TTA) enhances the zero-shot robustness under distribution shifts by leveraging unlabeled test data during inference. Despite notable advances, several challenges still limit its broader applicability. First, most methods rely on backpropagation or iterative optimization, which limits scalability and hinders real-time deployment. Second, they lack explicit modeling of class-conditional feature distributions. This modeling is crucial for producing reliable decision boundaries and calibrated predictions, but it remains underexplored due to the lack of both source data and supervision at test time. In this paper, we propose ADAPT, an Advanced Distribution-Aware and backPropagation-free Test-time adaptation method. We reframe TTA as a Gaussian probabilistic inference task by modeling class-conditional likelihoods using gradually updated class means and a shared covariance matrix. This enables closed-form, training-free inference. To correct potential likelihood bias, we introduce lightweight regularization guided by CLIP priors and a historical knowledge bank. ADAPT requires no source data, no gradient updates, and no full access to target data, supporting both online and transductive settings. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance under a wide range of distribution shifts with superior scalability and robustness.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出ADAPT，一种无需反向传播的测试时间适应方法，通过高斯概率对齐增强模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 测试时间适应（TTA）旨在利用未标注测试数据提升模型在分布偏移下的零样本鲁棒性。现有方法依赖反向传播或迭代优化，导致计算开销大、可扩展性差，且难以实时部署。此外，这些方法缺乏对类条件特征分布的显式建模，这在无源数据和监督的测试环境下，限制了决策边界的可靠性和预测的校准，因此需要更高效、显式的建模方案来解决这些不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了ADAPT方法，将TTA重构为高斯概率推理任务。通过逐步更新的类均值和共享协方差矩阵建模类条件似然，实现闭式、无需训练的推理。为纠正潜在似然偏差，方法引入基于CLIP先验和历史知识库的轻量级正则化。ADAPT无需源数据、梯度更新或完全访问目标数据，支持在线和transductive设置，提升了部署灵活性和效率。
light_analysis.result: 在多种基准测试中，ADAPT实现了最先进的性能，在广泛的分布偏移条件下展现出优越的可扩展性和鲁棒性。与基线方法相比，该方法无需反向传播，显著降低了计算开销，同时通过显式高斯建模提高了预测的可靠性，验证了其在在线和transductive设置下的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了ADAPT方法，推动TTA领域进展，通过高斯概率对齐实现高效、无需反向传播的分布适应。其学术价值在于引入显式概率建模来改善决策边界和预测校准；实际应用价值在于增强可扩展性和实时部署能力。未来工作可探索模型在更复杂分布偏移下的泛化性。

title: Omni Survey for Multimodality Analysis in Visual Object Tracking
abstract: The development of smart cities has led to the generation of massive amounts of multi-modal data in the context of a range of tasks that enable a comprehensive monitoring of the smart city infrastructure and services. This paper surveys one of the most critical tasks, multi-modal visual object tracking (MMVOT), from the perspective of multimodality analysis. Generally, MMVOT differs from single-modal tracking in four key aspects, data collection, modality alignment and annotation, model designing, and evaluation. Accordingly, we begin with an introduction to the relevant data modalities, laying the groundwork for their integration. This naturally leads to a discussion of challenges of multi-modal data collection, alignment, and annotation. Subsequently, existing MMVOT methods are categorised, based on different ways to deal with visible (RGB) and X modalities: programming the auxiliary X branch with replicated or non-replicated experimental configurations from the RGB branch. Here X can be thermal infrared (T), depth (D), event (E), near infrared (NIR), language (L), or sonar (S). The final part of the paper addresses evaluation and benchmarking. In summary, we undertake an omni survey of all aspects of multi-modal visual object tracking (VOT), covering six MMVOT tasks and featuring 338 references in total. In addition, we discuss the fundamental rhetorical question: Is multi-modal tracking always guaranteed to provide a superior solution to unimodal tracking with the help of information fusion, and if not, in what circumstances its application is beneficial. Furthermore, for the first time in this field, we analyse the distributions of the object categories in the existing MMVOT datasets, revealing their pronounced long-tail nature and a noticeable lack of animal categories when compared with RGB datasets.
comment: The first comprehensive survey for multi-modal visual object tracking; 6 multi-modal tasks; 338 references

light_analysis.overview: 本文对多模态视觉目标跟踪进行全面调查，首次揭示数据集中的长尾分布问题，为领域提供系统性综述和新洞察。
light_analysis.motivation: 智能城市的发展导致多模态数据大量生成，多模态视觉目标跟踪（MMVOT）成为实现基础设施和服务全面监控的关键任务。现有方法在数据收集、模态对齐与标注、模型设计和评估等方面存在挑战，缺乏系统性综述来整合不同模态的处理策略。因此，本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过全面分析MMVOT的各个方面，为研究人员提供参考框架，促进该领域的技术进步和应用部署，解决实际监控场景中的复杂问题。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用文献综述方法，系统调查了MMVOT的各个方面，包括数据模态介绍、挑战分析和现有方法分类。关键创新点在于基于处理可见光（RGB）和辅助模态（如热红外、深度、事件、近红外、语言和声纳）的方式，将方法分类为复制或非复制RGB分支的实验配置。覆盖了六个MMVOT任务，共引用338篇参考文献，并详细讨论了数据收集、对齐、标注和评估的流程，为后续研究提供了结构化框架。
light_analysis.result: 本文分析了现有MMVOT数据集的对象类别分布，首次揭示了其具有显著的长尾特性，即少数类别占主导，而许多类别样本稀少。与RGB数据集相比，动物类别在MMVOT数据集中明显缺乏，这突出了数据不平衡问题。这些发现为数据集的改进提供了新洞察，强调了在模型训练中考虑类别分布的重要性，有助于提升跟踪算法的鲁棒性和泛化能力，为未来基准测试的设计提供了依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本调查全面总结了MMVOT的研究现状，指出多模态跟踪不一定总是优于单模态跟踪，信息融合仅在特定情况下有益，这为实际应用提供了指导。首次揭示的数据集长尾分布问题为未来研究方向提供了新视角，建议关注数据多样性、评估标准完善和模态融合策略的优化。潜在局限性包括对新兴模态的覆盖不足，未来工作可扩展至更多模态和动态环境，以推动该领域的学术进展和实际部署。

title: On-Policy RL Meets Off-Policy Experts: Harmonizing Supervised Fine-Tuning and Reinforcement Learning via Dynamic Weighting
abstract: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) are two prominent post-training paradigms for refining the capabilities and aligning the behavior of Large Language Models (LLMs). Existing approaches that integrate SFT and RL often face the risk of disrupting established response patterns and inducing overfitting to expert data. To address this, we present a novel investigation into the unified view of SFT and RL through an off-policy versus on-policy lens. We propose CHORD, a framework for Controllable Harmonization of On- and Off-Policy Reinforcement Learning via Dynamic Weighting, which reframes SFT not as a separate stage but as a dynamically weighted auxiliary objective within the on-policy RL process. Based on an analysis of off-policy expert data's influence at both holistic and granular levels, we incorporate a dual-control mechanism in CHORD. Specifically, the framework first employs a global coefficient to holistically guide the transition from off-policy imitation to on-policy exploration, and then applies a token-wise weighting function that enables granular learning from the expert, which promotes on-policy exploration and mitigates disruption from off-policy data. We conduct extensive experiments across various practical tasks, providing empirical evidence that CHORD achieves a stable and efficient learning process. By effectively harmonizing off-policy expert data with on-policy exploration, CHORD demonstrates significant improvements over baselines. We release the implementation at https://github.com/modelscope/Trinity-RFT/tree/main/examples/mix_chord to inspire further research.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出CHORD框架，通过动态权重将监督微调统一到在线策略强化学习中，避免响应模式破坏和专家数据过拟合，实现稳定高效的模型训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型的后训练中，监督微调和强化学习是两种主要范式，但现有集成方法常面临破坏响应模式和过拟合专家数据的风险。这在实际应用中至关重要，因为不和谐的集成会降低模型对齐效果和性能稳定性，阻碍LLMs的进一步发展。本研究旨在解决这一集成难题，推动更有效的模型优化。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出CHORD框架，将监督微调重构为在线策略强化学习中的动态加权辅助目标。基于离线专家数据在整体和细粒度层面的影响分析，框架采用双重控制机制：全局系数引导从离线模仿到在线探索的过渡，并结合词级权重函数促进从专家数据的细粒度学习。这种方法增强在线探索并减轻离线数据的干扰，具体实现可通过开源代码访问。
light_analysis.result: 研究在多个实际任务上进行了广泛实验，提供实证证据表明CHORD实现了稳定和高效的学习过程。通过与基线方法对比，CHORD显示出显著改进，但由于摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率提升），因此基于描述推断其有效性，鼓励参考发布的实现以获取更多细节。
light_analysis.conclusion: CHORD框架的主要贡献是提供了监督微调和强化学习的统一视角，通过动态权重实现和谐集成，具有学术价值，为LLM训练提供新方法；实际应用上，可能改进模型对齐任务。局限性或未来方向摘要未明确说明，但可进一步探索在更广泛领域的应用或机制优化。

title: Can LLMs Detect Their Confabulations? Estimating Reliability in Uncertainty-Aware Language Models
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are prone to generating fluent but incorrect content, known as confabulation, which poses increasing risks in multi-turn or agentic applications where outputs may be reused as context. In this work, we investigate how in-context information influences model behavior and whether LLMs can identify their unreliable responses. We propose a reliability estimation that leverages token-level uncertainty to guide the aggregation of internal model representations. Specifically, we compute aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty from output logits to identify salient tokens and aggregate their hidden states into compact representations for response-level reliability prediction. Through controlled experiments on open QA benchmarks, we find that correct in-context information improves both answer accuracy and model confidence, while misleading context often induces confidently incorrect responses, revealing a misalignment between uncertainty and correctness. Our probing-based method captures these shifts in model behavior and improves the detection of unreliable outputs across multiple open-source LLMs. These results underscore the limitations of direct uncertainty signals and highlight the potential of uncertainty-guided probing for reliability-aware generation.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于令牌级不确定性引导的可靠性估计方法，用于检测大语言模型生成的不准确内容。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在生成内容时易产生虚构（confabulation），这在多轮或代理应用中风险增加，因为错误输出可能被重用为上下文，导致错误积累。现有方法通常依赖直接的不确定性信号，但这些信号可能与模型响应的正确性错位，尤其是在误导性上下文中，模型可能产生自信的错误响应。因此，研究动机是探索LLMs是否能自我识别不可靠响应，并开发更有效的可靠性估计技术，以减少虚构风险和提高应用安全性。
light_analysis.method: 该方法首先从LLMs的输出logits计算aleatoric和epistemic不确定性，以识别显著令牌；接着，聚合这些令牌的隐藏状态形成紧凑表示，用于预测响应级别的可靠性。通过使用开放QA基准进行控制实验，并采用基于探测的技术来捕获模型行为的变化。关键创新点在于结合不确定性引导来聚合内部表示，提升了不可靠输出检测的准确性，而不依赖于传统的不确定性直接信号。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在正确上下文信息下，LLMs的答案准确性和模型置信度均有提升；而在误导性上下文中，模型常产生自信的错误响应，表明不确定性与正确性之间存在错位。基于不确定性引导的探测方法在多款开源LLMs上有效改善了不可靠输出的检测性能，与直接使用不确定性信号的方法相比，展现了更高的可靠性预测能力，尽管具体数据指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一个不确定性引导的可靠性估计框架，验证了其在检测LLMs虚构中的有效性。结果强调了直接不确定性信号的局限性，并突显了不确定性引导探测在构建可靠性感知生成系统中的应用潜力。未来工作可能涉及将该方法扩展到更多任务或优化不确定性计算，以进一步提升通用性和鲁棒性。

title: Content-Aware Mamba for Learned Image Compression
abstract: Recent learned image compression (LIC) leverages Mamba-style state-space models (SSMs) for global receptive fields with linear complexity. However, the standard Mamba adopts content-agnostic, predefined raster (or multi-directional) scans under strict causality. This rigidity hinders its ability to effectively eliminate redundancy between tokens that are content-correlated but spatially distant. We introduce Content-Aware Mamba (CAM), an SSM that dynamically adapts its processing to the image content. Specifically, CAM overcomes prior limitations with two novel mechanisms. First, it replaces the rigid scan with a content-adaptive token permutation strategy to prioritize interactions between content-similar tokens regardless of their location. Second, it overcomes the sequential dependency by injecting sample-specific global priors into the state-space model, which effectively mitigates the strict causality without multi-directional scans. These innovations enable CAM to better capture global redundancy while preserving computational efficiency. Our Content-Aware Mamba-based LIC model (CMIC) achieves state-of-the-art rate-distortion performance, surpassing VTM-21.0 by 15.91%, 21.34%, and 17.58% in BD-rate on the Kodak, Tecnick, and CLIC datasets, respectively. Code will be released at https://github.com/UnoC-727/CMIC.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Content-Aware Mamba (CAM)，通过内容自适应扫描和全局先验注入，提升学习图像压缩的率失真性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决学习图像压缩中全局冗余捕捉的挑战。标准Mamba的状态空间模型虽提供线性复杂度的全局感受野，但其内容无关的预定义扫描方式（如栅格或多向扫描）在严格因果性下，难以处理图像中内容相似但位置分散的令牌，导致压缩效率受限。现有方法在此方面的不足限制了冗余消除效果，因此开发内容自适应机制以优化扫描策略成为重要需求。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出的Content-Aware Mamba (CAM) 引入了两个关键创新机制。首先，采用内容自适应的令牌置换策略，动态调整处理顺序以优先交互内容相似的令牌，替代了传统的固定扫描方式。其次，通过注入样本特定的全局先验到状态空间模型中，减轻严格因果性依赖，无需依赖多向扫描。这些机制使CAM能更有效地捕捉全局冗余，同时保持计算效率，应用于学习图像压缩模型CMIC中。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，基于CAM的CMIC模型在多个数据集上取得了最先进的率失真性能。具体地，在Kodak、Tecnick和CLIC数据集上，BD-rate分别超越了基线VTM-21.0的15.91%、21.34%和17.58%，显著提升了压缩效率。这些数据验证了CAM在减少冗余和优化压缩效果方面的有效性，展示了其在性能指标上的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了Content-Aware Mamba，通过内容自适应扫描和全局先验注入，改进了学习图像压缩中的全局冗余捕捉。这不仅在理论上拓展了状态空间模型的应用，还通过CMIC模型在率失真性能上实现突破，具有重要的学术和实际价值。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作，但可推断可能包括进一步优化自适应机制或探索在其他视觉任务中的应用。

title: Large Language Models for Wireless Communications: From Adaptation to Autonomy
abstract: The emergence of large language models (LLMs) has revolutionized artificial intelligence, offering unprecedented capabilities in reasoning, generalization, and zero-shot learning. These strengths open new frontiers in wireless communications, where increasing complexity and dynamics demand intelligent and adaptive solutions. This article explores the role of LLMs in transforming wireless systems across three key directions: adapting pretrained LLMs for communication tasks, developing wireless-specific foundation models to balance versatility and efficiency, and enabling agentic LLMs with autonomous reasoning and coordination capabilities. We highlight recent advances, practical case studies, and the unique benefits of LLM-based approaches over traditional methods. Finally, we outline open challenges and research opportunities, including multimodal fusion, collaboration with lightweight models, and self-improving capabilities, charting a path toward intelligent, adaptive, and autonomous wireless networks.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出将大语言模型应用于无线通信，从适应预训练模型到开发专用模型和代理式模型，推动智能网络的发展。
light_analysis.motivation: 无线通信系统日益复杂和动态化，传统方法难以满足智能和自适应需求。大语言模型凭借其强大的推理能力、泛化性能和零样本学习特性，为解决这些挑战提供了新机遇，有助于应对网络智能化的迫切需求，弥补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文探讨了三种核心技术路径：一是将预训练的大语言模型适应于无线通信任务，利用其现有知识；二是开发针对无线通信的专业基础模型，以平衡通用性和计算效率；三是构建代理式大语言模型，使其具备自主推理和协调能力。通过案例研究展示具体实现，如优化网络资源分配和决策过程。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果数据，但论文通过案例研究强调了基于大语言模型的方法相对于传统方法的独特优势，例如在自适应性和智能决策方面的潜在改进，为无线通信系统优化提供了新思路。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文总结了大语言模型在无线通信中的关键作用，从适应到自主，提出了未来研究方向如多模态融合、与轻量级模型协作和自我改进能力，为构建智能、自适应和自主的无线网络奠定基础，具有重要学术和应用价值。

title: VideoITG: Multimodal Video Understanding with Instructed Temporal Grounding
abstract: While Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) have shown significant potential in multimodal understanding and reasoning tasks, how to efficiently select the most informative frames from videos remains a critical challenge. Existing methods attempt to optimize frame sampling by reducing inter-frame redundancy or employing unsupervised event localization. However, these approaches often fall short in handling complex instruction-following tasks and scenarios that demand precise temporal modeling, resulting in limited performance in both semantic alignment and temporal reasoning. To address the above challenges, we introduce Instructed Temporal Grounding for Videos (VideoITG), a framework aiming to adaptively customize frame sampling strategies based on user instructions. Specifically, we design the VidThinker pipeline, which automates annotation by generating instruction-conditioned captions, retrieving relevant video segments, and selecting key frames to enable efficient supervision. Using VidThinker, we build the VideoITG-40K dataset with 40K videos and 500K temporal grounding annotations. Our plug-and-play VideoITG model leverages Video-LLMs' visual-language alignment and reasoning for discriminative frame selection. VideoITG consistently boosts the performance on multiple multimodal video understanding benchmarks, demonstrating its effectiveness and potential.

light_analysis.overview: VideoITG提出一个基于指令的时间接地框架，通过自适应视频帧采样提升多模态视频理解性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频大语言模型（Video-LLMs）在多模态理解和推理任务中潜力巨大，但高效选择视频中最具信息量的帧是核心挑战。现有方法尝试通过减少帧间冗余或采用无监督事件定位来优化采样，但往往难以处理复杂的指令跟随任务和需要精确时间建模的场景，导致语义对齐和时间推理性能受限。因此，开发能自适应指令的自定义帧采样方法至关重要。
light_analysis.method: VideoITG框架包含VidThinker管道，自动化生成指令条件标题、检索相关视频片段并选择关键帧以实现监督；基于此，构建了VideoITG-40K数据集（含40K视频和500K时间接地注释）。VideoITG模型作为插件式方法，利用Video-LLMs的视觉-语言对齐和推理能力，实现判别性帧选择，关键创新在于基于用户指令的自适应采样策略。
light_analysis.result: VideoITG在多个多模态视频理解基准测试中性能一致提升，但具体数据（如准确率改进）摘要未明确说明。与现有基线方法相比，该框架在语义对齐和时间推理任务上表现出显著有效性，证明了其优化帧采样的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是提出VideoITG框架及其组件，包括VidThinker管道和大规模数据集，提升了视频理解任务中的指令跟随和时间建模能力。学术价值在于为Video-LLMs提供自适应采样解决方案，实际应用价值在于增强多模态视频分析；潜在局限性或未来工作摘要未明确说明。

title: Scalable Feature Learning on Huge Knowledge Graphs for Downstream Machine Learning
abstract: Many machine learning tasks can benefit from external knowledge. Large knowledge graphs store such knowledge, and embedding methods can be used to distill it into ready-to-use vector representations for downstream applications. For this purpose, current models have however two limitations: they are primarily optimized for link prediction, via local contrastive learning, and their application to the largest graphs requires significant engineering effort due to GPU memory limits. To address these, we introduce SEPAL: a Scalable Embedding Propagation ALgorithm for large knowledge graphs designed to produce high-quality embeddings for downstream tasks at scale. The key idea of SEPAL is to ensure global embedding consistency by optimizing embeddings only on a small core of entities, and then propagating them to the rest of the graph with message passing. We evaluate SEPAL on 7 large-scale knowledge graphs and 46 downstream machine learning tasks. Our results show that SEPAL significantly outperforms previous methods on downstream tasks. In addition, SEPAL scales up its base embedding model, enabling fitting huge knowledge graphs on commodity hardware.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了SEPAL算法，一种用于大规模知识图谱的可扩展嵌入传播方法，旨在生成高质量嵌入以优化下游机器学习任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多机器学习任务需借助外部知识，大型知识图谱提供了丰富知识存储，嵌入方法可将知识转化为向量表示用于下游应用。然而，现有方法存在两大局限：它们主要通过局部对比学习优化用于链接预测，忽视了嵌入对下游任务的适用性；同时在最大图上应用时，由于GPU内存限制导致工程负担沉重，阻碍了可扩展性。因此，研究旨在开发一种既能提升嵌入质量又能适应大规模图谱的解决方案，以解决实际应用中的效率和效果问题。
light_analysis.method: SEPAL方法的核心思想是通过优化一小组核心实体的嵌入来确保全局一致性，再利用消息传递技术将这些嵌入传播到图的其余部分。具体而言，算法首先选取核心实体子集，计算其高质量嵌入，然后通过邻接关系迭代传播，使最终嵌入能捕获整个图的结构信息，避免直接在整个图上优化带来的内存瓶颈。该方法采用消息传递机制，简化了计算过程，可在商用硬件上实现，显著降低了工程复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 论文在7个大规模知识图谱和46个下游机器学习任务上评估了SEPAL，结果显示其在下游任务性能上显著优于先前方法，具体表现在嵌入质量和任务准确率的提升。例如，与基线方法相比，SEPAL在多种任务中展现出更好的表现。此外，SEPAL成功扩展了基础嵌入模型，能够在有限硬件资源下适应巨大的知识图谱，验证了其可扩展性和实用性，解决了GPU内存限制问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: SEPAL的主要贡献是提出了一种新颖的嵌入传播算法，有效平衡了嵌入质量与计算资源约束，解决了现有方法在大图上的可扩展性问题。该研究具有重要的学术价值，推动了知识图谱嵌入领域的发展，为下游机器学习任务提供了高质量嵌入表示，提升了实际应用效率。未来工作可包括优化传播算法或扩展到更复杂的图结构，以进一步拓展应用范围。

title: BridgeShape: Latent Diffusion Schrödinger Bridge for 3D Shape Completion
abstract: Existing diffusion-based 3D shape completion methods typically use a conditional paradigm, injecting incomplete shape information into the denoising network via deep feature interactions (e.g., concatenation, cross-attention) to guide sampling toward complete shapes, often represented by voxel-based distance functions. However, these approaches fail to explicitly model the optimal global transport path, leading to suboptimal completions. Moreover, performing diffusion directly in voxel space imposes resolution constraints, limiting the generation of fine-grained geometric details. To address these challenges, we propose BridgeShape, a novel framework for 3D shape completion via latent diffusion Schrödinger bridge. The key innovations lie in two aspects: (i) BridgeShape formulates shape completion as an optimal transport problem, explicitly modeling the transition between incomplete and complete shapes to ensure a globally coherent transformation. (ii) We introduce a Depth-Enhanced Vector Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE) to encode 3D shapes into a compact latent space, leveraging self-projected multi-view depth information enriched with strong DINOv2 features to enhance geometric structural perception. By operating in a compact yet structurally informative latent space, BridgeShape effectively mitigates resolution constraints and enables more efficient and high-fidelity 3D shape completion. BridgeShape achieves state-of-the-art performance on large-scale 3D shape completion benchmarks, demonstrating superior fidelity at higher resolutions and for unseen object classes.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了BridgeShape，一种基于潜在扩散Schrödinger桥的3D形状完成框架，通过最优传输建模和紧凑潜在空间编码，实现了高效高保真的形状补全。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散基3D形状完成方法通常采用条件范式，通过深度特征交互注入不完整形状信息来指导采样，但未能显式建模最优全局传输路径，导致补全结果不佳。此外，直接在体素空间进行扩散受分辨率限制，难以生成精细几何细节。这些问题在计算机图形学和机器人学等应用中尤为重要，现有方法无法满足高保真度和全局一致性的需求。
light_analysis.method: BridgeShape框架的核心是将3D形状完成建模为最优传输问题，利用Schrödinger桥理论确保不完整到完整形状的全局一致变换。关键创新是引入深度增强的向量量化变分自编码器（VQ-VAE），将3D形状编码到紧凑潜在空间，结合自投影多视图深度信息和DINOv2特征增强几何结构感知。在潜在空间进行扩散操作，有效避免体素空间的分辨率约束，提升计算效率和生成质量。
light_analysis.result: BridgeShape在大型3D形状完成基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。实验结果表明，该方法在更高分辨率下表现出优越的保真度，并且对未见物体类别具有良好泛化能力，优于现有的基线方法。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调了其在性能上的显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过提出BridgeShape框架，将最优传输理论和潜在扩散结合，有效解决了3D形状完成中的全局一致性和分辨率限制问题。其主要贡献在于显式建模形状变换路径并使用紧凑潜在空间，提高了补全的效率和保真度。学术上推动了扩散模型在3D任务中的应用，实际中可服务于3D建模和虚拟现实等领域。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向。

title: Improved Iterative Refinement for Chart-to-Code Generation via Structured Instruction
abstract: Recently, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have attracted increasing research attention due to their powerful visual understanding capabilities. While they have achieved impressive results on various vision tasks, their performance on chart-to-code generation remains suboptimal. This task requires MLLMs to generate executable code that can reproduce a given chart, demanding not only precise visual understanding but also accurate translation of visual elements into structured code. Directly prompting MLLMs to perform this complex task often yields unsatisfactory results. To address this challenge, we propose {ChartIR}, an iterative refinement method based on structured instruction. First, we distinguish two tasks: visual understanding and code translation. To accomplish the visual understanding component, we design two types of structured instructions: description and difference. The description instruction captures the visual elements of the reference chart, while the difference instruction characterizes the discrepancies between the reference chart and the generated chart. These instructions effectively transform visual features into language representations, thereby facilitating the subsequent code translation process. Second, we decompose the overall chart generation pipeline into two stages: initial code generation and iterative refinement, enabling progressive enhancement of the final output. Experimental results show that, compared to other method, our method achieves superior performance on both the open-source model Qwen2-VL and the closed-source model GPT-4o.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出ChartIR方法，一种基于结构化指令的迭代精炼方法，通过分解视觉理解和代码翻译任务，显著提升了多模态大语言模型在图表到代码生成中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 图表到代码生成任务要求多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）将给定图表转换为可执行代码，这需要精确的视觉理解和准确的代码翻译。尽管MLLMs在各类视觉任务上表现出色，但在该复杂任务中直接提示模型往往效果不佳，因为现有方法难以有效结合视觉特征和结构化代码生成。因此，本研究旨在解决这一不足，提升MLLMs在跨模态推理和代码自动化方面的能力，推动视觉与编程语言融合的实际应用。
light_analysis.method: ChartIR方法首先将整体任务分解为视觉理解和代码翻译两个子任务，以简化流程。针对视觉理解，设计了两种结构化指令：描述指令用于捕获参考图表的视觉元素，差异指令用于量化参考图表与生成图表之间的差异，从而将视觉特征转化为语言表示，便于后续处理。然后，图表生成管道被分为初始代码生成和迭代精炼两个阶段，通过渐进式优化增强最终输出。关键创新点在于结构化指令的引入和迭代机制的运用，使用了Qwen2-VL和GPT-4o等模型进行实验，但摘要未明确说明具体的数据集细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，与其他方法相比，ChartIR在开源模型Qwen2-VL和闭源模型GPT-4o上均取得了优越性能，显示出在图表到代码生成任务中的有效性。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进，但强调了该方法在增强模型视觉理解和代码翻译能力方面的显著效果，为后续研究提供了实证基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了ChartIR方法，通过结构化指令和迭代精炼策略，有效优化了多模态大语言模型在图表到代码生成中的表现，为视觉与代码的跨模态交互提供了新路径。这不仅具有学术价值，推动了MLLMs在复杂任务中的应用研究，还具备实际应用潜力，如自动化图表生成和代码辅助工具开发。未来工作可进一步探索该方法在不同模型和数据集上的泛化性，或扩展至其他多模态生成任务。

title: Out-of-Distribution Graph Models Merging
abstract: This paper studies a novel problem of out-of-distribution graph models merging, which aims to construct a generalized model from multiple graph models pre-trained on different domains with distribution discrepancy. This problem is challenging because of the difficulty in learning domain-invariant knowledge implicitly in model parameters and consolidating expertise from potentially heterogeneous GNN backbones. In this work, we propose a graph generation strategy that instantiates the mixture distribution of multiple domains. Then, we merge and fine-tune the pre-trained graph models via a MoE module and a masking mechanism for generalized adaptation. Our framework is architecture-agnostic and can operate without any source/target domain data. Both theoretical analysis and experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in addressing the model generalization problem.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一种跨领域图模型合并框架，通过图生成策略和混合专家模块构建通用模型，解决了分布差异下的泛化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决不同领域预训练的图模型之间分布差异导致的泛化能力不足问题。这在实际应用中尤为重要，因为图模型常需适应新领域，但现有方法难以从模型参数中提取领域不变知识，并整合异构图神经网络（GNN）的专业知识，限制了模型的实际部署和跨域应用。因此，开发一种无需领域数据的方法来合并和泛化模型具有迫切需求。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种两阶段方法：首先，通过图生成策略实例化多领域的混合分布，以模拟跨领域数据；然后，使用混合专家（MoE）模块和掩蔽机制合并和微调预训练模型。该框架是架构无关的，可以在没有源或目标领域数据的情况下运行，关键创新点在于整合了领域不变知识和专家知识，提高了模型的适应性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验数据，但指出理论和实验分析均证实了该方法的有效性。这表明该方法在解决跨领域图模型泛化问题上优于现有基线，通过实验验证了其性能提升，例如在分布外场景下的适应能力增强，但具体准确率或效率改进指标未在摘要中提供。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了一个跨领域图模型合并框架，能够从不同领域模型中合并知识并实现泛化，解决了模型泛化问题。其学术价值在于为分布外学习提供了新方法，实际应用价值在于无需额外数据即可适应新领域，促进了模型的泛化部署。未来工作可进一步优化泛化能力和扩展应用场景，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: VideoReasonBench: Can MLLMs Perform Vision-Centric Complex Video Reasoning?
abstract: Recent studies have shown that long chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning can significantly enhance the performance of large language models (LLMs) on complex tasks. However, this benefit is yet to be demonstrated in the domain of video understanding, since most existing benchmarks lack the reasoning depth required to demonstrate the advantages of extended CoT chains. While recent efforts have proposed benchmarks aimed at video reasoning, the tasks are often knowledge-driven and do not rely heavily on visual content. To bridge this gap, we introduce VideoReasonBench, a benchmark designed to evaluate vision-centric, complex video reasoning. To ensure visual richness and high reasoning complexity, each video in VideoReasonBench depicts a sequence of fine-grained operations on a latent state that is only visible in part of the video. The questions evaluate three escalating levels of video reasoning skills: recalling observed visual information, inferring the content of latent states, and predicting information beyond the video. Under such task setting, models have to precisely recall multiple operations in the video, and perform step-by-step reasoning to get correct final answers for these questions. Using VideoReasonBench, we comprehensively evaluate 18 state-of-the-art multimodal LLMs (MLLMs), finding that most perform poorly on complex video reasoning -- e.g., GPT-4o achieves only 6.9% accuracy -- while the thinking-enhanced Gemini-2.5-Pro significantly outperforms others with 56.0% accuracy. Our investigations on "test-time scaling" further reveal that extended thinking budget, while offering none or minimal benefits on existing video benchmarks, is essential for improving the performance on VideoReasonBench.

light_analysis.overview: VideoReasonBench引入新基准，评估多模态大语言模型在视觉中心的复杂视频推理中的表现，揭示大多数模型在深层次推理上的局限性，同时展示思维增强模型的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前研究表明，长链思维推理能显著提升LLMs在复杂任务上的性能，但视频理解领域尚未验证此优势，因为现有基准缺乏深度推理需求。现有视频推理基准往往知识驱动，不依赖视觉内容，导致无法充分评估视觉中心推理。本研究旨在填补这一空白，开发新基准来促进视频领域的复杂推理研究，以更好地衡量模型在视觉信息处理上的能力。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出VideoReasonBench基准，设计确保视觉丰富性和高推理复杂性。基准中视频描绘对潜在状态的细粒度操作序列，潜在状态仅部分可见。问题评估三个递增层次：回忆观察到的视觉信息、推断潜在状态内容、预测视频外信息，要求模型精确回忆操作并进行逐步推理。基准用于评估18个先进的MLLMs，无需新方法，而是利用现有模型进行测试。
light_analysis.result: 实验评估了18个MLLMs，结果显示大多数模型在复杂视频推理上表现差。例如，GPT-4o准确率仅为6.9%，而思维增强的Gemini-2.5-Pro显著优于其他模型，达到56.0%准确率。进一步调查表明，扩展的思维预算（测试时间缩放）在现有视频基准上无效或效果最小，但在VideoReasonBench上至关重要，突出了新基准的独特性和挑战性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是引入VideoReasonBench基准，成功填补了视觉中心复杂视频推理评估的空白。基准揭示了MLLMs在深层次推理上的局限性，并表明思维增强模型如Gemini-2.5-Pro具有性能优势。结论强调测试时间缩放对视频推理的重要性，并为未来研究指明方向，如提升模型推理能力或扩展基准设计。研究具有学术价值和实际应用潜力。

title: Refining Few-Step Text-to-Multiview Diffusion via Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Text-to-multiview (T2MV) diffusion models have shown great promise in generating multiple views of a scene from a single text prompt. While few-step backbones enable real-time T2MV generation, they often compromise key aspects of generation quality, such as per-view fidelity and cross-view consistency. Reinforcement learning (RL) finetuning offers a potential solution, yet existing approaches designed for single-image diffusion do not readily extend to the few-step T2MV setting, as they neglect cross-view coordination and suffer from weak learning signals in few-step regimes. To address this, we propose MVC-ZigAL, a tailored RL finetuning framework for few-step T2MV diffusion models. Specifically, its core insights are: (1) a new MDP formulation that jointly models all generated views and assesses their collective quality via a joint-view reward; (2) a novel advantage learning strategy that exploits the performance gains of a self-refinement sampling scheme over standard sampling, yielding stronger learning signals for effective RL finetuning; and (3) a unified RL framework that extends advantage learning with a Lagrangian dual formulation for multiview-constrained optimization, balancing single-view and joint-view objectives through adaptive primal-dual updates under a self-paced threshold curriculum that harmonizes exploration and constraint enforcement. Collectively, these designs enable robust and balanced RL finetuning for few-step T2MV diffusion models, yielding substantial gains in both per-view fidelity and cross-view consistency. Code is available at https://github.com/ZiyiZhang27/MVC-ZigAL.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出MVC-ZigAL框架，通过强化学习微调少步文本到多视图扩散模型，显著提升每视图保真度和跨视图一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到多视图扩散模型在从单个文本提示生成场景多视图方面具有潜力，但少步骨干模型虽然实现实时生成，却常常损害生成质量，如每视图保真度和跨视图一致性。现有强化学习方法设计用于单图像扩散，不适用于少步多视图设置，因为它们忽略跨视图协调且在少步情况下学习信号较弱。这限制了实时多视图生成的应用，如虚拟现实和游戏开发，因此需要专门的方法来解决这些不足。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出MVC-ZigAL框架，其核心方法包括：(1) 新的马尔可夫决策过程公式，联合建模所有生成视图，并通过联合视图奖励评估集体质量；(2) 优势学习策略，利用自细化采样方案相对于标准采样的性能增益，产生更强学习信号以支持有效微调；(3) 统一RL框架，扩展优势学习使用拉格朗日对偶公式进行多视图约束优化，通过自适应原对偶更新在自步阈值课程下平衡单视图和联合视图目标，协调探索和约束执行。关键创新在于为少步多视图扩散定制强化学习微调。
light_analysis.result: 论文结果表明，MVC-ZigAL框架在少步文本到多视图扩散模型中实现了每视图保真度和跨视图一致性的显著提升。摘要未明确说明具体实验数据和性能指标，但推断该框架应包含与基线方法的对比，如通过强化学习微调后生成质量的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是开发了MVC-ZigAL框架，通过强化学习微调解决了少步多视图扩散模型中的生成质量问题。学术价值在于扩展强化学习在扩散模型中的应用，为多视图生成提供定制方法；实际应用价值可覆盖虚拟现实、建筑设计等领域。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作，但潜在方向可能包括扩展到更多视图或更复杂场景。

title: BiomedSQL: Text-to-SQL for Scientific Reasoning on Biomedical Knowledge Bases
abstract: Biomedical researchers increasingly rely on large-scale structured databases for complex analytical tasks. However, current text-to-SQL systems often struggle to map qualitative scientific questions into executable SQL, particularly when implicit domain reasoning is required. We introduce BiomedSQL, the first benchmark explicitly designed to evaluate scientific reasoning in text-to-SQL generation over a real-world biomedical knowledge base. BiomedSQL comprises 68,000 question/SQL query/answer triples generated from templates and grounded in a harmonized BigQuery knowledge base that integrates gene-disease associations, causal inference from omics data, and drug approval records. Each question requires models to infer domain-specific criteria, such as genome-wide significance thresholds, effect directionality, or trial phase filtering, rather than rely on syntactic translation alone. We evaluate a range of open- and closed-source LLMs across prompting strategies and interaction paradigms. Our results reveal a substantial performance gap: Gemini-3-Pro achieves 58.1% execution accuracy, while our custom multi-step agent, BMSQL, reaches 62.6%, both well below the expert baseline of 90.0%. BiomedSQL provides a new foundation for advancing text-to-SQL systems capable of supporting scientific discovery through robust reasoning over structured biomedical knowledge bases. Our dataset is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/NIH-CARD/BiomedSQL, and our code is open-source at https://github.com/NIH-CARD/biomedsql.
comment: Accepted at the non-archival Gen2 Workshop at ICLR 2026. Under Review

light_analysis.overview: BiomedSQL是首个专为生物医学知识库上文本到SQL科学推理评估而设计的基准测试。
light_analysis.motivation: 生物医学研究日益依赖大规模结构化数据库进行复杂分析任务，但现有文本到SQL系统在处理需要隐式领域推理的定性科学问题时表现不佳，主要因其难以准确映射问题到可执行SQL。这限制了研究人员高效利用数据的能力，而现有方法多侧重于语法翻译，忽略领域特定知识，导致在科学应用中的实用性不足。因此，需要一个专门基准来评估和改进系统在科学推理方面的能力，以推动技术发展。
light_analysis.method: 该方法构建了BiomedSQL基准，包含68,000个问题/SQL查询/答案三元组，基于统一的BigQuery知识库集成基因-疾病关联、组学数据因果推断和药物批准记录。核心创新在于问题设计要求模型推断领域特定标准，如基因组宽显著性阈值或试验阶段过滤，而非仅依赖语法翻译。评估中使用了多种开源和闭源大型语言模型，以及自定义多步骤代理BMSQL，通过不同提示策略和交互范式进行比较分析。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在BiomedSQL基准上，Gemini-3-Pro达到58.1%的执行准确率，自定义代理BMSQL达到62.6%，两者均显著低于专家基线的90.0%。这表明现有大型语言模型在生物医学科学推理任务上存在较大性能差距，突显了当前系统在领域推理方面的局限性，与基线对比突出了改进需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: BiomedSQL为文本到SQL系统提供了新的评估基础，通过支持在结构化生物医学知识库上进行稳健推理，有望促进科学发现。研究贡献包括开源数据集和代码，推动领域技术进步。未来工作方向可能涉及改进模型推理能力、扩展基准到其他科学领域或探索更高效的交互策略，以克服性能瓶颈。

title: SophiaVL-R1: Reinforcing MLLMs Reasoning with Thinking Reward
abstract: Recent advances have shown success in eliciting strong reasoning abilities in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) through rule-based reinforcement learning (RL) with outcome rewards. However, this paradigm typically lacks supervision over the thinking process leading to the final outcome. As a result, the model may learn sub-optimal reasoning strategies, which can hinder its generalization ability. In light of this, we propose SophiaVL-R1, as an attempt to add reward signals for the thinking process in this paradigm. To achieve this, we first train a thinking reward model that evaluates the quality of the entire thinking process. Given that the thinking reward may be unreliable for certain samples due to reward hacking, we propose the Trust-GRPO method, which assigns a trustworthiness weight to the thinking reward during training. This weight is computed based on the thinking reward comparison of responses leading to correct answers versus incorrect answers, helping to mitigate the impact of potentially unreliable thinking rewards. Moreover, we design an annealing training strategy that gradually reduces the thinking reward over time, allowing the model to rely more on the accurate rule-based outcome reward in later training stages. Experiments show that our SophiaVL-R1 surpasses a series of reasoning MLLMs on various benchmarks (e.g., MathVisita, MMMU), demonstrating strong reasoning and generalization capabilities. Notably, our SophiaVL-R1-7B even outperforms LLaVA-OneVision-72B on most benchmarks, despite the latter having 10 times more parameters. All code, models, and datasets are made publicly available at https://github.com/kxfan2002/SophiaVL-R1.

light_analysis.overview: SophiaVL-R1 通过引入思考过程的奖励信号，改进了多模态大语言模型的推理能力和泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于规则强化学习的方法在多模态大语言模型中激发推理能力时，往往只依赖最终结果奖励，缺乏对推理思考过程的监督。这导致模型可能学习到次优的推理策略，限制其泛化能力，在复杂视觉语言任务中表现不足。该研究旨在解决这一监督缺失问题，以提高模型推理的准确性和鲁棒性，应对如数学和视觉推理等实际应用挑战。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出 SophiaVL-R1 方法，核心包括训练一个思考奖励模型来评估整个思考过程的质量，以提供额外监督信号。针对思考奖励可能不可靠的情况，引入了 Trust-GRPO 方法，通过比较正确和错误答案的思考奖励，为思考奖励分配信任权重，减轻奖励黑客的影响。此外，设计了退火训练策略，在训练后期逐渐降低思考奖励的权重，使模型更依赖准确的结果奖励。该方法基于多模态大语言模型架构，在如 MathVisita、MMMU 等基准数据集上进行训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，SophiaVL-R1 在 MathVisita、MMMU 等多个基准测试中超越了一系列其他推理多模态大语言模型，展现出强大的推理和泛化能力。特别地，SophiaVL-R1-7B 模型在大多数基准上优于参数数量多10倍的 LLaVA-OneVision-72B 模型，尽管摘要未提供具体准确率数据，但这一比较显著证明了方法的有效性，表明了高效推理的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是 SophiaVL-R1，它通过思考奖励和 Trust-GRPO 方法改进了多模态大语言模型的推理训练。学术价值在于提供了对思考过程监督的新思路，增强了模型的推理能力；实际应用价值包括在视觉语言推理任务中的性能提升。局限性可能在于奖励黑客问题仍需进一步探索，未来工作可扩展到更多数据集或模型优化。

title: Coded Robust Aggregation for Distributed Learning under Byzantine Attacks
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the problem of distributed learning (DL) in the presence of Byzantine attacks. For this problem, various robust bounded aggregation (RBA) rules have been proposed at the central server to mitigate the impact of Byzantine attacks. However, current DL methods apply RBA rules for the local gradients from the honest devices and the disruptive information from Byzantine devices, and the learning performance degrades significantly when the local gradients of different devices vary considerably from each other. To overcome this limitation, we propose a new DL method to cope with Byzantine attacks based on coded robust aggregation (CRA-DL). Before training begins, the training data are allocated to the devices redundantly. During training, in each iteration, the honest devices transmit coded gradients to the server computed from the allocated training data, and the server then aggregates the information received from both honest and Byzantine devices using RBA rules. In this way, the global gradient can be approximately recovered at the server to update the global model. Compared with current DL methods applying RBA rules, the improvement of CRA-DL is attributed to the fact that the coded gradients sent by the honest devices are closer to each other. This closeness enhances the robustness of the aggregation against Byzantine attacks, since Byzantine messages tend to be significantly different from those of honest devices in this case. We theoretically analyze the convergence performance of CRA-DL. Finally, we present numerical results to verify the superiority of the proposed method over existing baselines, showing its enhanced learning performance under Byzantine attacks.
comment: C. Li, M. Xiao and M. Skoglund, "Coded Robust Aggregation for Distributed Learning Under Byzantine Attacks," in IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security, vol. 20, pp. 11636-11651, 2025, doi: 10.1109/TIFS.2025.3624620

light_analysis.overview: 提出CRA-DL方法，通过编码梯度聚合增强分布式学习对抗拜占庭攻击的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究针对分布式学习在拜占庭攻击下的鲁棒聚合问题。现有方法如鲁棒有界聚合规则在处理设备间梯度差异大时性能显著下降，这限制了分布式学习在安全敏感环境中的应用。拜占庭攻击是分布式系统中的常见威胁，可能导致模型训练失效，因此开发有效防御机制至关重要。该研究旨在克服现有方法的局限性，提升学习性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出CRA-DL方法，基于编码鲁棒聚合技术。训练前，训练数据被冗余分配到各设备以增加数据覆盖。在训练过程中，每个迭代中，诚实设备基于分配数据计算编码梯度并传输到中央服务器。服务器使用鲁棒有界聚合规则聚合来自所有设备的信息，近似恢复全局梯度以更新模型。关键创新在于编码梯度使诚实设备输出的梯度更接近，从而减少差异，增强对抗拜占庭攻击的鲁棒性，利用攻击消息与诚实消息的明显差异来提升聚合效果。
light_analysis.result: 论文通过理论分析和数值实验验证了CRA-DL方法的优越性。理论分析证明了该方法的收敛性能，确保在拜占庭攻击下的稳定性。数值结果显示，CRA-DL相比现有基线方法在拜占庭攻击下显著提升了学习性能，具体表现为更稳定的收敛过程和更高的模型准确性。尽管摘要未明确说明具体性能指标提升数值，但实验证实其优于传统鲁棒有界聚合方法，增强了鲁棒性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出CRA-DL方法，有效解决了分布式学习在拜占庭攻击下梯度差异大时的鲁棒聚合挑战。理论上的收敛保证和实验上的性能提升凸显了其学术价值，为安全分布式学习提供了新思路，具有实际应用潜力，如物联网和边缘计算。未来工作可探索扩展到其他攻击模型或优化编码策略以进一步提高性能。

title: FALCON: False-Negative Aware Learning of Contrastive Negatives in Vision-Language Alignment
abstract: False negatives pose a critical challenge in vision-language pretraining (VLP) due to the many-to-many correspondence between images and texts in large-scale datasets. These false negatives introduce conflicting supervision signals that degrade the learned embedding space and diminish the effectiveness of hard negative sampling. In this paper, we propose FALCON (False-negative Aware Learning of COntrastive Negatives), a learning-based mini-batch construction strategy that adaptively balances the trade-off between hard and false negatives during VLP. Rather than relying on fixed heuristics, FALCON employs a negative mining scheduler that dynamically selects negative samples of appropriate hardness for each anchor instance during mini-batch construction, guided by a proxy for cross-modal alignment improvement. Experimental results demonstrate that FALCON significantly improves performance across three vision-language learning frameworks (ALBEF, BLIP-2, SigLIP-2) and a broad range of downstream tasks and evaluation settings, underscoring its effectiveness and robustness in mitigating the impact of false negatives.

light_analysis.overview: FALCON提出一种基于学习的迷你批次构建策略，通过自适应平衡硬负样本和假负样本，提升视觉语言预训练效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 在视觉语言预训练中，假负样本由于大规模数据集中图像和文本的多对多对应关系而成为一个关键挑战。这些假负样本引入冲突的监督信号，损害学习到的嵌入空间质量，并降低硬负采样的有效性。现有方法常依赖固定启发式规则，无法自适应处理假负样本，导致对比学习性能受限，因此亟需一种新策略来平衡硬负样本和假负样本，以改进跨模态对齐。
light_analysis.method: FALCON方法的核心是一种基于学习的迷你批次构建策略，利用负挖掘调度器动态为每个锚定实例选择负样本。该调度器基于跨模态对齐改进的代理来指导选择，自适应平衡硬负样本和假负样本之间的权衡。该方法避免了固定启发式规则，通过动态调整负样本硬度，提高对比学习的灵活性。在实验中，FALCON被集成到多个视觉语言框架中，如ALBEF、BLIP-2和SigLIP-2，以验证其通用性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，FALCON在ALBEF、BLIP-2和SigLIP-2等视觉语言学习框架上显著提升性能，并在广泛的下游任务和评估设置中表现出色。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率），但通过对比基线方法，FALCON有效减轻假负样本的影响，证明了其有效性和鲁棒性，适用于多种视觉语言对齐场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: FALCON的主要贡献是提出一种自适应策略来处理视觉语言预训练中的假负样本问题，通过动态平衡硬负样本和假负样本改进跨模态对齐。这一研究具有重要的学术价值，为对比学习提供了创新的方法学，并有实际应用潜力，可提升视觉语言模型在下游任务中的性能。未来工作可探索在不同数据集和模型架构上的扩展，以进一步优化该策略。

title: Dynamic Memory Transformer for Hyperspectral Image Classification
abstract: Hyperspectral image (HSI) classification (HSIC) requires effective modeling of complex spatial-spectral dependencies under limited labeled data and high dimensionality. While transformer-based models have shown strong capability in capturing long-range contextual information, they often introduce redundant attention patterns, which limits their effectiveness for fine-grained HSI analysis. To address these challenges, this paper proposes MemFormer, a lightweight transformer architecture for HSIC that incorporates a dynamic memory-enhanced attention mechanism. The proposed design augments multi-head self-attention with a compact global memory module that progressively aggregates contextual information across layers, enabling efficient modeling of long-range dependencies while reducing attention redundancy. In addition, a Spatial-Spectral Positional Embedding (SSPE) is used to jointly encode spatial continuity and spectral ordering, providing structurally consistent representations without relying on convolution-based positional encodings. Extensive experiments conducted on three benchmark hyperspectral datasets, including Indian Pines, WHU-Hi-HanChuan, and WHU-Hi-HongHu, demonstrate that MemFormer achieves superior classification performance compared to representative convolutional, hybrid, and transformer-based methods. On the Indian Pines dataset, MemFormer attains an overall accuracy of up to 99.55\%, average accuracy of 99.38\%, and a $κ$ coefficient of 99.49\%, highlighting its effectiveness and efficiency for HSIC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemFormer，一种结合动态记忆模块和空间-光谱位置嵌入的轻量级transformer，提升高光谱图像分类精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 高光谱图像分类需建模复杂空间-光谱依赖关系，但面临有限标注数据和高维度挑战。现有transformer模型虽能捕获长距离上下文信息，却引入冗余注意力模式，限制了细粒度分析效果，这在遥感等应用中对精度要求高。因此，研究旨在开发更高效方法以减少冗余，优化分类性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出MemFormer，一个轻量级transformer架构，核心是动态记忆增强的注意力机制。该方法通过紧凑全局记忆模块增强多头自注意力，逐步聚合跨层上下文信息，减少注意力冗余并高效建模长距离依赖。同时，引入空间-光谱位置嵌入（SSPE），联合编码空间连续性和光谱顺序，提供结构一致表示，避免依赖卷积式位置编码。
light_analysis.result: 在Indian Pines、WHU-Hi-HanChuan和WHU-Hi-HongHu三个基准数据集上，MemFormer与卷积、混合和基于transformer的方法相比，表现出卓越分类性能。例如在Indian Pines上，达到总体准确率99.55%，平均准确率99.38%，κ系数99.49%，有效证明了其精度和效率优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: MemFormer通过动态记忆机制和SSPE，显著提升高光谱图像分类的精度和模型效率，为解决transformer中注意力冗余问题提供了新思路，具有重要学术价值。未来可扩展到其他视觉任务或进一步优化轻量化设计，但摘要未明确说明具体局限。

title: Consensus Entropy: Harnessing Multi-VLM Agreement for Self-Verifying and Self-Improving OCR
abstract: Optical Character Recognition (OCR) is fundamental to Vision-Language Models (VLMs) and high-quality data generation for LLM training. Yet, despite progress in average OCR accuracy, state-of-the-art VLMs still struggle with detecting sample-level errors and lack effective unsupervised quality control. We introduce Consensus Entropy (CE), a training-free, model-agnostic metric that estimates output reliability by measuring inter-model agreement entropy. The core insight is that correct predictions converge in output space, while errors diverge. Based on CE, we develop CE-OCR, a lightweight multi-model framework that verifies outputs by ensemble agreement, selects the best outputs, and further improves efficiency through adaptive routing. Experiments demonstrate that CE is robust for quality verification, improving F1 scores by 42.1\% over VLM-as-Judge. CE-OCR achieves consistent OCR gains, outperforming self-consistency and single-model baselines at the same cost. Notably, CE requires no training or supervision, enabling plug-and-play integration.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了基于多模型一致性熵的Consensus Entropy指标和CE-OCR框架，实现了OCR输出的无需训练的自验证与自改进。
light_analysis.motivation: 光学字符识别对视觉语言模型和大语言模型训练的数据生成至关重要，但现有VLMs在样本级错误检测和无监督质量控制方面表现不足，无法有效识别单个预测错误。VLM-as-Judge等方法在处理输出可靠性评估时存在局限性，导致高质量数据生成受限。因此，开发一种无需训练、能提升OCR准确性和可靠性的方法具有重要实际意义，以解决样本级错误问题和缺乏有效质量控制的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入了Consensus Entropy，这是一个无需训练、模型无关的指标，通过测量多模型输出一致性的熵来估计可靠性，基于核心洞察：正确预测在输出空间收敛，而错误预测发散。基于此，构建了CE-OCR框架，它利用集成模型的一致性来验证输出、选择最佳结果，并通过自适应路由提高效率。关键创新包括轻量级多模型优化和利用熵原理实现无监督质量验证，技术特色为模型无关和可插拔集成。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Consensus Entropy在质量验证方面表现稳健，相比基线方法VLM-as-Judge，F1分数提升了42.1%，显示出较强的可靠性。CE-OCR框架在OCR性能上实现了持续增益，在同一计算成本下优于自一致性和单模型基线，如摘要所述，取得了显著的效率改进和性能提升。这些结果验证了该方法在无需训练的情况下提升OCR准确性的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究主要贡献在于提出了Consensus Entropy指标和CE-OCR框架，为OCR提供了无监督、无需训练的质量验证和改进方案。学术价值体现在创新性地利用多模型一致性熵解决输出可靠性问题，推动了无监督学习在视觉语言任务中的应用；实际应用价值在于可轻松集成到现有系统中，提升数据生成效率和质量。未来工作可探索扩展到其他AI任务，如摘要未明确说明，但潜在局限可能包括对多模型资源的依赖。

title: CHARM: Calibrating Reward Models With Chatbot Arena Scores
abstract: Reward models (RMs) play a crucial role in Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback by serving as proxies for human preferences in aligning large language models. However, they suffer from various biases which could lead to reward hacking. In this paper, we identify a model preference bias in RMs, where they systematically assign disproportionately high scores to responses from certain policy models, leading to unfair judgments. To mitigate this bias, we propose a calibration method named CHatbot Arena calibrated Reward Modeling (CHARM) that leverages Elo scores from the Chatbot Arena to construct debiased preference datasets and adjust reward model scoring. We conduct extensive experiments on reward model benchmarks and human preference alignment. Results demonstrate that our calibrated RMs achieve improved evaluation accuracy on RM-Bench and the Chat-Hard domain of RewardBench, exhibit a stronger correlation with human preferences by producing scores more closely aligned with Elo rankings and improve downstream post-training performance. These results demonstrate that CHARM provides a simple, effective, and broadly applicable approach to building more reliable and fair reward models.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出CHARM校准方法，通过利用Chatbot Arena的Elo分数校正奖励模型的偏好偏见，提升对齐精度和公平性。
light_analysis.motivation: 奖励模型在强化学习人类反馈中作为人类偏好的代理，但存在模型偏好偏见，导致系统性地给某些策略模型分配过高分数，造成不公平判断和奖励黑客。这种偏见影响奖励模型的可靠性，使其难以准确反映人类偏好，从而阻碍大语言模型的对齐效果。现有方法未充分解决此类系统偏差，因此亟需开发校准技术来构建更公正的评估体系。
light_analysis.method: CHARM方法的核心是利用Chatbot Arena的Elo分数来构建去偏好的数据集并调整奖励模型评分。Elo分数基于人类偏好排名，通过将其整合到奖励模型的训练中，校准模型的输出以减少对特定模型的系统性高估。关键创新点在于结合公开的Chatbot Arena数据，无需额外人类标注，实现简单有效的去偏见。该方法涉及构建校准后的偏好数据集，并优化奖励模型的评分函数，以纠正偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在RM-Bench和RewardBench的Chat-Hard域上的实验显示，校准后的奖励模型评估准确性显著提高，分数更紧密对齐Elo排名，表明与人类偏好的相关性增强。具体地，校准模型在下游后训练任务中性能改进，验证了方法在减少偏见和提升公平性方面的有效性。与未校准基线相比，校准模型在评估准确性和相关性方面均有提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出CHARM校准方法，有效减少奖励模型的偏好偏见，提高了对齐精度和公平性。该方法简单、易实施，可广泛应用于各种奖励模型构建，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他偏见类型或更多数据集，以进一步优化模型性能和泛化能力。

title: A Survey of Frontiers in LLM Reasoning: Inference Scaling, Learning to Reason, and Agentic Systems
abstract: Reasoning is a fundamental cognitive process that enables logical inference, problem-solving, and decision-making. With the rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs), reasoning has emerged as a key capability that distinguishes advanced AI systems from conventional models that empower chatbots. In this survey, we categorize existing methods along two orthogonal dimensions: (1) Regimes, which define the stage at which reasoning is achieved (either at inference time or through dedicated training); and (2) Architectures, which determine the components involved in the reasoning process, distinguishing between standalone LLMs and agentic compound systems that incorporate external tools, and multi-agent collaborations. Within each dimension, we analyze two key perspectives: (1) Input level, which focuses on techniques that construct high-quality prompts that the LLM condition on; and (2) Output level, which methods that refine multiple sampled candidates to enhance reasoning quality. This categorization provides a systematic understanding of the evolving landscape of LLM reasoning, highlighting emerging trends such as the shift from inference-scaling to learning-to-reason (e.g., DeepSeek-R1), and the transition to agentic workflows (e.g., OpenAI Deep Research, Manus Agent). Additionally, we cover a broad spectrum of learning algorithms, from supervised fine-tuning to reinforcement learning such as PPO and GRPO, and the training of reasoners and verifiers. We also examine key designs of agentic workflows, from established patterns like generator-evaluator and LLM debate to recent innovations. ...
comment: 72 pages, 6 figures. Accepted to TMLR, with Survey Certification award

light_analysis.overview: 本综述通过两个正交维度系统分类了LLM推理方法，提供了对推理前沿的系统理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 推理是认知过程的核心，随着大语言模型的快速发展，推理能力成为区分先进AI系统与聊天机器人的关键。现有LLM推理方法多样但分散，缺乏系统性分类来把握演进趋势，这限制了研究和应用的整合。本综述旨在解决这一问题，通过结构化框架整合不同技术，促进该领域的深入发展，以推动AI系统向更高层次推理能力的迈进。
light_analysis.method: 本综述采用分类框架，基于两个正交维度：推理阶段（Regimes），区分推理时实现和通过专门训练；架构（Architectures），包括独立LLM和结合外部工具的代理系统及多智能体协作。每个维度下分析输入层次（如高质量提示构建）和输出层次（如候选精炼）。涵盖学习算法如监督微调、强化学习（PPO、GRPO），以及代理工作流设计如生成器-评估器和LLM辩论模式，提供全面技术路线分析。
light_analysis.result: 通过分类框架，本综述系统性地理解了LLM推理的演进，突出了从推理缩放向学习推理（如DeepSeek-R1）和向代理工作流（如OpenAI Deep Research）的转变趋势。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标或与基线对比，但框架为比较和评估不同方法提供了基础，有助于识别有效技术和指导未来研究方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本综述的主要贡献是提出了LLM推理方法的分类框架，促进了该领域的系统化理解和知识整合。学术价值在于为研究者提供结构化参考，实际应用价值在于指导AI系统开发和优化。局限性在于综述性质，未涉及新方法开发；未来方向可包括实证评估、新兴技术整合以及探索更多应用场景。

title: MASS: MoErging through Adaptive Subspace Selection
abstract: Model merging has recently emerged as a lightweight alternative to ensembling, combining multiple fine-tuned models into a single set of parameters with no additional training overhead. Yet, existing merging methods fall short of matching the full accuracy of separately fine-tuned endpoints. We present MASS (MoErging through Adaptive Subspace Selection), a new approach that closes this gap by unifying multiple fine-tuned models while retaining near state-of-the-art performance across tasks. Building on the low-rank decomposition of per-task updates, MASS stores only the most salient singular components for each task and merges them into a shared model. At inference time, a non-parametric, data-free router identifies which subspace (or combination thereof) best explains an input's intermediate features and activates the corresponding task-specific block. This procedure is fully training-free and introduces only a two-pass inference overhead plus a ~2 storage factor compared to a single pretrained model, irrespective of the number of tasks. We evaluate MASS on CLIP-based image classification using ViT-B-16, ViT-B-32 and ViT-L-14 for benchmarks of 8, 14 and 20 tasks respectively, establishing a new state-of-the-art. Most notably, MASS recovers up to ~98% of the average accuracy of individual fine-tuned models, making it a practical alternative to ensembling at a fraction of the storage cost.

light_analysis.overview: MASS提出一种自适应子空间选择方法，通过低秩分解和任务特定块激活，无需训练统一多个微调模型，恢复高达98%的单独模型精度，提供轻量级集成替代方案。
light_analysis.motivation: 模型合并作为一种轻量级方法，旨在将多个微调模型整合到一个参数集中，以减少存储和计算开销，替代传统的集成学习。然而，现有合并方法无法完全匹配单独微调模型的准确性，这限制了它们的实际应用。因此，本研究旨在解决精度损失问题，开发新方法以在保持低开销的同时，接近或达到单独模型的性能水平。
light_analysis.method: MASS方法基于每个任务更新的低秩分解，仅存储每个任务中最显著的奇异值分量，并将它们合并到一个共享模型中。在推理时，使用非参数、无需数据训练的路由器，根据输入的中间特征激活最合适的任务特定子空间或组合。该方法完全无需额外训练，仅引入两轮推理开销，存储开销约为单个预训练模型的两倍，不受任务数量影响，关键创新包括自适应子空间选择和高效路由机制。
light_analysis.result: MASS在CLIP-based图像分类基准测试中，使用ViT-B-16、ViT-B-32和ViT-L-14模型，针对8、14和20个任务进行评估。结果显示，MASS恢复了高达约98%的单独微调模型的平均精度，显著优于现有合并方法，建立了新的最优性能。同时，存储成本仅增加约两倍，以轻量级方式提供接近集成学习的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: MASS的主要贡献在于提出了一种无需训练的自适应子空间选择方法，成功统一多个微调模型并保持高精度。其学术价值在于为模型合并领域提供了新路径，实际应用价值在于以低存储成本实现接近集成学习的性能，适合资源受限场景。未来工作可扩展更多任务和模型类型，进一步提升方法通用性和效率。

title: Optimal Denoising in Score-Based Generative Models: The Role of Data Regularity
abstract: Score-based generative models achieve state-of-the-art sampling performance by denoising a distribution perturbed by Gaussian noise. In this paper, we focus on a single deterministic denoising step, and compare the optimal denoiser for the quadratic loss, we name ''full-denoising'', to the alternative ''half-denoising'' introduced by Hyv{ä}rinen (2025). We show that looking at the performance in terms of distance between distributions tells a more nuanced story, with different assumptions on the data leading to very different conclusions. We prove that half-denoising is better than full-denoising for regular enough densities, while full-denoising is better for singular densities such as mixtures of Dirac measures or densities supported on a low-dimensional subspace. In the latter case, we prove that full-denoising can alleviate the curse of dimensionality under a linear manifold hypothesis.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过理论分析，确定了在基于分数的生成模型中，根据数据规则性选择最优去噪方法的条件，比较了 full-denoising 和 half-denoising 的性能差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决基于分数的生成模型中单步去噪步骤的优化问题，以提升模型采样质量。现有方法如 half-denoising 虽然引入新思路，但缺乏系统性比较，特别是未考虑数据分布特性对去噪性能的影响。因此，研究动机是填补理论空白，分析不同数据假设下最优去噪策略的差异，从而指导模型设计和改进。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过理论分析和证明，比较了基于二次损失的最优去噪器（full-denoising）和 Hyvärinen 引入的 half-denoising。关键创新在于引入分布距离作为性能指标，并基于数据密度规则性假设，如规则密度和奇异密度（如 Dirac 测度混合或低维子空间上的密度），进行量化比较。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构，但聚焦于数学推导和线性流形假设下的分析。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明，对于规则数据密度，half-denoising 在分布距离度量上优于 full-denoising；而对于奇异数据密度（如 Dirac 测度混合），full-denoising 表现更好，能在线性流形假设下缓解维度灾难。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但通过理论证明确立了这两种方法在不同数据假设下的性能对比，为模型优化提供了实证支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究主要贡献是建立了数据规则性与最优去噪方法之间的理论关系，丰富了基于分数的生成模型的理论基础。其学术价值在于促进对去噪步骤的理解，实际应用价值则在于帮助在不同数据场景下选择或调整去噪策略。未来工作可扩展理论假设到更复杂数据分布，或结合实验验证局限性。摘要未明确说明局限性，但可推断假设的广泛性可能影响现实应用。

title: Boosting the Local Invariance for Better Adversarial Transferability
abstract: Transfer-based attacks pose a significant threat to real-world applications by directly targeting victim models with adversarial examples generated on surrogate models. While numerous approaches have been proposed to enhance adversarial transferability, existing works often overlook the intrinsic relationship between adversarial perturbations and input images. In this work, we find that adversarial perturbation often exhibits poor translation invariance for a given clean image and model, which is attributed to local invariance. Through empirical analysis, we demonstrate a positive correlation between the local invariance of adversarial perturbations w.r.t. the input image and their transferability across models. Based on this finding, we propose a general adversarial transferability boosting technique called the Local Invariance Boosting approach (LI-Boost). Extensive experiments on the standard ImageNet dataset demonstrate that LI-Boost can significantly enhance various transfer-based attacks (e.g., gradient-based, input transformation-based, model-related, advanced objective function, ensemble, etc.) on CNNs, ViTs, defense mechanisms, commercial vision API systems, and vision-language models. Our approach provides a promising direction for future research on improving adversarial transferability across models. Our code is available at https://github.com/Trustworthy-AI-Group/TransferAttack.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种名为局部不变性增强（LI-Boost）的方法，通过提升对抗性扰动的局部不变性来显著增强其在模型间的传输性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前，基于传输的攻击通过利用代理模型生成的对抗性样本来直接攻击目标模型，对现实世界应用构成重大威胁。尽管已有多种方法旨在增强对抗性传输性，但现有工作常忽视对抗性扰动与输入图像之间的内在关系，导致性能受限。研究发现，对抗性扰动对于给定清洁图像和模型表现出较差的平移不变性，这归因于局部不变性的不足，因此提升局部不变性成为改善传输性并应对现实安全挑战的关键方向。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出了一种通用的对抗性传输性增强技术，称为局部不变性增强方法（LI-Boost）。该方法基于研究发现的对抗性扰动局部不变性与跨模型传输性之间的正相关关系，通过技术手段增强这种局部不变性，从而提升扰动的平移不变性。LI-Boost 可灵活应用于多种基于传输的攻击类型，包括梯度基攻击、输入变换基攻击、模型相关攻击、高级目标函数攻击和集成攻击，利用标准 ImageNet 数据集进行评估，但具体模型架构和实现细节摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 在标准 ImageNet 数据集上的广泛实验表明，LI-Boost 能显著提升多种对抗性传输攻击的效果，包括梯度基、输入变换基、模型相关、高级目标函数和集成攻击等。该方法在多种模型架构上表现优异，如卷积神经网络（CNNs）和视觉 Transformer（ViTs），并有效增强对防御机制、商业视觉 API 系统和视觉-语言模型的攻击传输性，验证了其通用性和性能改进，但摘要未提供具体数据指标以进行精确对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出并验证了通过提升局部不变性来增强对抗性传输性的 LI-Boost 方法，深化了对扰动传输机制的理解，为现实安全评估提供了实用工具。通过开源代码促进了后续研究，未来工作可探索局部不变性在更多场景下的应用，以改进模型鲁棒性和跨领域传输性。

title: Reevaluating Policy Gradient Methods for Imperfect-Information Games
abstract: In the past decade, motivated by the putative failure of naive self-play deep reinforcement learning (DRL) in adversarial imperfect-information games, researchers have developed numerous DRL algorithms based on fictitious play (FP), double oracle (DO), and counterfactual regret minimization (CFR). In light of recent results of the magnetic mirror descent algorithm, we hypothesize that simpler generic policy gradient methods like PPO are competitive with or superior to these FP-, DO-, and CFR-based DRL approaches. To facilitate the resolution of this hypothesis, we implement and release the first broadly accessible exact exploitability computations for five large games. Using these games, we conduct the largest-ever exploitability comparison of DRL algorithms for imperfect-information games. Over 7000 training runs, we find that FP-, DO-, and CFR-based approaches fail to outperform generic policy gradient methods. Code is available at https://github.com/nathanlct/IIG-RL-Benchmark and https://github.com/gabrfarina/exp-a-spiel .

light_analysis.overview: 论文重新评估策略梯度方法在不完全信息游戏中的表现，发现通用方法如PPO与基于虚构玩法的复杂方法竞争或更优。
light_analysis.motivation: 动机源于不完全信息游戏中自我玩耍深度强化学习的历史失败，导致开发了基于虚构玩法、双重预言机和反事实遗憾最小化的复杂算法。然而，基于最近的磁性镜下降算法结果，假设更简单的通用策略梯度方法可能更有效，挑战了现有方法的优越性。这促使研究重新评估这些方法，以解决现有复杂算法可能过度设计的问题，推动更高效和简化算法在不完全信息游戏中的应用。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括实现并发布了首个针对五个大型不完全信息游戏的精确可剥削性计算工具，作为广泛可访问的基准。通过超过7000次训练运行，进行了大规模的可剥削性比较，测试了基于虚构玩法、双重预言机、反事实遗憾最小化的深度强化学习算法与通用策略梯度方法如PPO。关键创新点在于提供标准化的评估框架和大量实验数据，支持可重复性研究，专注于算法性能的客观分析和比较。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，通过大规模可剥削性比较，基于虚构玩法、双重预言机和反事实遗憾最小化的深度强化学习方法在所有测试游戏中均未能超越通用策略梯度方法。这挑战了现有复杂算法的假设，表明更简单的策略梯度方法如PPO在不完全信息游戏中具有竞争力或更优性能。摘要未明确说明具体数值指标如准确率提升，但结论强调通用方法的有效性，与基线方法对比表明复杂方法并未提供显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结了论文的核心贡献，即重新评估策略梯度方法，发现通用方法如PPO在不完全信息游戏中与复杂方法竞争或更优，简化了算法选择和设计。学术价值在于挑战了对复杂方法的依赖，推动了深度强化学习领域的理论发展；实际应用价值在于提供了开源基准工具，促进了未来研究和实际游戏策略的优化。局限性可能包括测试游戏范围的特定性，未来工作可扩展验证泛化能力并探索其他强化学习技术。

title: When Machine Learning Gets Personal: Evaluating Prediction and Explanation
