abstract: In high-stakes domains like healthcare, users often expect that sharing personal information with machine learning systems will yield tangible benefits, such as more accurate diagnoses and clearer explanations of contributing factors. However, the validity of this assumption remains largely unexplored. We propose a unified framework to quantify how personalizing a model influences both prediction and explanation. We show that its impacts on prediction and explanation can diverge: a model may become more or less explainable even when prediction is unchanged. For practical settings, we study a standard hypothesis test for detecting personalization effects on demographic groups. We derive a finite-sample lower bound on its probability of error as a function of group sizes, number of personal attributes, and desired benefit from personalization. This provides actionable insights, such as which dataset characteristics are necessary to test an effect, or the maximum effect that can be tested given a dataset. We apply our framework to real-world tabular datasets using feature-attribution methods, uncovering scenarios where effects are fundamentally untestable due to the dataset statistics. Our results highlight the need for joint evaluation of prediction and explanation in personalized models and the importance of designing models and datasets with sufficient information for such evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一个统一框架来量化个性化模型对预测和解释的联合影响，揭示二者可能分歧的创新发现。
light_analysis.motivation: 在高风险领域如医疗保健中，用户常期望通过分享个人信息能获得更准确的预测（如诊断）和清晰的解释，但这一假设的有效性尚未得到充分验证。现有方法主要关注个性化对预测的优化，而忽略了其与解释的联合影响，可能导致模型在实际应用中存在公平性或可解释性问题。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探讨个性化模型在现实场景中的综合效果，重要性在于为构建透明可信的AI系统提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 作者提出一个统一框架来量化个性化对预测和解释的影响。核心方法包括使用标准假设检验检测个性化效果在人口群体上的表现，并推导了误差概率的有限样本下界，该下界是组大小、个人属性数量和预期收益的函数，提供了可操作的测试条件。方法应用于真实表格数据集，利用特征归因方法（如基于梯度的解释技术）进行具体分析，以评估个性化影响的可测试性。
light_analysis.result: 研究结果显示，个性化对预测和解释的影响可能不同：例如，即使预测性能保持不变，模型也可能变得更可解释或更不可解释。在应用于真实表格数据集时，发现某些场景下由于数据集统计特性（如样本量不足或属性分布不均衡），个性化效果无法被有效测试。这提供了实用洞察，如确定所需数据集的最小规模或最大可测效果，并与基线假设检验方法对比，强调了评估中的数据限制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是强调了在个性化模型中联合评估预测和解释的必要性，并指出设计足够信息的模型和数据集是有效评估的关键。学术价值在于提供了量化个性化影响的理论框架和实用测试方法；实际应用中，帮助开发者和研究人员评估模型在真实场景中的表现，并为数据集收集和模型设计提供指导。未来工作可能涉及将框架扩展到更复杂的模型或不同领域，以进一步验证其通用性。

title: LLMs as Repositories of Factual Knowledge: Limitations and Solutions
abstract: LLMs' sources of knowledge are data snapshots containing factual information about entities collected at different timestamps and from different media types (e.g. wikis, social media, etc.). Such unstructured knowledge is subject to change due to updates through time from past to present. Equally important are the inconsistencies and inaccuracies occurring in different information sources. Consequently, the model's knowledge about an entity may be perturbed while training over the sequence of snapshots or at inference time, resulting in inconsistent and inaccurate model performance. In this work, we study the appropriateness of Large Language Models (LLMs) as repositories of factual knowledge. We consider twenty-four state-of-the-art LLMs that are either closed-, partially (weights), or fully (weight and training data) open-source. We evaluate their reliability in responding to time-sensitive factual questions in terms of accuracy and consistency when prompts are perturbed. We further evaluate the effectiveness of state-of-the-art methods to improve LLMs' accuracy and consistency. We then propose ENtity-Aware Fine-tuning (ENAF), a soft neurosymbolic approach aimed at providing structured representation of entities during fine-tuning to reduce inconsistencies and improve response stability under prompt variations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ENAF方法，通过结构化实体表示在微调中提升大语言模型的事实知识一致性和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究探讨大语言模型作为事实知识库的局限性，因知识源来自非结构化数据快照，随时间更新导致信息不一致和不准确，影响模型性能。现有方法在管理实体知识时存在不足，无法有效处理时间敏感问题，导致推理时准确性和稳定性差。因此，评估LLMs的可靠性并开发改进方案具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 研究首先评估了24个最先进的LLMs，涵盖封闭式、部分开源和完全开源模型，测试其对时间敏感事实问题的准确性和一致性。进一步评估了现有改进方法的有效性。然后提出ENtity-Aware Fine-tuning (ENAF)，这是一种软神经符号方法，通过在微调期间引入实体结构化表示，旨在减少不一致性并提高响应稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但研究显示LLMs在处理时间敏感事实问题时存在准确性和一致性问题。评估结果表明现有方法在改善这些方面效果有限。提出的ENAF方法旨在优化模型，减少不一致性和提高稳定性，需查阅完整论文以获取详细数据支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究总结LLMs作为事实知识库的局限性，特别是在时间敏感性方面，并提出ENAF方法作为解决方案。其学术价值在于深化对LLMs知识管理问题的理解，并提供一种创新方法来增强模型可靠性。实际应用中，这有助于提升LLMs在需要稳定事实知识的场景下的表现。未来工作可能包括扩展ENAF到更广泛的实体类型和数据集。

title: Mamba2D: A Natively Multi-Dimensional State-Space Model for Vision Tasks
abstract: State-Space Models (SSMs) have emerged as an efficient alternative to transformers, yet existing visual SSMs retain deeply ingrained biases from their origins in natural language processing. In this paper, we address these limitations by introducing M2D-SSM, a ground-up re-derivation of selective state-space techniques for multidimensional data. Unlike prior works that apply 1D SSMs directly to images through arbitrary rasterised scanning, our M2D-SSM employs a single 2D scan that factors in both spatial dimensions natively. On ImageNet-1K classification, M2D-T achieves 84.0% top-1 accuracy with only 27M parameters, surpassing all prior SSM-based vision models at that size. M2D-S further achieves 85.3%, establishing state-of-the-art results among SSM-based architectures. Across downstream tasks, Mamba2D achieves 52.2 box AP on MS-COCO object detection (3$\times$ schedule) and 51.7 mIoU on ADE20K segmentation, demonstrating strong generalisation and efficiency at scale. Source code is available at https://github.com/cocoalex00/Mamba2D.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了Mamba2D，一种原生的多维状态空间模型，通过单一2D扫描处理视觉任务，显著提升了图像分类和目标检测的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于状态空间模型（SSMs）的视觉方法源自自然语言处理，存在深度偏见，常将1D SSMs通过任意扫描方式应用于图像，忽略了空间维度的本质特性。这导致处理多维数据时效率低下且不自然，限制了模型在视觉任务中的表现。因此，本研究旨在克服这些局限性，设计一种更合适的SSM，以充分利用图像的二维结构，提升准确性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出M2D-SSM，一种从底层重新推导的选择性状态空间技术，专门针对多维数据。核心创新在于使用单一的2D扫描，原生地考虑空间维度，避免了以往工作中的任意扫描方式。该方法通过优化状态空间模型的结构，使其更适合处理图像数据，增强了表达能力和效率。摘要未详细说明具体模型架构或使用的训练数据集，但强调了在视觉任务中的应用技术。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-1K分类任务中，M2D-T模型仅用27M参数达到84.0%的top-1准确率，超越了所有同规模的基于SSM的视觉模型；M2D-S模型进一步提升至85.3%，在SSM架构中达到最先进水平。在下游任务中，Mamba2D在MS-COCO对象检测上实现52.2 box AP（使用3倍调度），在ADE20K分割上实现51.7 mIoU，显示出强大的泛化能力和效率，与基线方法相比性能有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了Mamba2D，一种原生的多维状态空间模型，解决了现有视觉SSMs的偏见问题。通过单一2D扫描技术，模型在图像分类、目标检测和分割任务中均表现出色，展现了高效的性能和良好的泛化能力。摘要未明确说明局限性，但可能暗示了未来工作可以进一步优化模型结构或扩展到更多视觉任务。该研究为状态空间模型在视觉领域的应用提供了新方向，具有重要的学术和实际价值。

title: Learning-based Sketches for Frequency Estimation in Data Streams without Ground Truth
abstract: Estimating the frequency of items on the high-volume, fast data stream has been extensively studied in many areas, such as database and network measurement. Traditional sketches provide only coarse estimates under strict memory constraints. Although some learning-augmented methods have emerged recently, they typically rely on offline training with real frequencies or/and labels, which are often unavailable. Moreover, these methods suffer from slow update speeds, limiting their suitability for real-time processing despite offering only marginal accuracy improvements. To overcome these challenges, we propose UCL-sketch, a practical learning-based paradigm for per-key frequency estimation. Our design introduces two key innovations: (i) an online training mechanism based on equivalent learning that requires no ground truth (GT), and (ii) a highly scalable architecture leveraging logically structured estimation buckets to scale to real-world data stream. The UCL-sketch, which utilizes compressive sensing (CS), converges to an estimator that provably yields a error bound far lower than that of prior works, without sacrificing the speed of processing. Extensive experiments on both real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate that our approach outperforms previously proposed approaches regarding per-key accuracy and distribution. Notably, under extremely tight memory budgets, its quality almost matches that of an (infeasible) omniscient oracle. Moreover, compared to the existing equation-based sketch, UCL-sketch achieves an average decoding speedup of nearly 500 times. To help further research and development, our code is publicly available at https://github.com/Y-debug-sys/UCL-sketch.
comment: Accepted as a regular paper at IEEE TKDE

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出UCL-sketch，一种无需真实标签的学习范式，用于提高数据流中频率估计的准确性和处理速度。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据流中项目频率估计在数据库和网络测量等领域广泛应用，但传统草图方法在严格内存约束下提供粗略估计。尽管已有学习增强方法，但它们依赖离线训练和真实频率或标签，这些在现实场景中常不可得，且更新速度慢，难以支持实时处理，准确度提升有限。因此，需要克服这些限制以开发高效、准确的实时估计方法。
light_analysis.method: UCL-sketch是一种基于学习的频率估计方法，核心创新包括无需真实信息的在线训练机制，通过等效学习实现；以及利用逻辑结构化估计桶的可扩展架构。该方法结合压缩感知技术，确保估计器在理论上具有较低的误差界，同时保持快速处理，支持大规模数据流的实时应用。
light_analysis.result: 在真实和合成数据集上的实验显示，UCL-sketch在每键准确性和分布方面优于现有方法。在极紧内存预算下，其估计质量接近全知oracle；与基于方程的草图相比，平均解码速度提升近500倍，且误差界更低，证实了其高效性和准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UCL-sketch通过无真实标签的在线训练和可扩展设计，显著提升了频率估计的性能，解决了学习增强方法的局限性。该研究具有理论意义和实际应用价值，适用于实时数据流处理领域，代码公开促进了进一步研究，尽管摘要未明确说明未来方向，但其成功展示了潜在扩展性。

title: Open-Vocabulary Octree-Graph for 3D Scene Understanding
abstract: Open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding is indispensable for embodied agents. Recent works leverage pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) for object segmentation and project them to point clouds to build 3D maps. Despite progress, a point cloud is a set of unordered coordinates that requires substantial storage space and does not directly convey occupancy information or spatial relation, making existing methods inefficient for downstream tasks, e.g., path planning and text-based object retrieval. To address these issues, we propose \textbf{Octree-Graph}, a novel scene representation for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding. Specifically, a Chronological Group-wise Segment Merging (CGSM) strategy and an Instance Feature Aggregation (IFA) algorithm are first designed to get 3D instances and corresponding semantic features. Subsequently, an adaptive-octree structure is developed that stores semantics and depicts the occupancy of an object adjustably according to its shape. Finally, the Octree-Graph is constructed where each adaptive-octree acts as a graph node, and edges describe the spatial relations among nodes. Extensive experiments on various tasks are conducted on several widely-used datasets, demonstrating the versatility and effectiveness of our method. Code is available \href{https://github.com/yifeisu/OV-Octree-Graph}{here}.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出一种名为Octree-Graph的新型场景表示方法，用于开放词汇3D场景理解，通过结合自适应八叉树和图结构来高效表示语义和空间关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放词汇3D场景理解对具身智能体至关重要，但现有方法依赖点云表示，其作为无序坐标集合需要大量存储空间，且无法直接传达占用信息或空间关系，导致在下游任务如路径规划和基于文本的对象检索中效率低下。因此，开发更高效和结构化表示成为研究的核心驱动力，以弥补点云在实用性和可扩展性上的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Octree-Graph作为关键创新，首先设计Chronological Group-wise Segment Merging (CGSM)策略和Instance Feature Aggregation (IFA)算法，用于从点云中提取3D实例及其语义特征。接着，开发自适应八叉树结构，根据对象形状调整存储语义和占用信息，然后构建Octree-Graph，其中每个自适应八叉树作为图节点，边描述节点间的空间关系，从而实现紧凑且可解释的场景表示。
light_analysis.result: 在多个广泛使用的数据集上进行了多样任务的广泛实验，结果表明Octree-Graph在通用性和有效性上优于现有基于点云的方法，提升了存储效率和空间关系表达。然而，摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升或存储减少的数值，需要参考完整论文以获取详细实验数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出Octree-Graph，为开放词汇3D场景理解提供了一种高效结构化表示，通过整合八叉树和图结构显著改善场景理解的实用性和可扩展性，具有重要学术价值和应用潜力，如机器人导航和智能交互任务。未来工作可能包括算法优化以应对大规模场景或扩展更多下游应用。

title: Anomaly Resilient Temporal QoS Prediction using Hypergraph Convoluted Transformer Network
abstract: Quality-of-Service (QoS) prediction is a critical task in the service lifecycle, enabling precise and adaptive service recommendations by anticipating performance variations over time in response to evolving network uncertainties and user preferences. However, contemporary QoS prediction methods frequently encounter data sparsity and cold-start issues, which hinder accurate QoS predictions and limit the ability to capture diverse user preferences. Additionally, these methods often assume QoS data reliability, neglecting potential credibility issues such as outliers and the presence of greysheep users and services with atypical invocation patterns. Furthermore, traditional approaches fail to leverage diverse features, including domain-specific knowledge and complex higher-order patterns, essential for accurate QoS predictions. In this paper, we introduce a real-time, trust-aware framework for temporal QoS prediction to address the aforementioned challenges, featuring an end-to-end deep architecture called the Hypergraph Convoluted Transformer Network (HCTN). HCTN combines a hypergraph structure with graph convolution over hyper-edges to effectively address high-sparsity issues by capturing complex, high-order correlations. Complementing this, the transformer network utilizes multi-head attention along with parallel 1D convolutional layers and fully connected dense blocks to capture both fine-grained and coarse-grained dynamic patterns. Additionally, our approach includes a sparsity-resilient solution for detecting greysheep users and services, incorporating their unique characteristics to improve prediction accuracy. Trained with a robust loss function resistant to outliers, HCTN demonstrated state-of-the-art performance on the large-scale WSDREAM-2 datasets for response time and throughput.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于超图卷积变压器网络（HCTN）的异常弹性时间QoS预测框架，结合超图结构和Transformer以有效处理数据稀疏性和异常问题。
light_analysis.motivation: QoS预测是服务生命周期中的关键任务，能通过预测随时间变化的性能波动来支持精准和自适应的服务推荐。然而，现有方法面临数据稀疏性、冷启动问题，以及忽略异常用户和服务（如greysheep）的可信度问题，这导致预测准确性受限。此外，传统方法未能有效利用领域知识和复杂高阶模式，无法捕获动态网络不确定性。因此，本研究旨在开发一个实时、信任感知的框架，以克服这些挑战并提升服务质量。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于HCTN，这是一个端到端的深度架构。首先，通过超图结构和图卷积捕获复杂的高阶相关性，以解决高稀疏性问题。其次，Transformer网络采用多头注意力机制，结合并行1D卷积层和全连接密集块，以捕捉细粒度和粗粒度的动态模式。此外，该方法包含一个稀疏弹性的解决方案，用于检测greysheep用户和服务，并整合其独特特征以提高预测准确性。训练时使用对异常点鲁棒的损失函数，确保模型稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 在WSDREAM-2大规模数据集上，HCTN展示了最先进的性能，针对响应时间和吞吐量的预测。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但实验表明HCTN优于基线方法，在异常弹性和准确性方面有显著提升。该框架能有效处理数据稀疏性并改善QoS预测效果，验证了其在实际应用中的鲁棒性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了HCTN框架，它通过结合超图卷积和Transformer，成功解决了QoS预测中的数据稀疏性、异常检测和特征利用问题。学术上，该方法为时间序列预测和推荐系统提供了新的思路；应用上，可提高服务推荐的准确性和鲁棒性。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他领域或优化计算效率，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Domain-Oriented Time Series Inference Agents for Reasoning and Automated Analysis
abstract: Time series analysis is crucial in real-world applications, yet traditional methods focus on isolated tasks only, and recent studies on time series reasoning remain limited to either single-step inference or are constrained to natural language answers. In this work, we introduce TS-Reasoner, a domain-specialized agent designed for multi-step time series inference. By integrating large language model (LLM) reasoning with domain-specific computational tools and an error feedback loop, TS-Reasoner enables domain-informed, constraint-aware analytical workflows that combine symbolic reasoning with precise numerical analysis. We assess the system's capabilities along two axes: (1) fundamental time series understanding assessed by TimeSeriesExam and (2) complex, multi-step inference evaluated by a newly proposed dataset designed to test both compositional reasoning and computational precision in time series analysis. Experiments show that our approach outperforms standalone general-purpose LLMs in both basic time series concept understanding as well as the multi-step time series inference task, highlighting the promise of domain-specialized agents for automating real-world time series reasoning and analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了TS-Reasoner，一个结合大语言模型和领域特定工具的时间序列推理代理，实现了多步推理和自动化分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列分析在现实应用中至关重要，但传统方法往往专注于孤立任务，缺乏集成性；而近期研究或局限于单步推理，或仅输出自然语言答案，无法满足复杂多步推理和精确数值分析的需求。这导致现有方法在自动化分析和实际部署中存在不足，限制了其在需要领域知识和计算精确度的场景中的应用。因此，开发一种能结合符号推理与数值分析的领域专业化代理显得尤为迫切，以提升时间序列推理的效率和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究引入TS-Reasoner，一个领域专业化代理，通过集成大语言模型的推理能力、领域特定计算工具和错误反馈循环，构建了一个结合符号推理与精确数值分析的工作流程。该方法的关键创新在于利用领域知识约束推理过程，支持多步时间序列推理任务，确保分析既具有逻辑性又保持数值准确性。研究中使用了新设计的数据集来评估系统在时间序列理解（如TimeSeriesExam）和复杂推理任务中的性能，以测试组合推理和计算精度。
light_analysis.result: 实验评估基于两个维度：基本时间序列概念理解（使用TimeSeriesExam数据集）和复杂多步推理（使用新提出的数据集）。结果显示，TS-Reasoner在基础理解和多步推理任务上均显著优于独立的通用大语言模型，强调了领域专业化代理的优势。尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标（如准确率），但研究结果表明，该方法在提升推理准确性和自动化能力方面具有明显效果，为时间序列分析提供了更有效的解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了TS-Reasoner，一种融合大语言模型推理与领域工具的时间序列推理代理，成功实现了多步推理和精确分析，展示了领域专业化代理在自动化现实世界时间序列分析中的潜力。其学术价值在于结合符号和数值方法，推动了AI在时间序列领域的应用；实际应用中，可增强分析效率和准确性。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多领域或优化工具集成，但摘要未明确说明具体方向，需要进一步探索以克服潜在局限性。

title: From Geometric Mimicry to Comprehensive Generation: A Context-Informed Multimodal Diffusion Model for Urban Morphology Synthesis
abstract: Urban morphology is fundamental to determining urban functionality and vitality. Prevailing simulation methods, however, often oversimplify morphological generation as a geometric problem, lacking the fusion of urban semantics and geographical context. To address this limitation, this study proposes ControlCity, a diffusion model that achieves comprehensive urban morphology generation through multimodal information fusion. We first constructed a quadruple ``image-text-metadata-building footprints" dataset from 22 cities worldwide. ControlCity utilizes this information as control conditions. Specifically, an enhanced ControlNet encodes image-based spatial constraints, while text and metadata provide semantic guidance and geographical context to collectively direct the generation. Experimental results demonstrate that compared to the unimodal baseline, this method achieves significant advantages in morphological fidelity. Specifically, FID (lower scores indicate less visual error) was reduced by 71.01%, reaching 50.94, and MIoU (higher scores indicate greater spatial overlap) improved by 38.46%, reaching 0.36. Furthermore, the model demonstrates robust knowledge generalization and controllability, enabling cross-city style transfer and zero-shot generation for unknown cities. Ablation studies reveal the distinct roles of images, text, and metadata in the generation. This study confirms that multimodal fusion is crucial for achieving the transition from ``geometric mimicry" to ``comprehensive generation," providing a novel paradigm for urban morphology research and applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ControlCity，一个基于多模态融合的扩散模型，实现从几何模仿到全面生成的城市形态合成。
light_analysis.motivation: 城市形态是决定城市功能和活力的关键，但现有模拟方法过度简化为几何问题，缺乏城市语义和地理上下文的融合。这导致生成结果不准确，限制城市规划应用的实效。现有方法忽视多模态信息的集成，因此需要创新模型来融合图像、文本和元数据，以提升生成全面性和真实性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出ControlCity扩散模型，通过多模态信息融合进行城市形态生成。首先，从全球22个城市构建四元组数据集，包括图像、文本、元数据和建筑足迹。模型利用增强的ControlNet编码图像空间约束，同时文本和元数据提供语义指导和地理上下文作为控制条件。这种方法实现了多模态数据的协同作用，推动形态生成超越单纯的几何模仿。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，ControlCity相比单模态基线在形态保真度上具有显著优势：FID（越低表示视觉误差越小）降低71.01%至50.94，MIoU（越高表示空间重叠越大）提高38.46%至0.36。模型还展现出稳健的知识泛化能力，支持跨城市风格转移和零样本生成，证明多模态融合的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多模态融合是实现城市形态从“几何模仿”过渡到“全面生成”的关键，ControlCity为此提供了新的研究范式，具有重要学术和实际应用价值，未来可进一步优化泛化能力和探索更多模态集成。

title: Form and meaning co-determine the realization of tone in Taiwan Mandarin spontaneous speech: the case of T2-T3 and T3-T3 tone sandhi
abstract: In Standard Chinese, Tone 3 (the dipping tone) becomes Tone 2 (rising tone) when followed by another Tone 3. Previous studies have noted that this sandhi process may be incomplete, in the sense that the assimilated Tone 3 is still distinct from a true Tone 2. While Mandarin Tone 3 sandhi is widely studied using carefully controlled laboratory speech (Xu, 1997) and more formal registers of Beijing Mandarin (Yuan & Y. Chen, 2014), less is known about its realization in spontaneous speech, and about the effect of contextual factors on tonal realization. The present study investigates the pitch contours of two-character words with T2-T3 and T3-T3 tone patterns in spontaneous Taiwan Mandarin conversations. Our analysis makes use of the Generative Additive Mixed Model (GAMM, Wood, 2017) to examine fundamental frequency (F0) contours as a function of normalized time. We consider various factors known to influence pitch contours, including gender, duration, word position, bigram probability, neighboring tones, speaker, and also novel predictors, word and word sense (Chuang et al., 2025). Our analyses revealed that in spontaneous Taiwan Mandarin, T3-T3 words become indistinguishable from T2-T3 words, indicating complete sandhi, once the strong effect of word (or word sense) is taken into account.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究揭示台湾闽南语口语中，词和词义共同决定声调实现，T3-T3变调完全。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究主要基于实验室语音和正式北京话探讨普通话声调变调，但对口语中声调实现及上下文因素的影响了解不足。该研究旨在解决台湾闽南语口语中T2-T3和T3-T3声调模式的具体实现问题，强调自然语境下声调变化的重要性，以补充语言学中对声调变调的实证基础，尤其是在非正式对话中上下文因素如词义的作用未被充分研究。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用生成性相加混合模型（GAMM）分析台湾闽南语口语中双字词的音高轮廓。将基本频率（F0）建模为归一化时间的函数，并整合多种影响因素，包括性别、时长、词位置、二元语法概率、邻近声调、说话者，以及创新的预测因子如词和词义。通过GAMM框架，全面评估声调实现的动态变化，揭示上下文因素在声调变调中的作用。
light_analysis.result: 分析显示，当将词和词义作为影响因素纳入GAMM模型时，T3-T3双字词的音高轮廓与T2-T3双字词变得无法区分，这表明在台湾闽南语口语中，第三声变调过程是完全的。这一结果与先前研究中可能暗示不完全变调的发现形成对比，突出了词义等上下文因素在声调实现中的关键作用，并通过模型中的预测因子影响得到了验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证实了词和词义在台湾闽南语口语声调实现中的核心作用，强调了声调变调在自然语境下的完全性，为语言学中的声调理论提供了新见解。这一发现对语音处理、方言研究和自然语言处理具有实际应用价值。未来工作可扩展到其他方言或更大数据集，以验证和深化这些发现，并探索更多上下文因素的影响。

title: SG-DeepONet: Source-generalized deep operator learning for full waveform inversion
abstract: Full waveform inversion (FWI) aims to reconstruct subsurface velocity models from observed seismic wavefields and has recently benefited from advances in deep learning (DL). The performance of DL-based FWI critically depends on the diversity of training data, yet existing datasets such as OpenFWI rely on fixed or weakly varying source conditions, limiting their ability to represent realistic seismic scenarios and hindering source generalization. To address this issue, we construct a new source-variable seismic dataset, termed SVFWI, by systematically varying the frequencies and horizontal locations of multiple surface sources. SVFWI is further divided into three subsets that respectively model frequency variations, location variations, and their combined effects, providing a challenging benchmark in data-driven FWI. We further propose SG-DeepONet, a novel DeepONet-based encoder-decoder framework tailored for FWI. The branch network extracts multi-scale time-frequency features from seismic observations, the trunk network explicitly embeds source physical parameters, and an interactive decoding network enables effective nonlinear fusion and high-fidelity velocity reconstruction. Extensive experiments on SVFWI demonstrate that SG-DeepONet achieves superior inversion accuracy and robustness under varying source conditions compared with existing DL-based FWI methods.

light_analysis.overview: SG-DeepONet是一个源泛化的深度算子学习框架，通过构建新数据集SVFWI和编码器-解码器网络，提升全波形反演在不同源条件下的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 全波形反演（FWI）利用深度学习（DL）重建地下速度模型，但其性能严重依赖训练数据多样性。现有数据集如OpenFWI仅包含固定或弱变化源条件，无法模拟真实地震场景中源频率和位置的多样性，导致模型泛化能力受限，影响了实际地震勘探的准确性。因此，迫切需要开发能处理多变源条件的方法，以解决源泛化问题，提升DL-based FWI的鲁棒性和应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出SG-DeepONet，一种基于DeepONet的编码器-解码器框架，专为FWI设计。首先，构建了SVFWI数据集，通过系统变化多个表面源的频率和水平位置，并分为三个子集：频率变化、位置变化及其组合，以提供多样化的训练基准。SG-DeepONet包括分支网络提取地震观测的多尺度时间-频率特征，主干网络显式嵌入源物理参数，以及交互式解码器网络实现非线性融合和高保真速度重建，从而增强源泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在SVFWI数据集上进行大量实验，SG-DeepONet在不同源条件下展现出优越性能。与现有基于深度学习的全波形反演方法相比，它在反演精度和鲁棒性方面均显著改进，有效重建速度模型。SVFWI的三个子集提供了全面测试基准，验证了SG-DeepONet在频率变化、位置变化及其组合场景下的源泛化能力。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数据，但强调了相对于基线的全面优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了SG-DeepONet框架和SVFWI数据集，有效解决了FWI中的源泛化问题。通过结合物理参数嵌入和多尺度特征学习，该方法提升了反演的鲁棒性和准确性，具有重要学术价值，为数据驱动的FWI提供了新思路。从实际应用看，这有助于提高地震勘探的效率和精度。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但潜在方向可能包括扩展到更复杂地质模型或整合更多物理约束。

title: A Survey of Mamba
abstract: As one of the most representative DL techniques, Transformer architecture has empowered numerous advanced models, especially the large language models (LLMs) that comprise billions of parameters, becoming a cornerstone in deep learning. Despite the impressive achievements, Transformers still face inherent limitations, particularly the time-consuming inference resulting from the quadratic computation complexity of attention calculation. Recently, a novel architecture named Mamba, drawing inspiration from classical state space models (SSMs), has emerged as a promising alternative for building foundation models, delivering comparable modeling abilities to Transformers while preserving near-linear scalability concerning sequence length. This has sparked an increasing number of studies actively exploring Mamba's potential to achieve impressive performance across diverse domains. Given such rapid evolution, there is a critical need for a systematic review that consolidates existing Mamba-empowered models, offering a comprehensive understanding of this emerging model architecture. In this survey, we therefore conduct an in-depth investigation of recent Mamba-associated studies, covering three main aspects: the advancements of Mamba-based models, the techniques of adapting Mamba to diverse data, and the applications where Mamba can excel. Specifically, we first review the foundational knowledge of various representative deep learning models and the details of Mamba-1&2 as preliminaries. Then, to showcase the significance of Mamba for AI, we comprehensively review the related studies focusing on Mamba models' architecture design, data adaptability, and applications. Finally, we present a discussion of current limitations and explore various promising research directions to provide deeper insights for future investigations.

light_analysis.overview: 这篇论文对 Mamba 架构进行了系统性综述，总结了其在模型设计、数据适应性和应用方面的最新进展。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer 架构是深度学习的基石，尤其是赋能了大型语言模型等先进模型，但其注意力计算的二次计算复杂度导致推理时间消耗大，限制了效率。Mamba 作为一种基于状态空间模型的新架构，提供了与 Transformer 相媲美的建模能力，同时保持了序列长度的近线性可扩展性，成为有前景的替代方案。随着相关研究的迅速增加，急需系统性综述来整合现有 Mamba 赋能模型，以全面理解这一新兴架构，促进未来探索和应用发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用文献回顾和分析的方法，深入调查了与 Mamba 相关的研究。首先，回顾了包括 Mamba-1&2 在内的深度学习模型基础知识和细节作为初步。然后，从三个方面系统综述：基于 Mamba 的模型架构设计进展、适应不同类型数据的技术、以及 Mamba 在多样化应用领域的表现。通过这种结构化的方式，论文旨在提供一个全面的视角，展示 Mamba 在人工智能中的潜力和重要性，而不是提出新的实验或模型。
light_analysis.result: 作为调查论文，论文没有进行具体实验，但总结了现有研究的成果，表明 Mamba 在多个领域中展现出令人印象深刻的性能，能够与 Transformer 竞争。综述强调了 Mamba 在保持建模能力的同时，通过近线性可扩展性提高了推理效率，为构建基础模型提供了新思路。虽然没有给出具体数据指标，但论文整合了相关研究，展示了 Mamba 在如语言处理等领域的应用潜力和优化效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提供了一个对 Mamba 架构的系统性综述，涵盖了模型设计、数据适应性和应用方面的最新进展。其学术价值在于帮助研究人员全面理解 Mamba 的优势和局限性，推动相关技术发展；实际应用价值则在于为构建高效的基础模型提供参考。此外，论文讨论了当前研究的局限性，并探索了未来的研究方向，如进一步优化架构和扩展应用领域，为后续调查提供了深入的见解。

title: drGT: Attention-Guided Gene Assessment of Drug Response Utilizing a Drug-Cell-Gene Heterogeneous Network
abstract: For translational impact, both accurate drug response prediction and biological plausibility of predictive features are needed. We present drGT, a heterogeneous graph deep learning model over drugs, genes, and cell lines that couples prediction with mechanism-oriented interpretability via attention coefficients (ACs).   We assess both predictive generalization (random, unseen-drug, unseen-cell, and zero-shot splits) and biological plausibility (use of text-mined PubMed gene-drug co-mentions and comparison to a structure-based DTI predictor) on GDSC, NCI60, and CTRP datasets. Across benchmarks, drGT consistently delivers top regression performance while maintaining competitive classification accuracy for drug sensitivity. Under random 5-fold cross-validation, drGT attains an AUROC of up to 0.945 (3rd overall) and an $R^2$ up to 0.690, outperforming all baselines on regression. In leave-one-out tests for unseen cell lines and drugs, drGT achieves AUROCs of 0.706 and 0.844, and $R^2$ values of 0.692 and 0.022, the only model yielding positive $R^2$ for unseen drugs. In zero-shot prediction, drGT achieves an AUROC of 0.786 and a regression $R^2$ of 0.334, both representing the highest scores among all models. For interpretability, AC-derived drug-gene links recover known biology: among 976 drugs with known DTIs, 36.9% of predicted links match established DTIs, and 63.7% are supported by either PubMed abstracts or a structure-based predictive model. Enrichment analyses of AC-prioritized genes reveal drug-perturbed biological processes, providing pathway-level explanations.   drGT advances predictive generalization and mechanism-centered interpretability, offering state-of-the-art regression accuracy and literature-supported biological hypotheses that demonstrate the use of graph learning from heterogeneous input data for biological discovery. Code: https://github.com/sciluna/drGT

light_analysis.overview: drGT通过异构图深度学习和注意力系数，实现了药物反应预测的高准确性和生物学机制解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决药物反应预测中准确性和生物学合理性的双重挑战。在翻译医学中，准确预测药物对细胞系的反应至关重要，但现有方法往往在泛化能力和特征解释性上存在不足，难以同时确保预测的可靠性和生物学意义。drGT模型通过结合预测与基于注意力系数的机制导向解释性，旨在提升预测的泛化能力并生成可信的生物学洞察，为药物发现和精准医疗提供支持。
light_analysis.method: drGT模型构建了一个药物-细胞-基因异构图，采用图深度学习技术进行训练。核心创新在于利用注意力系数来评估基因对药物反应的重要性，从而实现预测与解释性的耦合。模型在GDSC、NCI60和CTRP数据集上进行评估，通过注意力引导的基因评估提取生物学相关特征，具体架构细节如层数和参数摘要未明确说明，但基于异构图网络和注意力机制实现端到端学习。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，drGT在多种基准测试中表现优异。在随机5折交叉验证中，AUROC高达0.945（排名第三），R²为0.690，回归性能优于所有基线模型。在未见细胞系和药物的留一法测试中，AUROC分别为0.706和0.844，R²分别为0.692和0.022，是唯一在未见药物上获得正R²的模型。零样本预测中，AUROC为0.786，R²为0.334，均为最高分。解释性分析表明，注意力系数衍生的药物-基因链接有36.9%匹配已知药物-靶点相互作用，63.7%得到PubMed摘要或结构预测模型支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: drGT通过异构图学习和注意力机制，显著提升了药物反应预测的泛化能力和机制中心解释性。该研究提供了最先进的回归准确性，并生成了文献支持的生物学假设，展示了图学习在生物学发现中的应用潜力，有助于推动药物发现和精准医疗。未来工作可扩展至更多数据集或临床验证，以进一步评估模型的通用性和实用性。

title: Revisiting RGBT Tracking Benchmarks from the Perspective of Modality Validity: A New Benchmark, Problem, and Solution
abstract: RGBT tracking draws increasing attention because its robustness in multi-modal warranting (MMW) scenarios, such as nighttime and adverse weather conditions, where relying on a single sensing modality fails to ensure stable tracking results. However, existing benchmarks predominantly contain videos collected in common scenarios where both RGB and thermal infrared (TIR) information are of sufficient quality. This weakens the representativeness of existing benchmarks in severe imaging conditions, leading to tracking failures in MMW scenarios. To bridge this gap, we present a new benchmark considering the modality validity, MV-RGBT, captured specifically from MMW scenarios where either RGB (extreme illumination) or TIR (thermal truncation) modality is invalid. Hence, it is further divided into two subsets according to the valid modality, offering a new compositional perspective for evaluation and providing valuable insights for future designs. Moreover, MV-RGBT is the most diverse benchmark of its kind, featuring 36 different object categories captured across 19 distinct scenes. Furthermore, considering severe imaging conditions in MMW scenarios, a new problem is posed in RGBT tracking, named `when to fuse', to stimulate the development of fusion strategies for such scenarios. To facilitate its discussion, we propose a new solution with a mixture of experts, named MoETrack, where each expert generates independent tracking results along with a confidence score. Extensive results demonstrate the significant potential of MV-RGBT in advancing RGBT tracking and elicit the conclusion that fusion is not always beneficial, especially in MMW scenarios. Besides, MoETrack achieves state-of-the-art results on several benchmarks, including MV-RGBT, GTOT, and LasHeR. Github: https://github.com/Zhangyong-Tang/MVRGBT.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出新基准MV-RGBT、问题'when to fuse'和解决方案MoETrack，以解决多模态护航场景中RGBT跟踪的挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: RGBT跟踪在多模态护航场景（如夜间和恶劣天气）中具有鲁棒性，但现有基准主要包含RGB和热红外信息质量都高的常见场景视频。这导致基准在严重成像条件下的代表性不足，限制了在真实挑战性环境中的跟踪性能评估和模型发展。因此，需要更真实的基准来模拟模态无效的场景，以推动该领域进步。
light_analysis.method: 本研究首先提出MV-RGBT基准，专门从多模态护航场景捕捉数据，其中RGB或热红外模态无效，并根据有效模态分为两个子集。其次，引入新问题'when to fuse'，激励开发适用于此类场景的融合策略。作为解决方案，提出MoETrack，一个基于专家混合的模型，每个专家独立生成跟踪结果并输出置信度分数，以动态决定何时进行多模态融合。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，MV-RGBT基准能有效评估RGBT跟踪在多模态护航场景中的性能，并揭示融合策略并非总是有益，特别是在模态无效的情况下。MoETrack在多个基准上取得了最先进的性能，包括MV-RGBT、GTOT和LasHeR，验证了其在处理挑战性场景中的有效性。摘要未提供具体性能指标数据，但强调了方法的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的贡献在于提出MV-RGBT基准、定义'when to fuse'问题和开发MoETrack解决方案。学术上，它提供了新的评估视角，促进了多模态跟踪研究；实际上，有助于改进恶劣环境中的跟踪鲁棒性。未来工作可能包括扩展基准到更多场景或优化融合策略，以应对更复杂的现实挑战。

title: Gaze-guided Hand-Object Interaction Synthesis: Dataset and Method
abstract: Gaze plays a crucial role in revealing human attention and intention, particularly in hand-object interaction scenarios, where it guides and synchronizes complex tasks that require precise coordination between the brain, hand, and object. Motivated by this, we introduce a novel task: Gaze-Guided Hand-Object Interaction Synthesis, with potential applications in augmented reality, virtual reality, and assistive technologies. To support this task, we present GazeHOI, the first dataset to capture simultaneous 3D modeling of gaze, hand, and object interactions. This task poses significant challenges due to the inherent sparsity and noise in gaze data, as well as the need for high consistency and physical plausibility in generating hand and object motions. To tackle these issues, we propose a stacked gaze-guided hand-object interaction diffusion model, named GHO-Diffusion. The stacked design effectively reduces the complexity of motion generation. We also introduce HOI-Manifold Guidance during the sampling stage of GHO-Diffusion, enabling fine-grained control over generated motions while maintaining the data manifold. Additionally, we propose a spatial-temporal gaze feature encoding for the diffusion condition and select diffusion results based on consistency scores between gaze-contact maps and gaze-interaction trajectories. Extensive experiments highlight the effectiveness of our method and the unique contributions of our dataset. More details in https://takiee.github.io/gaze-hoi/.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (TMM), 2026. Project Page: https://takiee.github.io/gaze-hoi/

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了目光引导的手-物体交互合成任务、首个数据集GazeHOI以及一个堆叠式扩散模型GHO-Diffusion，旨在通过目光数据生成一致且物理合理的手和物体运动。
light_analysis.motivation: 目光在人类注意力与意图揭示中扮演关键角色，尤其在需要精确协调手、脑和物体的交互场景中，具有引导和同步复杂任务的作用。本研究动机源于在增强现实、虚拟现实和辅助技术等领域的潜在应用，需解决目光数据稀疏性、噪声问题以及生成动作时的高一致性和物理合理性挑战。现有方法可能未充分处理这些复杂因素，因此提出了新的合成任务以弥补不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文方法包括构建首个数据集GazeHOI，捕获同时的3D目光、手和物体交互建模，以支持新任务。核心方法为GHO-Diffusion，一个堆叠式目光引导扩散模型，通过堆叠设计降低运动生成的复杂度。创新点包括在采样阶段引入HOI-Manifold Guidance，实现细粒度控制并保持数据流形；同时使用空间-时间目光特征编码作为扩散条件，并基于目光-接触图和目光-交互轨迹的一致性分数选择最佳结果。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验数据，如准确率或效率提升。但论文进行了广泛的实验，结果表明GHO-Diffusion方法在目光引导的手-物体交互合成中具有有效性，并突出了GazeHOI数据集的独特贡献。实验可能展示了生成运动的一致性和物理合理性改进，但与基线方法的对比情况未在摘要中详细描述。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究主要贡献在于引入了目光引导的手-物体交互合成任务，提供了首个相关数据集GazeHOI，并开发了有效的堆叠式扩散模型GHO-Diffusion，推动计算机视觉和人机交互领域的进展。学术价值在于整合目光数据以提升交互模拟的真实性，实际应用价值在于AR/VR和辅助技术的开发。局限性可能包括目光数据处理挑战，未来工作可优化模型鲁棒性和扩展数据集多样性。

title: Interpretable factorization of clinical questionnaires to identify latent factors of psychopathology
abstract: Psychiatry research seeks to understand the manifestations of psychopathology in behavior, as measured in questionnaire data, by identifying a small number of latent factors that explain them. While factor analysis is the traditional tool for this purpose, the resulting factors may not be interpretable, and may also be subject to confounding variables. Moreover, missing data are common, and explicit imputation is often required. To overcome these limitations, we introduce interpretability constrained questionnaire factorization (ICQF), a non-negative matrix factorization method with regularization tailored for questionnaire data. Our method aims to promote factor interpretability and solution stability. We provide an optimization procedure with theoretical convergence guarantees, and an automated procedure to detect latent dimensionality accurately. We validate these procedures using realistic synthetic data. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in a widely used general-purpose questionnaire, in two independent datasets (the Healthy Brain Network and Adolescent Brain Cognitive Development studies). Specifically, we show that ICQF improves interpretability, as defined by domain experts, while preserving diagnostic information across a range of disorders, and outperforms competing methods for smaller dataset sizes. This suggests that the regularization in our method matches domain characteristics. The python implementation for ICQF is available at https://github.com/jefferykclam/ICQF.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了ICQF方法，一种正则化非负矩阵分解，用于提高临床问卷因子分解的可解释性和稳定性，以识别心理病理学的潜在因子。
light_analysis.motivation: 精神病学研究需要通过因子分析从问卷数据中识别潜在心理病理因子，但传统方法存在因子难以解释、易受混淆变量影响的问题，且缺失数据常见，需显式插补。这些限制阻碍了因子在临床实践中的有效应用，因此开发更可解释且鲁棒的方法至关重要。
light_analysis.method: ICQF是一种非负矩阵分解方法，通过正则化专门针对问卷数据设计，旨在促进因子可解释性和解决方案稳定性。关键创新包括优化过程（具有理论收敛保证）和自动检测潜在维度的算法。方法首先用合成数据验证，并在两个真实数据集（Healthy Brain Network和Adolescent Brain Cognitive Development）的通用问卷中应用。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明ICQF提高了因子的可解释性（由领域专家评估），同时保留了对多种疾病的诊断信息。在较小数据集规模下，ICQF优于其他竞争方法，这表明其正则化策略有效匹配领域特性，具体性能指标如准确率摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: ICQF为问卷数据因子分解提供了一种可解释且稳定的方法，对精神病学研究有重要学术和临床应用价值，其正则化设计增强了方法的实用性，未来工作可能包括扩展验证或探索更多临床指标，局限性摘要未明确说明。

title: High-Quality Facial Geometry and Appearance Capture at Home
abstract: Facial geometry and appearance capture have demonstrated tremendous success in 3D scanning real humans in studios. Recent works propose to democratize this technique while keeping the results high quality. However, they are still inconvenient for daily usage. In addition, they focus on an easier problem of only capturing facial skin. This paper proposes a novel method for high-quality face capture, featuring an easy-to-use system and the capability to model the complete face with skin, mouth interior, hair, and eyes. We reconstruct facial geometry and appearance from a single co-located smartphone flashlight sequence captured in a dim room where the flashlight is the dominant light source (e.g. rooms with curtains or at night). To model the complete face, we propose a novel hybrid representation to effectively model both eyes and other facial regions, along with novel techniques to learn it from images. We apply a combined lighting model to compactly represent real illuminations and exploit a morphable face albedo model as a reflectance prior to disentangle diffuse and specular. Experiments show that our method can capture high-quality 3D relightable scans.
comment: CVPR 2024. Project page: https://yxuhan.github.io/CoRA/index.html ; Github repo: https://github.com/yxuhan/CoRA

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种新方法，使用智能手机闪光灯序列在家庭环境中高质量捕捉完整面部的几何和外观，包括皮肤、眼睛、口腔和头发。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前面部捕捉技术主要在工作室中成功，但家庭使用不便，且现有方法仅关注皮肤捕捉，无法建模完整面部（如眼睛、口腔内部和头发）。这限制了日常应用的普及和质量，因此本文旨在开发一种易用系统，实现在家庭环境中高质量捕捉完整面部，以满足虚拟现实、游戏等领域的需求。
light_analysis.method: 方法基于单个智能手机闪光灯序列，在昏暗房间（以闪光灯为主要光源）捕捉面部。提出一种新型混合表示，以有效建模眼睛和面部其他区域，并结合图像学习技术。应用组合照明模型紧凑表示真实光照，利用可变面部反射率模型作为先验，解离漫反射和镜面反射，从而重建面部几何和外观。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法能够从智能手机闪光灯序列中捕捉高质量的可重光照3D面部扫描。虽未提供具体性能指标（如准确率或效率数据），但与基线方法相比，它展示了在家庭环境下实现完整面部建模的潜力，可能提升了捕捉的便利性和完整性。摘要未明确说明与其他方法的定量对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了一种易用、高质量的家庭面部捕捉方法，能建模完整面部（皮肤、眼睛、口腔、头发），推动了3D捕捉技术的民主化。学术上，提出了混合表示和照明模型等创新；应用上，为虚拟现实、游戏等提供便利。局限性可能包括对光照条件的依赖，未来工作可扩展到动态捕捉或优化硬件兼容性。

title: Exact and general decoupled solutions of the LMC Multitask Gaussian Process model
abstract: The Linear Model of Co-regionalization (LMC) is a very general multitask gaussian process model for regression or classification. While its expressiveness and conceptual simplicity are appealing, naive implementations have cubic complexity in the product (number of datapoints $\times$ number of tasks), making approximations mandatory for most applications. However, recent work has shown that in some settings the latent processes of the model can be decoupled, leading to a complexity that is only linear in the number of said processes. We here extend these results, showing from the most general assumptions that the only condition necessary to an efficient exact computation of the LMC is a mild hypothesis on the noise model. We introduce a full parametrization of the resulting \emph{projected LMC} model, enabling its efficient optimization. The effectiveness of this approach is assessed through synthetic and real-data experiments, testing in particular the behavior of its underlying noise model restriction.\\ Overall, the projected LMC appears as a competitive and simpler alternative to state-of-the art multitask gaussian process models. It greatly facilitates some computations such as training data updates or leave-one-out cross-validation, and is more interpretable, for it gives access to its low-dimensional quantities and to their explicit relation with the full-dimensional data. These qualities could facilitate the adoption by various industries of entire classes of methodologies, notably multitask bayesian optimization.

light_analysis.overview: 本文扩展了LMC多任务高斯过程模型的解耦方法，通过温和噪声假设实现高效精确计算，并引入投影LMC模型作为更简单、可解释的替代方案。
light_analysis.motivation: 多任务高斯过程模型如LMC在回归和分类中应用广泛，但传统实现的计算复杂度为立方级（数据点数乘以任务数），使得近似方法成为必要，这可能牺牲精度并限制模型在大规模场景下的应用。现有方法在复杂度和准确性之间难以平衡，导致计算效率低下和可扩展性问题。本研究旨在解决这一瓶颈，通过探索潜在过程的解耦机制，降低复杂度以实现高效且精确的计算，从而提升多任务学习的实用性和性能。
light_analysis.method: 研究从最一般的假设出发，扩展LMC模型的解耦解决方案，表明只需对噪声模型施加一个温和条件（如噪声结构限制），即可实现高效精确计算。核心方法是引入投影LMC模型的完整参数化，该模型将潜在过程解耦，使计算复杂度线性于过程数量，而非传统的立方复杂度。这允许通过优化参数实现模型高效训练，避免了近似方法的误差。关键创新在于识别噪声模型限制下的解耦可能性，并提供可优化的参数框架，增强了模型的灵活性和可操作性。
light_analysis.result: 通过合成数据和真实数据实验评估，投影LMC模型表现出竞争性的性能，成为现有最先进多任务高斯过程模型的更简单替代方案。实验特别测试了其底层噪声模型限制的行为，确认了模型的有效性。尽管摘要未明确提供具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进数据，但结果表明该方法在保持精确计算的同时，显著降低了计算负担，并更易于实施训练数据更新和留一交叉验证等任务，与基线方法相比更具实用性和可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于扩展了LMC模型的解耦理论，提出投影LMC模型，实现高效精确的多任务学习，其学术价值在于提供了更简单、可解释的高斯过程框架，增强了模型的可操作性和理论理解。实际应用中，该方法可促进多任务贝叶斯优化等行业技术的采纳，通过降低计算复杂度和提高可解释性。潜在局限性可能包括噪声模型假设的适用性，未来工作可探索更广泛的噪声条件或扩展到其他多任务场景以进一步提升通用性。

title: Contraction Theory for Nonlinear Stability Analysis and Learning-based Control: A Tutorial Overview
abstract: Contraction theory is an analytical tool to study differential dynamics of a non-autonomous (i.e., time-varying) nonlinear system under a contraction metric defined with a uniformly positive definite matrix, the existence of which results in a necessary and sufficient characterization of incremental exponential stability of multiple solution trajectories with respect to each other. By using a squared differential length as a Lyapunov-like function, its nonlinear stability analysis boils down to finding a suitable contraction metric that satisfies a stability condition expressed as a linear matrix inequality, indicating that many parallels can be drawn between well-known linear systems theory and contraction theory for nonlinear systems. Furthermore, contraction theory takes advantage of a superior robustness property of exponential stability used in conjunction with the comparison lemma. This yields much-needed safety and stability guarantees for neural network-based control and estimation schemes, without resorting to a more involved method of using uniform asymptotic stability for input-to-state stability. Such distinctive features permit the systematic construction of a contraction metric via convex optimization, thereby obtaining an explicit exponential bound on the distance between a time-varying target trajectory and solution trajectories perturbed externally due to disturbances and learning errors. The objective of this paper is, therefore, to present a tutorial overview of contraction theory and its advantages in nonlinear stability analysis of deterministic and stochastic systems, with an emphasis on deriving formal robustness and stability guarantees for various learning-based and data-driven automatic control methods. In particular, we provide a detailed review of techniques for finding contraction metrics and associated control and estimation laws using deep neural networks.
comment: Annual Reviews in Control, Preprint Version, Accepted, Oct. 1st

light_analysis.overview: 这篇论文提供了收缩理论在非线性稳定性分析中的教程概述，强调其为基于学习的控制方法提供形式化鲁棒性和稳定性保证的优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决非线性系统的稳定性分析问题，特别是在基于神经网络的控制和估计中确保安全性和稳定性。现有方法如使用均匀渐近稳定性进行输入到状态稳定性分析可能更复杂和繁琐，而收缩理论通过利用指数稳定性的鲁棒性属性，提供更直接且高效的保证。这一问题的重要性在于现代数据驱动的控制方案常面临扰动和学习误差，需要可靠的理论基础来避免性能下降或安全问题，从而推动自动控制方法的稳健发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用收缩理论作为核心分析方法，通过定义基于一致正定矩阵的收缩度量来研究非线性时变系统的微分动力学。关键创新点是将平方微分长度作为类李雅普诺夫函数，将非线性稳定性分析转化为寻找满足线性矩阵不等式条件的收缩度量，这类似于线性系统理论。此外，方法系统性地构建收缩度量 via 凸优化，并与深度神经网络结合，用于推导相关的控制和估计律，以实现稳定的系统行为，同时处理外部扰动和学习误差的影响。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果或性能指标，但指出收缩理论能提供形式化的鲁棒性和稳定性保证。通过凸优化获得的收缩度量，论文展示了如何给出目标轨迹与受扰动轨迹之间距离的显式指数界，这对于评估系统在面对干扰时的性能至关重要。与基线方法（如更复杂的均匀渐近稳定性分析）相比，收缩理论在简化分析过程的同时，保持了高水平的稳定性和安全性保证，适用于确定性和随机系统的非线性稳定性分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是系统性地综述收缩理论及其在非线性稳定性分析中的应用，特别是为基于学习和数据驱动的自动控制方法提供形式化的鲁棒性和稳定性保证。这具有重要的学术价值，连接了线性系统理论与非线性分析，推动了控制理论的发展，并增强了实际应用中的安全保障。研究的实际应用价值在于支持神经网络控制的可靠性，潜在未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂的动态系统或集成更多先进机器学习技术，以进一步提升性能和适应性。
